programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A luxurious overnight trip to Las Vegas is at stake as the remaining chefs compete in a head-to-head challenge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining hopefuls are challenged to create a unique dining experience for a large group of well-known chefs.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final two chefs work on their menus for a star-studded final dinner service. Only one chef will walk away victorious.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Eight former contestants are back to take on eight keen rookies. First up is the signature dish challenge, with the veterans trying to create the rookies' meals and trying to impress Gordon early on.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay announces that he is taking his risotto off of the Hell's Kitchen menu, and the contestants are tasked with preparing their own risotto dish in the hopes of replacing the old one for the remainder of the season.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: All 15 chefs walk into a dining room filled with Marines, where they find out they will have to cook dishes that represent the air, land and sea. Things take a drastic turn when one chef accuses Chef Ramsay of sabotaging her.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Tigerøye
programme.desc: Texas Rangers prøver å redde en forretningsmanns datter som er kidnappet av en japansk gjeng.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Bingobedraget
programme.desc: Walker prøver å få et nøkkelvitne til å vitne så han kan få dømt en notorisk narkolanger.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Pengetog
programme.desc: Rangerne oppdager at to stuntmenn planlegger et togran.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Røffe gater
programme.desc: Når rangerne oppdager at en gruppe rike tenåringer banker om hjemløse i Dallas og filmer det hele, går Walker undercover for å fakke gjengen.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Cowboy
programme.desc: Når Alex blir kidnappet, må Walker og Trivette finne henne før hun blir drept.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Krigssone, del 1
programme.desc: Rangerne blir overrumplet av en rekke omtalte, multimillion-ran begått av menn i klovnemasker, men etterforskningen blir personlig når Walkers nære venn, ranger Logan Reno, blir drept.

programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: That's How The Shore Goes
programme.desc: Ronnie slipper ut, og Snooki får trøst etter et møte med eksen. Gjengen tar farvel med The Shore, men ikke uten en siste tur i boblebadet.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Nelly, Russel Simmons, O-Town
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Nelly, Russel Simmons, O-Town.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Laura Prepon, James King, Devon Sawa
programme.desc: Tour the homes of the hottest new stars from the movie Slackers. Features tours of the homes of James King, Laura Prepon and Devon Sawa.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Jason Kidd, Damon Soudamire, Jerry Stackhouse
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Jason Kidd, Damon Soudamire, Jerry Stackhouse.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Cash Money Millionaires, Ali Landry, Ricky Williams
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Cash Money Millionaires, Ali Landry, Ricky Williams.

programme.title: Made: Moto-X
programme.desc: Kaitlin Smith wants to shed her girly girl reputation and find her inner strength by being MADE into a rough and tough motocross racer!

programme.title: Made: Basketball Player
programme.desc: Kenneth is a dancing diva who's determined to gain the acceptance of his military father by being Made into a basketball player.

programme.title: Made: Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: Ben has no luck in love and is hoping to be MADE into the Perfect Boyfriend.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The System
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) sets out to persuade the trusted henchman of a crime syndicate leader to testify against his boss.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Glass Cage
programme.desc: An electronically guarded prison confronts the Impossible Missions Force when it tries to free a political prisoner (Richard Garland) from an escape-proof glass cell.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Live Bait
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force invades the intricate world of spies to protect an American double agent and comes up against a human time bomb.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Doomsday
programme.desc: When an unscrupulous manufacturer risks World War III by offering a hydrogen bomb for sale, the Impossible Missions Force enters the bidding with a dangerous plan to keep the weapon out of enemy hands.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bunker, Pt. 1
programme.desc: The IMF races a paid killer who is stalking a nuclear scientist forced by the enemy to work on a device that could upset the world power balance in the first of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: I første episode møter vi Tine og Lars, som har svimlende åtte millioner å kjøpe hus og pusse opp for. Men det store budsjettet har ikke hjulpet dem så langt - kan ekspertene være til hjelp?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Ekspertene drar til Hørning, der presten og hennes familie trenger et nytt sted å bo. De leier et lite rekkehus og nå vil de gjerne flytte.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Öland
programme.desc: Tareq bikes through the unique landscape of Öland, Sweden's second largest island located in the Baltic Sea. It is a place where the interaction between man and nature have created a diverse and rich farmland with an amazing amount of small producers.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bornholm
programme.desc: Bornholm, the sunny bright green island with it’s own gastronomic tone is a true pioneer when it comes to local food at it’s finest quality. Tareq visit Denmark's first regional food culture house where they develop this unique flourishing cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Laponia
programme.desc: In the northern part of Sweden, you’ll find the stunning world heritage Laponia. Almost 10.000 square kilometres of nature reserves and national parks. Tareq visit the rich, unique culture of the sami in the vast impressive wilderness.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö & Copenhagen
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor returns to his home turf to see what has happened and what the future might bring to the new nordic cuisine. He visits a local goat farmer and meets up with young enthusiastic chefs who takes this nordic legacy further.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Zealand
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor visits the South Coast of Denmark to make his own versions of open-faced sandwiches and smoked fish dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Dalsland
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor puts on his hiking boots and explores the pilgrim trail of Dalsland in West Sweden. This episode will include outdoor cooking, foraging and beaver safari.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Hello Single Charlotte!
programme.desc: Charlotte kommer med store nyheter for Gaz . Kan Holly avsløre hemmeligheten sin nå? Aaron og Scotts dater med den nye jenta Chantelle ender dårlig.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Holly's Tears
programme.desc: Charlotte pusser snoppdetektivene på Gaz, og Scott forbløffer alle da han vil være kjæreste med den nye jenta Chantelle. Holly krangler med Charlotte da hun ser henne kysse Chloe.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
programme.desc: Mens Holly er borte tar Chloe og Charlotte vennskapet sitt til neste nivå. Chantelles plan for å teste Scott går helt feil og Chloe er rask til å utnytte det. Charlotte forsøker å ordne opp i ting med Holly.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: You're The Victim!
programme.desc: Sjefen Anna spanderer en tur til Hull på Geordiene. Gaz og Charlotte tilbringer natten sammen, og Chloe forteller endelig Chantelle sannheten om hva hun ga Scott. I tillegg kommer det enda en overraskelse når Marnie vender tilbake.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The 'L' Bomb
programme.desc: Festaften! En ny gutt ankommer og Chloe gleder seg. Charlotte sjekker opp en fyr rett foran Gaz. Marnie blir gal når en av Aarons venninner dukker opp. Den nye gutten fyrer opp krangelen mellom Scott og Chantelle.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Just Another Day at the Shore
programme.desc: Med støtte fra de fleste av de andre er Snooki på bedringens vei. Ronnies familie kommer på besøk, og Sammi ønsker å gjøre et godt førsteinntrykk. JWoww blir lei folkene i klubben og havner i slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Boardwalk Blowups
programme.desc: Mike ber jenter til huset, og situasjonen kommer ut av kontroll. Snooki havner i slåsskamp igjen. Ronnie havner også i bråk, og Sammi begynner å tvile på forholdet deres.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: What Happens in the AC
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Atlantic City, der moro blir til alvor idet Mike støter fra seg både Snooki og Jwoww. En av deltakerne avslører at hun har hatt spiseforstyrrelser.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Shot
programme.desc: Sommeren går mot slutten, men dramaet er ikke over. Pauly får en stalker, og en deltaker havner i fengsel etter en slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: That's How The Shore Goes
programme.desc: Ronnie slipper ut, og Snooki får trøst etter et møte med eksen. Gjengen tar farvel med The Shore, men ikke uten en siste tur i boblebadet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Season 1 Reunion
programme.desc: Man får svar på mange spørsmål når Snooki, The Situation, Jwoww, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi og Vinny kommer tilbake for mer krangling og innsikt i hva som faktisk foregikk i strandhuset i Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Trial
programme.desc: Catherine is put in charge of a murder case in court, and to bring justice to a five year old murdered son.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Kingdom by the Sea
programme.desc: Catherine is blocked out of an investigation involving a murder attempt by the C.I.A. But there are more shocks yet to come, and a familiar face returns.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Hollow Men
programme.desc: Vincent witnesses their latest murder and is unable to stop them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: What Rough Beast
programme.desc: Catherine is attacked in the park by two men disguised as policemen.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ceremony of Innocence
programme.desc: Following the death of investigative reporter, Bernie Spirko, Elliot Burch and Catherine set out to find the man who hired and killed Spirko.

programme.title: JAG: Trinity
programme.desc: Harm and his new partner, Marine Major Sara MacKenzie are drawn into a game of revenge when they're sent to Belfast, Ireland, to represent the legal interests of a Navy Lieutenant whose infant son has seemingly been abducted.

programme.title: JAG: Secrets
programme.desc: Admiral Chegwidden, Mac and Bud Roberts are taken hostage in the Admiral's office by Pvt. Magida, a Marine who escaped from a nearby Federal prison.

programme.title: JAG: Ghosts
programme.desc: Harm and Mac investigate an attempt on Admiral Chedwiggen's life and uncover the fact that all the members of his former SEAL team have died under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: JAG: Full Engagement
programme.desc: While on their day off, Harm takes Mac for a flight in his vintage airplane, only to be forced to make an emergency landing in a mountain clearing because of mechanical problems.

programme.title: JAG: Cowboys and Cossaks
programme.desc: Harm, Mac, and Bud are assigned sea duty to monitor a joint war games exercise between U.S. and Russian naval forces.

programme.title: JAG: The Guardian
programme.desc: Harm and Mac defend Bauwer, a former Navy Seal, now a homeless man, who's accused of using excessive force when he killed three men who tried to hold up a convenience store.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Couples, The Art Lover, Made For Each Other
programme.desc: Gopher breaks a priceless statue while trying to impress a woman. Judy is blamed for wrecking a marriage, and Ace gets into trouble with two couples.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Second Banana, The Prodigy, What Goes Around Comes Around
programme.desc: Doc falls for a psychologist who has her own share of personal problems and a math genius almost loses a woman due to his gambling habit.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Gothic Romance, Whatever Happened To Crazy Joe Flash, We'll Meet Again
programme.desc: A rock star trying to travel under the radar falls in love and a successful novelist imagines Ace as the hero of her next book.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Will, Deja-Vu, The Prediction
programme.desc: A psychic predicts the world will end during the cruise and a woman discovers that her late husband arranged a romantic cruise for her and her former lover.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Spain Cruise: The Matadors, Mrs. Jameson Comes Out, Love's Labors Found, Marry Me, Marry Me - Part 1
programme.desc: An all-star cast visits beautiful and romantic locales on a cruise to Spain and Portugal. Guest stars include Melissa Sue Anderson, Olivia Brown, Mary Crosby, Lorenzo Lamas, William R. Moses, Cesar Romero, Sada Thompson, and Adrian Zmed.

programme.title: Happy Days: Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Flip Side
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: Happy Days: Goin' to Chicago
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Happy Days: Get A Job
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman."

programme.title: Happy Days: Cruisin'
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Fonzarelli Part I
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Happy Days: Football Frolics
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: MacGyver: Second Chance
programme.desc: MacGyver and bounty hunter Jesse Colton search the streets of Bangkok for Colton's illegitimate son, whom they suspect has information concerning stolen medical supplies.

programme.title: MacGyver: Halloween Knights
programme.desc: MacGyver and Murdoc are forced into an uneasy partnership when they must rely on each other's resources in order to rescue a kidnap victim -- Murdoc's sister.

programme.title: MacGyver: Children Of Light
programme.desc: MacGyver helps a dissident Chinese student who is being pursued by Chinese government agents.

programme.title: MacGyver: Black Rhino
programme.desc: After witnessing the grizzly destruction of a black rhino by poachers in Africa, MacGyver joins the fight to save the endangered species from extinction.

programme.title: MacGyver: Ten Percent Solution
programme.desc: An investigation into art fraud leads MacGyver to expose a neo-Nazi group's plan to infiltrate American politics.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: Matlock: The Genius
programme.desc: Ben Matlock’s nephew, Dr. Irwin Bruckner, is accused of murdering his boss, the director of a top-security think tank, and Matlock’s defense seems doomed to failure unless a master computer can be outsmarted.

programme.title: Matlock: The Magician
programme.desc: Matlock discovers he has more than one tricky suspect to contend with as he tries to defend magician Daniel Fontaine who’s accused of murdering Sandy Farrell, his ambitious and unfaithful assistant.

programme.title: Matlock: Fisherman
programme.desc: Matlock takes on the defense of Nguyen Tran, a Vietnamese fisherman accused of murdering the town bully, a man who had been terrorizing Tran and his fellow countrymen.

programme.title: Matlock: The Heiress
programme.desc: Matlock’s murder defense of Allison Tate, a young heiress with a history of mental instability, is complicated by Warren Kreitzer, a New York lawyer who is responsible for her trust fund.

programme.title: Matlock: The Lemon
programme.desc: When Matlock’s neighbor, Les Calhoun, returns a malfunctioning used car he just bought, he becomes the prime suspect in the saleman's murder. Although circumstantial evidence points to a conviction, Matlock sets out to prove his new neighbor was framed.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While Amanda Bentley visits Martin, a good friend, and benefactor of a visiting Communist Chinese dance troupe, Tako, the star dancer drops dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: High-power and high-profile defense attorney, Roger Calendar, is brought into the emergency room with a near-fatal stabbing wound.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As Lt. Steve Sloan and his partner, Cheryl, pick up their favorite strawberry milkshakes, Steve is distracted by a beautiful woman.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Calvin Laird, Mark and Steve's neighbor, threatens his girlfriend violently when she challenges his mean behavior. His repeated playing of loud music bothers the Sloans to no end.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A film school buddy of Alex's is at Community General Hospital making a documentary about the legend of a ghost in the basement.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run patient mysteriously dies in the hospital, Dr. Sloan and his interns, Jack and Amanda, put their amateur crime solving abilities to the test.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Future Mrs. Situation?
programme.desc: Ronnie setter spørsmålstegn ved alt, mens Mike forbereder seg på å fri til Lauren.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Final Supper
programme.desc: Utblåsninger serveres med knyttnever under den siste familiemiddagen når det koker over for Ronnie og The Situation.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Snookiest Moments
programme.desc: Jenni, Ronnie, Snooki, Deena og Pauly teller ned Snookis 15 morsomste, mest opprørende og uforglemmelige duste-øyeblikk.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Hottest Hookups
programme.desc: Vinny, Mike, Deena og Pauly teller ned de 15 heiteste Jersey Shore-dates fra Seaside til Miami til Italy og tilbake igjen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Biggest Blow-ups
programme.desc: Jenni, Ronnie, Vinny, Pauly og Mike teller ned de 14 største kranglene som har skjedd i Jersey Shore-serien, og ser tilbake på de beste fornærmelsene, slagene og slåsskampene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Most Jersiest Moments
programme.desc: Mike, Pauly, Ronnie og Vinny treffes og ser tilbake på de 'Jersieste' øyeblikkene fra deres familieferie i Miami. Vi ser de beste spiralene, de aller morsomste pussene, de verste toalettene og fem scener som vi aldri har fått se før.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The long-awaited challenger Katsuaki Mori has been awarded the prestigious 'Chevalier du Taste-Fromage,' France's highest honor for cheese.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: It's only rookie Iron Chef Nakamura's third battle. Will he be able to withstand Challenger Toyoaki Suganuma's egg challenge?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Gyobun Hou is ready to chop the lettuce with confidence against Iron Chef Chen. Who will reign supreme when we witness this legendary leafy battle?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chefs always have trouble with female challengers. How will Iron Chef Nakamura fight back against Katsuko Nanao's affectionate home-cooked dishes?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen is ready to display his skills in spicy Szechuan cooking against Kitchen Stadium's first challenger specializing in Thai cuisine, Shunji Morikawa. Be ready for a very 'hot' battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Kitchen Stadium fills with the scent of the sea when Challenger Tamotsu Takao, a French restaurant specialist, takes on Iron Chef Sakai.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og gjest Carly Aquilino trappene med barn som gjør noen 'Mini-feilsteg', tester senger med 'Madrassprøving' og lokaliserer alle de løse skruene i 'Oppussingsanger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XL
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' avdekker Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood farene med døråpninger i 'Dørdengt' før de drar til havs på 'Kræsjcruise' og avslutter med noen mestere i forkledning i 'Bykamuflasje'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slåss Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino mot vinden i 'Aggressiv luft', sliter med spisepinnene i 'Fomlepinner' og viser fram rare evner i 'Ferdigheter er ferdigheter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino nærmere på utsatte besteforeldre i 'Barnebarnskader', får ødelagt humøret av 'Stemningssenkere' og har det gøy med litt 'Landsens avslapping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran sjansen på å ta seg en lur i 'Blottlagte blunder', finner nye bruksområder i tillegg til hockey i 'Nyttekøller' og får seg en trøkk fra oven med 'Takattakk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg en kakk i hodet når de er 'Uten høydebevissthet', får multitaskingeksamen ved 'Simultankapasitets-universitetet og betrakter barn som dras i 'Hunder med barneslep'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino litt konkurransesugne i 'Utilsiktede hjulskader', opplever T-banekaos på 'Ville tog' og morer seg stort med 'Skjelettkompiser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' forårsaker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran alvorlige skader når de spiller 'Hjemmegolf', møter bygningsarbeidere som morer seg med 'Jobbskøyere' og blir vitner til vindens kraft i 'Tatt av vinden'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' deltar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran i timen med 'Forelesningssabotører', stopper hjorter som foretar 'Bukkattakk' og flipper helt når de får seg en 'Turntrøkk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' sklir Rob, Steelo og gjest Karrueche Tran rundt i gatene fordi de er 'Dårlig til å drifte', tar seg litt snacks med folk som liker å 'Småspise i alle situasjoner' og holder festen i gang med 'Bursdagsbomber'.

programme.title: Andromeda: I himmelen er nå tre
programme.desc: Motoren til skapelsen er i stand til å omskrive universet i henhold til eierens ønsker. Dylan, Beka og Trance må skaffe det før noen med mørke planer får det.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ting vi ikke kan endre
programme.desc: Et svart hull slår Dylan ut og sender ham inn i en alternativ virkelighet med kone og barn.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Fair Unknown
programme.desc: Mannskapet redder en av de tapt grunnleggerne av Commonwealth, men oppdager at hun kan være mer trøbbel enn hun er verdt.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dyrets mage
programme.desc: Et mytologisk rommonster prøver å spise Andromeda.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ridderen, døden og djevelen
programme.desc: Dylan prøver å frigjøre en flåte med fangede skip, men flåten er ikke sikker på at den vil bli frigjort. AI-ene deres frykter at nye kapteiner vil slavebinde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Immaculate Perception
programme.desc: Genitter angriper Tyrs kone og koloni.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss, Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 14
programme.desc: This episode includes: Huey Long Pts. 1 & 2, Not Home for the Holidays, Broken Hearts, Update: Thanks Lieutenant Stevens and Best Friend's Sister.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: Folsom Escape, Georgetown Arson, Amnesia, State Department Murder, Update: Glendeen's Goal and Mona Lisa.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 16
programme.desc: This episode includes: Death by Drowning, Thanks Captain Sharp, Pigtail Fugitive, Two Strikes, Direct Contact and Update: Badlands.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 17
programme.desc: This episode includes: Gangbusters Pts. 1 & 2, St. James' Ghost, Crystal and Cop Killer Escape.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 18
programme.desc: This episode includes: Suicide Homicide, Ogo Pogo, Dr. Craig, Forensic Woman, Lifeguard Missing, Update: Alamo Treasure and I-70 Killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dishonored
programme.desc: Shirley Russell was determined enough to reach the rank of Captain in the United States Marine Corps. When this officer turned up missing, her colleagues refused to believe she had gone AWOL. It was unclear whether Captain Shirley Russell was alive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Stranger in Town
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Grave Discoveries
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives: A Federal Offense
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack  whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons  the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Living In Terror
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Women Who Kill
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Soldier Stories
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In a church reborn as a gym, something old still lingers in the shadows. Sean and Bex investigate Dream Body Gym inside the former Manor Church — where whispers echo through stairwells, music box melodies drift through empty rooms.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Deep in the woods on the outskirts of Liverpool lie the crumbling remains of a forgotten gatehouse — and the land surrounding it is said to be cursed. As Sean and Bex begin their nighttime investigation, unsettling activity begins to unfold.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Sean and Bex head to one of Leeds’ oldest public libraries, where the silence hides more than just books. Reports of shadow figures, unexplained voices, and a terrifying presence in the basement have kept rumours alive for decades.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In the first of a five-part investigation inside the historic Greenfield Valley Heritage Park, the team explores the eerie ruins of the old mills. Known for reports of ghostly children, unexplained footsteps, and phantom knocks on stone walls.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: As the team delves deeper into the Valley Mills, subtle sounds begin to stir the silence—unheard by the cameras, but felt by those present. A chilling metallic swing echoes through the empty building with no visible source.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Wait! Don't Read The Results Yet Steve...
programme.desc: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he’s always out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn’t want Earnie’s ex Tenyia to live with them just because she’s the mother of his child.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Is My Husband the Abuser?
programme.desc: Joyia is desperate to keep her friend Stephanie from going back to her problematic ex Scott. But she still loves him! Will she have the strength to leave him?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Jack is worried about his grandchildren because his daughter-in-law Carol has been negligent and hot-tempered. Then, Kendra explains why she suddenly put Corey’s baby up for adoption.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Teenager Megan lives with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. Megan cannot attend school, find a job, or even eat without his OK! Can her aunt and Steve get through to her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Fake Your Pregnancies?
programme.desc: Dennis claims his ex-girlfriend Kendal keeps tied down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve’s DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Results Revealed: Did She Cheat?
programme.desc: Justin is convinced that girlfriend Lainie has been cheating on him, and more importantly that he’s not the father of their child. But his own insecurities have led him to turn violent. Also, Steven doubts whether Ashley’s child is his.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Officer Down
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda is faced with his worst nightmare when he learns a friend and fellow officer, Mark Dabling, has been killed in the line of duty.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: The night before Halloween, a real-life nightmare unfolds when a young man is found clinging to life. The case takes a dark turn when Lt. Joe Kenda learns there is a second victim somewhere in the woods.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Standoff
programme.desc: A disabled man is killed on the job, but Kenda’s case hits a roadblock when forensic evidence is scrubbed from the scene.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Point of No Return
programme.desc: When a mysterious explosion rocks a sleepy suburb, it’s up to Kenda to ID a pile of charred remains and find the killer who triggered the blast.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Wrongly Released
programme.desc: This special episode shines a light on criminals who have been brought to justice for one crime only to be released to commit further terrible acts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rochdale Groomers
programme.desc: Rochdale Groomers: Documentary examining the sex abuse scandal which occurred in the North of England and appeared to go undetected for quite some time.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: The Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker is a former government-owned nuclear bunker located at Hack Green, Cheshire, England. It Started as a decoy site for enemy bombers but later developed into a legitimate base. Now it is ripe with hauntings.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Drakelow Tunnels
programme.desc: The Drakelow Tunnels are a former underground military complexused mainly for storage. However, during the construction and running of this facility, 6 people are thought to have died.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Vow of Silence and Cryptic
programme.desc: A single mother's new home was once a convent that kept a horrifying secret. A couple is tormented by the meaning of a date that keeps appearing in their new home.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Family Grave and Deception
programme.desc: A man's childhood fears come to life when he returns to his family's farm after his mother's death. A woman begins to suspect that her withdrawn husband may be causing the unexplainable occurrences in their new home.

programme.title: My Haunted House: The Attic and 'Til Death
programme.desc: A college student is tormented by her little sister's imaginary friend. A newly engaged woman sees visions of her fiance's widow.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Boy in the Closet
programme.desc: A couple is haunted by the spirit of a little boy who lives in their young son's bedroom closet. A gas station owner's life is abruptly changed by the appearance of a mysterious paranormal mist with a demonic presence.

programme.title: Mutant X: Presumed Guilty
programme.desc: Adam er innrammet for drap av en ny mutant med evnen til å stjele folks minner.

programme.title: Mutant X: Nothing to Fear
programme.desc: En mutant med telepatiske evner som kan få folk til å oppleve, mentalt, alt han vil, klarer å komme inn i hodet på Mutant X. Nå får han dem til å oppleve sin verste frykt.

programme.title: Mutant X: Dancing on the Razor
programme.desc: Når Mutant X og Genomex blir fanget på film ved hjelp av kreftene sine, må de begge forholde seg til reporteren som planlegger å bli offentlig med informasjonen.

programme.title: Mutant X: Ex Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Shalimars tidligere kjæreste dukker opp og prøver å gjenopprette et Fabergé-egg som har en mikrochip med ekstraordinær kraft.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Love Letter
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Frankrike for å lete etter de tapte bryllupsløftene til Josephine Pontoise og Guy de Bourdin, noe som skulle bevise at arvingen er den rettmessige eieren av St. Agnes Sur-Loire.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Good Year
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel reiser til Frankrike for å finne de tapte steinene fra Marie Antoinettes krone.

programme.title: CBS Morning News
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings is a live daily morning news show that is anchored by Anne-Marie Green. Get ahead on the latest news by streaming the most important national and global stories first thing in the morning.

programme.title: CBS Mornings
programme.desc: Reporting on international news stories, interviews, and in-depth pieces, covering topics from news, sports, climate and technology to race, health, parenting and personal finance.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7 Mornings
programme.desc: Få med deg de seneste nyhetene fra CBS direkte her med omfattende nyhetsreportasjer døgnet rundt fra hele verden.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: On the Case: Justice Never Quits
programme.desc: Mary-Jane Marquardt, mother and wife from Chippewa, Wisconsin, was found stabbed to death in her own home. With Mary-Jane's son also missing, the detectives couldn't help but wonder if his disappearance was connected to the murder.

programme.title: On the Case: The Doorbell Rang
programme.desc: The ring of a doorbell overheard during a teenager's final telephone call may be the key to solving her murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Last Call
programme.desc: When bartender Anita Andrews is stabbed to death inside her family's bar, police conclude her killer was the last patron she served that night.

programme.title: On the Case: Deep Wounds
programme.desc: After Navy electrician Michael Jacobs comes home to find his wife, Suzanne, and his three-year-old son, Colin, murdered, San Diego police race to catch a serial killer who leaves behind an unimaginable calling card.

programme.title: On the Case: Lost In The Fire
programme.desc: When a pregnant mother of two is found shot to death in her fire-ravaged home, police find there are more suspects than clues.

programme.title: On the Case: Predator on the Loose
programme.desc: A deadly predator haunts the city of Stockton, California and becomes more and more violent.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Breakdown
programme.desc: Co-pilot Graeme's fumbles his Electra training landings. Chris stresses over his C-46 check ride. Adam rescues a stranded C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Target Practice
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head to England to bring home a new plane. Devan does target-practice in the DC-4.James builds a Buffalo-style soapbox racer.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Air Show
programme.desc: Joe flies with the Snowbirds during the Hamilton air show and later teaches Mikey to fly. A surprise departure shakes up Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Five Seasons
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWT celebrates a milestone with a look back at the last five years, a peek behind the camera and reflections from the Buffalo crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Ball O'Snags
programme.desc: An engine fire and series of mechanical gremlins has Buffalo scrambling to make its Christmas deliveries. Newest rampie Prefkar Mony struggles with life in the North.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Storm
programme.desc: Buffalo's Electra aircraft is hammered by rough winds up the Mackenzie Valley. In Hay River, a rookie crew faces the worst ice storm in years and one rampie has a tough go trying to fit in at Buffalo.

programme.desc: "Your Place or Mine" star Tig Notaro is telling Drew about working with Reese Witherspoon on their new film and the latest season of "The Morning Show."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's Birthday Surprise Show with Penn Badgley& John Oliver

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Pilar Valdes, Danny Seo, Mikel Welch, Drew's News with Rachel Dratch

programme.title: Cops: Thick as Thieves
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: Cops: Pinky Promise

programme.title: Cops: Dead End Dash
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: Cops: Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.title: Cops: Pants Party
programme.desc: A car eludes a DUI checkpoint only to crash, one woman takes the fall for everyone in her group, and a man hides his stash in the one place he thinks police will never look.

programme.title: Cops: Smooth Move
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: Cops: Highway to Jail
programme.desc: Reckless ATV drivers lead police on a dangerous chase through the streets of Atlanta, and a man worried about warrants lies about his identity to police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops: Dishonest Dudes
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: Cops: Fighting to Lose
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: Cops: Mom Still Loves You
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: Cops: The Young and the Reckless
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Laurence Dromard Case
programme.desc: Sylvain Dromard finds the body of his wife Laurence lying in a pool of blood in the kitchen. The crime was particularly violent and the theory of a burglary that went wrong is soon excluded. But investigators don't understand who could want her dead.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Young Women Massacred: The Leconte Affair
programme.desc: On July 8, 2002, near Amiens, a farmer discovers the lifeless body of a young woman, Patricia Leclercq, on his field.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot In the While Sleeping (Richard Alessandri Case)
programme.desc: On the night of July 16, 2000, the life of Edwige Alessandri changed forever. She made a frantic emergency call in the town of Carpentras. She recounted that some men burst into her room and shot her husband while he slept.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Josiane Bézard Case
programme.desc: On the morning of January 9th 2014, Josiane Bézard, 53 years old, drives her son to the Manosque's train station, and then vanishes.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Julein Thevenet Case
programme.desc: On January 27th 2014, in Somme-Suippe in the Marne, Sophie Thevenet discovers her dead husband's body in the garage.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 403
programme.desc: Marit Ødegaard jobber på en veikro ikke langt fra svenskegrensen. En oktoberdag i 2000 dukker hun ikke opp på jobb. Kort tid etter blir Marit funnet drept i hjemmet sitt

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 604
programme.desc: En 33 år gammel mann blir funnet skutt og drept nær Sundsvall. Det viser seg å være en mann med mange fiender, og politiets liste består i begynnelsen av over femti personer med mulige motiver.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En ung mann blir funnet død på et jorde utenfor Enköping. Ved første øyekast ser det ut som om han har lagt seg ned for å hvile - men når politiet undersøker liket, oppdager de noe som antas å være et skuddsår.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 506
programme.desc: 26. januar 2001 ble Benjamin Hermansen knivstukket til døde som følge av sin hudfarge. Drapet fikk hele landet til å delta i antirasistiske markeringer og protester.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En familie som rammes av en husbrann klarer å unnslippe flammene, men alt de eier har blitt til aske. Det som først ser ut til å være en ulykke, viser seg å være mye mer komplisert.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 105
programme.desc: Tina Jørgensen forsvant etter en kveld på byen i Stavanger. En måned senere finner politiet liket av en 20 år gammel kvinne. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av Tina og deretter dumpet henne langs en øde veistrekning?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Two

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Arrival

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Shelter
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Call

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trance
programme.desc: A scam artist purports to channel the spirit of Delos, a former inhabitant of Atlantis. Together with a partner, he makes a living off of it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Acts of Terror
programme.desc: A woman terrorized by her abusive husband finds some small consolation in a statue of a dog given to her by her sympathetic sister

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Twenty-Twenty Vision

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Passersby

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Game of Pool

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Mirror

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.desc: Chrome hot rod; the Chrome Shop Mafia adds bling to truckers' big rigs in Missouri; Illinois' Arlington Plating Co. adds luster to auto parts; how Harley-Davidson puts chrome to work as both a decorative and protective feature of motorcycles.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Hitler's Biggest Blunder
programme.desc: Hitler rules Europe triumphantly, hailed as a hero in Germany. Hitler invades the Soviet Union, promising swift victory over communism, but progress stalls. As Germany faces setbacks, Hitler retreats to his bunker in Poland, increasingly reliant on drugs.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Lightning War
programme.desc: Country after European country falls before the unstoppable German blitzkrieg.

programme.title: Secret War: The Spymistress and the French Fiasco
programme.desc: After WWII, SOE disbanded, leaving Vera Atkins to uncover fates of 118 agents, including 13 women. Many were betrayed and sent to camps; some were executed. Atkins' quest continued, marked by personal impact and delayed recognition.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: Their attack on the Soviet Union having failed, the German Army suffers a series of counter-offensives on the Eastern Front. Wehrmacht's losses are huge as the Soviets advance West.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The Colt M1911, designed by John Moses Browning, is the 20th century's most influential pistol. Its .45 ACP cartridge made it the U.S. military's standard for 75 years. Wil Willis tests it to explore its stopping power.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Lewberts tapte kjærlighet
programme.desc: Når gjengen oppdager at Lewbert engang var en lykkelig ung mann som var forlovet med en vakker kvinne, setter de seg fore å gjenforene det adskilte paret.

programme.title: iCarly: Missekonkurransen
programme.desc: Sam avslører overfor Carly og Freddie at hun deltok i skjønnhetskonkurranser som liten. Da hun finner ut at hennes rival skal konkurrere i Seattle, overbeviser hun Carly om å stille opp mot henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: Etter at Sam plutselig må i fengsel, lover Carly og Freddie dyrt og hellig å ikke avlyse nettshowet ettersom faren hennes skal se det. Carly ber Spencer om hjelp, men det blir vanskelig, for han skal på date.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: En eksentrisk millionær ber Carly og vennene hennes om å sende det første nettshowet fra det ytre rom, så de må prøves ut for en romreise. Imens besøker en merkelig liten pike Spencer hjemme i leiligheten.

programme.title: iCarly: Freddie flytter ut
programme.desc: Freddie bestemmer seg for å flytte ut av leiligheten sin etter at moren hans har gjort ham flau. Carly, Sam og Freddie starter et firma og spesialiserer seg på bilder av kjæledyr.

programme.title: iCarly: iBeat the Heat
programme.desc: Når en hetebølge rammer Seattle og strømmen går, kommer Spencer til unnsetning med et norsk klimaanlegg.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: De medvirkende introduserer bloopers og bortklipte scener fra serien.

programme.title: iCarly: Rommet brenner
programme.desc: Spencer prøver å overraske Carly på bursdagen hennes, men ender opp med å brenne ned rommet hennes. Men når forsikringsselskapet gir ham en stor sjekk, har han sjansen til å gjøre det godt igjen.

programme.title: iCarly: Ja
programme.desc: Etter at en iCarly fan frir til kjæresten på nettshowet, blir gjengen nesten tvunget til å gå i bryllupet. Men når bruden får kalde føtter, må Carly komme til unnsetning.

programme.title: iCarly: T-skjortesalg
programme.desc: Gjengen begynner å selge Penny-skjorter, og når salget går susende, rekrutterer Sam barn fra 4. klasse for å bidra til å lage t-skjorter. Men Carly, Sam og Freddie er uenige om hvordan de skal behandles.

programme.title: iCarly: Rampestreker
programme.desc: Når hun blir ertet for aldri å ha funnet på en morsom spøk, rekrutterer Carly Spencer for å spøke med Sam og Freddie. Men etter at Spencer har fått sansen for det, kan han ikke slutte. Mob må finne en måte å stoppe ham på.

programme.desc: Jennifer dates Mallory's ex-boyfriend's brother.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Get Me to the Living Room on Time

programme.title: Key & Peele: Soul Food
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan diskuterer hvem som er mest svart, og å være den eneste svarte på en fest. Sketsjer inkluderer Tea Party som oppdager et nytt håp, hærens ververe som tenker annerledes, og Bobby McFerrin som duellerer mot Michael Winslow.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The 420 Special
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson slapper av hjemme, Keegan må bevare fatningen under et jobbintervju, en skredder får en klient med luft i magen, parkeringsvaktene diskuterer 'Game of Thrones' og en telefonselger prøver en ny strategi.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Terrorist Meeting
programme.desc: En gangster prøver desperat å bevise at han er gal, terrorister møtes for å planlegge sitt neste trekk og en sjalu storebror gjør familiemiddagen pinlig.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Bone Thugs And Homeless
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en hund som plager en nyhetsreporter og Harriet Tubman som løper fritt omkring.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Landlord
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen vil president Obama behandles som alle andre, Jordan ser på en leilighet som er eid av en mistenksom utleier, og et par festfiksere som vil få gang i festen på en bar mitzvah.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Hollywood Sequel Doctor
programme.desc: Kileleking mellem to venner blir plutselig merkelig, forfattere brainstormer til 'Gremlins 2', to bøller mistenker vennen sin for å stjele og Keegan og Jordan diskuterer Afrika på en fest.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Biological Dad
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer et romvesen som lærer om kvinnelig anatomi, karer som prøver å overgå hverandre og møtet mellom de to siste mennesker på Jorden.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Y'all Ready For This?
programme.desc: Et fotballag girer seg opp før en kamp, president Obama og Luther møter Hillary Clinton, to karer forbereder seg på potensielle trusler på et fly, pirater synger en sang og en betjent er litt for skyteglad.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Manly Tears
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en narkohandel som går på trynet, en mafiafyr som er en stor grinasabb, og Darius Rucker som prøver å takle sin Hootie-fortid.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Michael Jackson Halloween
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan feirer Halloween med å flykte fra rasistiske zombier, skuespillerne i 'Human Centipede' har en skremmende gjenforening, og vi besøker en folkeskole for trollmenn med problemer.

programme.title: Broad City: In Heat
programme.desc: Ilana leter febrilsk etter en gave i siste øyeblikk til Lincoln, mens Abbi prøver å finne et klimaanlegg for å få det kjølig på soveværelset.

programme.title: Broad City: Mochalatta Chills
programme.desc: Der dukker opp nye muligheter når Abbi endelig kan trene noen på Soulstice og Ilana gjør suksess som firmasjef.

programme.title: Broad City: Wisdom Teeth
programme.desc: Abbi skal trekke visdomstennene og Ilana ser det som sin plikt å passe henne til hun får det bedre - noe som selvfølgelig innebærer en masse 'medikamenter' og en total mangel på tilsyn.

programme.title: Broad City: Knockoffs
programme.desc: Abbi og Jeremy går på en date som ender med en overraskelse. Ilana og hennes mor leter etter den perfekte håndvesken.

programme.title: Broad City: Hashtag FOMO
programme.desc: Jentene leter etter den perfekte fest, noe som avslører en underlig og surrealistisk side av Abbi, som igjen bekrefter Ilanas verste anelser.

programme.title: Broad City: Citizen Ship
programme.desc: Gjengen skal feire at Jaime har blitt amerikansk statsborger, men Bevers fører Abbi og Ilana på avveier med å love dem gratis sprit. Imens må Lincoln og Jaime klare seg selv blandt alle advokatene.

programme.title: Broad City: Coat Check
programme.desc: Abbi prøver å finne en forsvunnet frakk, mens Ilana utforsker en ny romanse - som føles merkelig kjent.

programme.title: Broad City: St. Mark's
programme.desc: Når jentene feirer Ilanas 23. fødselsdag, blir de avbrudt av en rømt tenåring som fører dem ut på en vill jakt rundt i St. Mark's Place.

programme.title: Broad City: Two Chainz
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana opplever store klesuhell på vei til en venns utstilling og legger ut på en desperat jakt etter et offentlig toalett.

programme.title: Broad City: Co-Op
programme.desc: Abbi må late som om hun er Ilana for å ta hennes skift på jobben, mens Ilana drar til Long Island pga en svært viktig legetime.

programme.title: Broad City: Game Over
programme.desc: Ilana får en ny mulighet på Deals, Deals, Deals, og Abbi prøver å holde konkurranseinstinktet i sjakk på Soulstice Games Day.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Help From the FBI
programme.desc: While the FBI investigates a Reno homicide, members of the Sheriff's Department put their best feet forward.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel Suicide Watch
programme.desc: The Reno Sheriff's Department lavishes attention on Wiegel after her failed suicide attempt, and Williams and Garcia hook up.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Clementine Gets Married
programme.desc: Clemmy's degenerate boyfriend Steed surprises everyone when he asks her to marry him.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Garcia's Anniversary
programme.desc: The guys hit a strip club to celebrate Garcia's 15-year anniversary on the force.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Burning Man Festival
programme.desc: When the Sheriff's Department receives $1200 to get people off the streets, Garcia helps a hooker, and Dangle heads to Burning Man.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Moving Day
programme.desc: Dangle needs help moving out of his house, and Junior teaches Reno's youth about prison life.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Terrorist Training Pt. 1
programme.desc: The Office of Homeland Security teaches the Reno Sheriff's Department terrorist attack protocol, and Clemmy's mom gets into trouble.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Terrorist Training Pt. 2
programme.desc: The Reno Sherriff's Department passes their Homeland Security exam with flying colors, and Clemmy and a drunk driver discover some new moves.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Halloween
programme.desc: On Halloween, the deputies prepare for a night of mayhem, and Wiegel sets a sting operation to catch mischievous teens.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Promotion
programme.desc: Dangle gets a new job in Carson City, but the deputies are too wrapped up in women's basketball to give him a proper send-off.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: World Series of Dice & Mooney on Movies
programme.desc: The Marcy Projects hosts a champion shooter contest, and Paul Mooney talks "Gone with the Wind."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: I Know Black People & Keeping It Real Goes Wrong
programme.desc: Dave asks contestants how much they know about black American culture.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Oprah's Baby Daddy & Jury Duty
programme.desc: Dave gets Oprah pregnant and recalls being a member of the O.J. Simpson trial jury.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Kneehigh Park & Making da Band
programme.desc: P. Diddy gives unusual requests, and Snoop Dogg visits Kneehigh Park; appearances by Q-Tip and Wyclef Jean.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mandela Boot Camp & The Time Haters
programme.desc: Dave reveals sketches that are too hot for television.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Wayne Brady & Tyrone Biggums's Fear Factor
programme.desc: Dave gives up his show to Wayne Brady, and Tyrone Biggums returns as a guest on "Fear Factor."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Lil Jon on Lil Jon & Black Bush
programme.desc: Dave considers how recent events would have played out if President Bush were black; special guests Jamie Foxx, Lil John, and music from Outkast's Big Boi.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: PopCopy & Clayton Bigsby
programme.desc: A blind white supremacist unleashes hate, and Dave unveils Nat King Cole's booty videos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums at School & Wrap It Up Box
programme.desc: Crack addict Tyrone Biggums visits an elementary school.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Zapped & It's a Wonderful Chest
programme.desc: Dave screens his failed reality TV show and shares outtakes from "Roots."

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tron Guy
programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby. I kveld byr han på et intervju med YouTube-sensasjonen Fred og 'Tron'-fyrens nettoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Backyard Wrestler
programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby. I kveld byr han på en ny fetisj fra Adultcon, Old Lee skal lese opp Miley Cyrus-tweeter, og hagebryteren får sin nettoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Crying Giants Fan
programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby. I kveld får den gråtende Giants-fansen sin nettoppreisning, strippere tar til stangen og havner på gulvet, og David Letterman er inspirasjonen bak en flash mob.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Nintendo 64 Kid
programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby. I kveld byr han på Nintendo 64-guttens nettoppreisning, rollerblade-tabber og det ekleste du noensinne har sett på tv.

programme.title: Tosh.0: November 5, 2009 - Trampled Cheerleader
programme.desc: Nazis play frisbee, Daniel answers Twitter questions about celebrities, and the Trampled Cheerleader gets a Web Redemption.

programme.title: Tosh.0: November 12, 2009 - Ladder Fail Guy
programme.desc: The Accordion Kid masters a discipline that no one wants to listen to, Daniel prevails in arm wrestling, and Todd Glass suffers through lemonade-boarding.

programme.title: Tosh.0: How To Get European Men
programme.desc: I premieren på sesong 4 prater Daniel om det som har skjedd i pausen og lærer om hvordan man møter europeiske menn - og programmet får en ny programleder.

programme.title: Tosh.0: How to Draw Guy
programme.desc: En elendig kunstner får oppreisning, Daniel leger en video 'Til abortens ende' og tar avskjed med fotballsesongen.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Haboob Wedding
programme.desc: Daniel hjelper et par med å få bryllupsoppreisning, trener og får hjelp til å skrive sitt testamente.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Mustang Kid
programme.desc: Daniel hjelper Mustang-fyren med å få opreisning, teller opp hvilke kvinner over 40 han ville ligge med og spiller en ny versjon av stein, saks og papir.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: In the ongoing charade of Caroline pretending that she and Richard are married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: A remorseful Caroline panics when she realizes that several hours have passed since she poured her heart out to Richard on his answering machine -- and she hasn't heard a response from him.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline realizes that the constant aching in her neck could be related to the stress she feels over her unresolved feelings toward Richard, but she doesn't let it get in the way of helping Richard navigate through troubled waters with Julia.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feigns having read a writer’s novel to impress him, but their first date is a disaster as Caroline’s charade crumbles. Meanwhile, Richard jumps to Julia’s rescue when her waitress job at Remo’s leaves her customers hungry for attention.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that she’s been receiving free cable, her honesty with the cable company gets her into deep trouble with her not-so-truthful neighbors.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie is visited by her old singing teacher, Miss McGowan, Caroline helps Annie pretend to still have her “Cats” role, an act that may have a surprise ending.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: It’s a game of messy politics when Caroline will not endorse a local councilman, who is inspired by her comic strip, while Del conjures up a promotional campaign.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Discreetly planning to ease Caroline’s homesick holiday blues, Richard (Malcolm Gets) goes to great lengths to get a gift for Caroline that inspires suspicion in Julia (Sofia Milos) and sleuthing from Caroline and Annie.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Informed by Annie (Amy Pietz) of Caroline’s (LeaThompson) unspoken love for him, Richard (Malcolm Gets) confronts Caroline, who tells him that it’s a thing of the past.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) is tapped as a celebrity guest star for a quiz show, her jitters prompt Richard (Malcolm Gets) to help her study, much to Julia’s (Sofia Milos) chagrin.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine blows a bundle on the Big Apple's hottest hair stylist for the social bash of the year.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Tony begins working with a new cabbie, Lucius, a former football player. Lucius inspires Tony to try to get his boxing license reinstated.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Ring the bells! Spread the word! Latka Gravas and Simka Dahblitz are getting married, and the dingy Sunshine Cab Co. garage is transformed into a chapel of beauty for the social event of the cabbies' season.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and the crew decide to barter services office visits for food and services.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets in hot water with parents when his nutrition lecture at an elementary school turns into a sex talk.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Bob uses a questionable friend to get Reggie a great deal on a new freezer. John acts as a sex therapist for the Bennetts, an 80-year-old couple having difficulties because of Mr. Bennett's newly revived libido.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: An unflattering picture of someone other than John is placed in an article about him, causing him distress.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: When John receives some expensive steaks from a patient, his new neighbor Chris cajoles him into throwing a party.
