programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 502
programme.desc: Pappa Roine og Mattias laster høyballer – men plutselig stopper hjullasteren. Linda leverer drinker rundt i Stockholm – og benytter anledningen til å besøke forloveden Magnus. Piraten legger asfalt.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 503
programme.desc: Biltransportøren Robin må være ekstra forsiktig når han skal frakte en dyr Lincoln på lasteplanet! Det samme gjelder Micke som skal kjøre et dyrt spabad til Uddevalla.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 504
programme.desc: Tove kjører tømmer i Småland – og møter fans midt i skogen. Slamsugeren Magnus skal tømme et basseng på et renseanlegg. Kranfører Amanda er på et vindkraftverk på Gotland – men risikerer å miste båten.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 505
programme.desc: Elin sparker dagen i gang i Stockholm med komplisert lossing og tidspress. Tim kjører etsende last – og han må derfor være ekstra forsiktig på veiene. Peo sliter med containerne sine i Åre.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 506
programme.desc: Vi følger yrkessjåførene som jobber døgnet rundt for å levere forskjellige typer av varer over hele landet - og for å utføre viktige samfunnstiltak som holder Sverige i gang, fra nord til sør.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 507
programme.desc: Vi følger yrkessjåførene som jobber døgnet rundt for å levere forskjellige typer av varer over hele landet - og for å utføre viktige samfunnstiltak som holder Sverige i gang, fra nord til sør.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Cheated
programme.desc: (S02E210) - A night of passion in the romantic city of Milan leads to consequences.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Is America’s Next Top Model
programme.desc: (S02E211) - As the competition comes to a close, the three finalists try to remain composed as they face increased pressure and only one will triumph.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Fierce rivalries form as the finalists head into the competition full force.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The new model wannabes are whisked away to Jamaica for a sexy swimsuit shoot.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: One of the models confides to another about her eating disorder only to have that trust broken and her secret shared.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Feltøvelse
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders er to uker unna første omgang, og DCC-sjefen Kelli McGonagill Finglass og koreografen Judy Trammel er presset for at de skal klare utvelgingen og offentliggjøre laget.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Finale
programme.desc: Alt fører frem til treningsleirens avsluttende finalekveld. I kveld fødes og knuses drømmer. Kelli overrasker jentene ved å ta dem til Cowboys' øvingsfelt for å se dem opptre.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Innledende prøvedansing
programme.desc: Under to timer vises sesongpremieren av Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: 600 håpefulle kandidater vil være med på laget, og ankommer Cowboys' stadion for Dallas Cowboys' heiagjengs innledende prøvedansing.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Treningsleir
programme.desc: Treningsleiren starter og mange nye kandidater må bli rotløse og flytte til Dallas. Imidlertid er det ingen garanti for å klare treningsleiren og bli med i Dallas Cowboys' heiagjeng.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Splitthopp
programme.desc: Det er bare andre uke med øvelser, og Kelli og Judy kjører raskt kandidatene gjennom signaturbevegelsene. Mange nye kandidater har aldri foretatt et splitthopp, og uerfarenheten gjør at visse blir skadet.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: In tonight’s episode, staffing problems hit the department as several nurses call in sick. The team clocking on is forced to juggle extra patients to make sure every emergency is seen.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 3
programme.desc: In tonight’s episode, patient numbers are through the roof and the team are facing the busiest day in Barnsley Casualty’s history. Lead Nurse Zoe Pearce is tasked with managing the beds to make them available for Barnsley’s most poorly people.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 4
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, the team of Barnsley Casualty pull together to treat a new raft of emergency patients. They work like a family to face the best and worst of life together.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 1
programme.desc: It’s Monday at Barnsley Casualty, traditionally the busiest day of the week and they’re expecting to treat 277 patients. But it soon becomes clear that this shift could break the hospital record of 349 patients, a number that no-one wants to beat.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: Freezing fog has descended across the whole of South Yorkshire so Barnsley Casualty is inundated with weather-related accidents and emergencies.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 3
programme.desc: After eight weeks off with a fractured hip, Consultant Dr Julian Humphrey returns to work at Barnsley Casualty. A keen cyclist, he came off his bike in Sheffield and by his own admission is ‘a bit accident prone – I’m the NHS secret shopper.’

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: In Mansfield Sue’s hoard is driving her family and grandchildren away and her husband Neil to distraction. Every room is crammed with clutter including a bedroom that looks more like a dolls graveyard than somewhere to sleep.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: In Liverpool, the Bells are a family at war over hoarding. Mum Betty and son Richard are happy to live in their mess, but son in law Keith is determined that things must change. Can they change the habit of a lifetime and part with their possessions?

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 5
programme.desc: In the London suburb of Enfield, former workaholic Sandra has become a hoard-aholic since retiring. Her compulsion to spend is out of control, and everything is added to the growing mountains of books, clothes and candles…

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 6
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of American born dog loving Dani from Shepton Mallet who moved to the UK with high hopes of living the English Country dream, but bad health got the better of her.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 7
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Eco warrior Karen from Somerset, who after many years of living off grid in a caravan, has struggled to adapt to living in, and looking after, a house.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 8
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Pippa and Matt from Oxford who have 6 kids all living in a 3-bedroom house. With both parents working full time, the house has taken a back seat for many years.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: A 20-tonne digger has been written off after it fell into the Thames, and Jim has to work fast to get a stranded HGV driver to safety.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: A seven-car motorway pile-up leaves a local council's waste truck in trouble. Fluff does his best to shift one of the heaviest loads his vehicle can lift.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: A burnt-out van abandoned on an isolated towpath presents a serious challenge for Steve and Marta, but the solution comes in the form of a bespoke, bright yellow rescue truck.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: A 44 ton Artic straddling the central reservation of the M1 is a rush hour headache for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve and one of the youngest Recovery Ops on the team, Pat.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: An over-turned Gas tanker full of highly flammable propane means trouble for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve. Working with the fire service he must muster all his experience to keep his team out of danger.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery Op Jim and heavy mechanic Jack are faced with a complex recovery challenge. A foreign truck with dodgy suspension airbags and a catalogue of other problems make towing it anywhere a real headache and a potential threat to road users.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Kobe, Banjo, and Kisses
programme.desc: An aggressive one-eyed Australian shepherd needs special treatment. A traumatized black and tan coonhound is terrified of people, a Maltese gets a little too excited when guests drop by.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buster, Holli, and Spike & Belle
programme.desc: Cesar cures Spike's depression with a new friend. An 8 year old blue heeler/Australian shepherd mix, is supposed to play the role of family alarm dog, but he does his job a little too well.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Molly, Jane, and Genoa
programme.desc: Cesar helps Molly, a blue heeler in Nebraska, get over the dangerous behavior of chasing and biting the tires of moving. An American Eskimo/border collie mix in Chicago, just won't go for a walk.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Wilshire and Butch
programme.desc: Wilshire, a hyperactive Dalmatian in Los Angeles, runs amuck in Firehouse 29 and the city attorney threatens to take him away if he doesn't shape up. Cesar tries to clear Wilshire's spotty past.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Maya, Sara, and Lilly
programme.desc: Maya, an adopted Border Collie/Spring Spaniel Mix loves to jump but is hurting her owner’s neck. Next we meet Sara, an overly-aggressive Shepherd mix and Lilly, a pushy Poodle.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 30
programme.desc: Aaron Rodriguez fires his girlfriend for dating another employee. Follow up with Chris Hall.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 31
programme.desc: Melissa Godfrey separates with her husband of ten years. Follow up with Bruce Jones.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 32
programme.desc: Rose Porter decides between her baby and the father. Follow up with Brandon Musick.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 33
programme.desc: Kelli Manning unleashes her anger at her boyfriend. Follow up with LaTasha Johnson.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 34
programme.desc: Tamara Thomas puts her husband out of their house. Follow up with Chantal Womack.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 35
programme.desc: Christine Moss sees her fiance's lies with her own eyes. Follow up with Jonathan Falloon.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 36
programme.desc: Gloria Jones makes husband regret crossing her angry side. Follow up with Mario Carreno.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 37
programme.desc: David Lawrence seeks closure with his wife of twenty years. Follow up with Erich Dalrymple.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 38
programme.desc: Andrea Pleasant burns her cheating boyfriend's things. Follow up with Margo Vargas.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 39
programme.desc: Chris Lewins finds his boyfriend with drugs and another lover. Follow up with Jodi Vincent.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys and their wives coach Martin for an upcoming date; Phil's granddaughters outsmart him when he tries to teach them how to fish.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys try to find a hot tub for Godwin; Phil and Kay pass a recipe on to Sadie and John Luke.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and the children stay with Willie and Korie while their home is being worked on, but issues of personal space create conflict between the brothers; a series of friendly wagers leads to an ultimate challenge.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Si uses his winnings in a company party to purchase a massage chair for the duck call room; Phil, Jase and the boys battle beavers while fishing at a neighbor's pond.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie takes Sadie dress shopping when he doesn't approve of her clothing choice for the homecoming dance; Jep convinces the guys to try a new coffee shop.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Stemingen forverres når mannskapet sliter med å frakte tungt utstyr opp en vanskelig og gjørmete 120 km lang vei for å grave ut en ny jadegruve på et fjell.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Mannskapet prøver å frakte maskinene over stigende elver for å grave ut den nye fjellgruven.

programme.title: Jade Fever

programme.title: Jade Fever

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Flere uhell rammer Jade-mannskapet, og alle kommer opp med sine egne løsninger for å jage vekk demonene.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Alle blir begeistret når de endelig graver opp grønne kampesteiner som kan være verdt millioner.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Spenningsnivået øker da de utenlandske investorene plutselig stikker innom for å sjekke Wolverine-gruven. Alan forsøker å skape fred.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Etter endelig å ha oppdaget flere lovende steiner i Wolverine-gruven, oppdager mannskapet at de kanskje har gått ut forbi sitt erklærte område.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Spenningsnivået stiger når slutten av gruvesesongen nærmer seg, og Jade-mannskapet er redde for å ikke finne den etterlengtede steinen verdt millioner.

programme.title: My Lucky Stars NO
programme.desc: Politimannen Muscle fra Hong Kong drar til Japan på jakt etter en korrupt kollega. Men siden yakuzaen allerede har opplysninger om ham, kan han ikke gjøre jobben på egen hånd. Etter hvert kaller de inn barndomsvennene til Muscle for å hjelpe til.

programme.title: Winners and Sinners NO
programme.desc: Fem gode venner blir løslatt fra fengsel, fast bestemt på å leve lovlydige liv fra nå av. Sammen starter de et rengjøringsfirma, og starten på deres nye liv er et faktum. Men samme dag løslates også en sjette fange som har en motsatt plan.

programme.title: The Canton Godfather NO
programme.desc: Wah vet knapt ordet av det før han har blitt fralurt pengene sine. Han legger de siste slantene på en rose fra en blomsterhandler som mener at blomstene hennes fører med seg lykke og velstand. Og riktig nok ser Wah snart at flaksen har snudd.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 9

programme.title: The Hills: Something Old, Something New
programme.desc: I Laurens siste episode må hun bestemme om hun er villig til å tilgi Spencer for å kunne stille opp for Heidi i hennes "prinsesse"-bryllup. Hele besetningen dukker opp og blir overrasket over en gjest ingen tenkte ville komme.

programme.title: The Hills: It's On Bitch
programme.desc: Kristin starter krig når hun forsøker seg på Justin foran Audrina. Spencer og Heidi leter etter hus, og Spencer kjøper et hus uten Heidis godkjennelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Mess With Me, I Mess With You
programme.desc: Etter at Audrina ikke dukket opp, bestemmer Kristin seg for ikke å kjempe mot sine følelser for Justin. Heidi melder seg som barnevakt for naboen, men Spencer vil ikke ha noe med unger å gjøre.

programme.title: The Hills: Strike One
programme.desc: Kristin får smake på hvordan det er å ha et forhold til Justin når han ikke dukker opp på Brodys overraskelsesfest. Heidi og Spencer er uenige om når de skal starte familie, og Audrina dater Justins bestevenn.

programme.title: The Hills: Old Habits Die Hard
programme.desc: Kristin tror hun har temmet Justin, men kanskje er han fortsatt ikke over Audrina. Når Holly mister kontrollen på en tilstelning, er det Heidis jobb å få søsteren til å innrømme alkoholproblemet sitt.

programme.title: The Hills: Sorry Boo, Strike Two
programme.desc: Justin gjør seg kostbar med Kristin, men biter seg i halen. Hollys drikking fører til at Heidi og Stephanie må gripe inn. Brody og Jayde krangler slik at de må revurdere forholdet sitt.

programme.title: The Hills: I'm Done With You
programme.desc: Justin går på glør etter at Kristin og Audrina endelig møtes ansikt til ansikt. Alt Heidi ønsker seg til bursdag er en baby, men Spencer har helt andre planer.

programme.title: The Hills: On To The Next
programme.desc: Kristin og Brody vurderer å date igjen, men når de støter på Jayde forstår de at tiden ikke er moden. Audrina og Justin møtes for å diskutere framtiden, men det ender ikke som hun håpet. Spencer går drastisk til verks mot Heidis babybesettelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Can't Always Get What You Want
programme.desc: Kristin støter sammen med Jayde når hun kommer for å gjenerobre Brody. Heidi legger en plan for å bli gravid med eller uten Spencers samtykke, og Audrina må takle at Justin fortsatt har følelser for Kristin.

programme.title: The Hills: Mr. Right Now
programme.desc: Kristin vil ikke ha Justin, men han gir henne ikke opp så lett. Audrina avslutter forholdet til Justin for godt. Brody får kalde føtter når Jayde vil flytte inn hos ham, og Spencer frykter at Heidi muligens kan være gravid.

programme.title: The Hills: The Boys Of Summer
programme.desc: Kristin og Justin vil gå videre med forholdet, og Spencer konfronterer Heidi med graviditetstesten. Brody har kanskje fortsatt følelser for Kristin etter at Jayde konfronterer ham med tilstanden til deres forhold på en forlovelsesfest.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Harriette's Hearthache
programme.desc: Terror-nettbrettet gjør livet surt for Becca. Harriettes hjertesorg blir verre og Zaralenas elendighet fortsetter, men det er den nyeste eksen som truer med å skape det verste kaoset.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: The Truth Comes Out
programme.desc: Ankomsten til enda en eks fører til et blodbad i villaen. Nicole må høre sannheten om Jacques Fraser, mens Ross og Harriette krangler igjen. Og Zaralena tar en stor avgjørelse.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Jacques Comeuppance
programme.desc: Jacques Fraser får omsider sin straff. Den nyeste eksen stormer stranden og villaen, skaper splid mellom Sean og Zahida og skaper kaos for resten.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Aaron Moves On
programme.desc: Det kommer to nye ekser, til Aarons glede og Beccas fortvilelse. Maisie treffer bunnen, Harriette får et sammenbrudd, og Sean og Jack barker sammen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Big Fat Greek Wedding
programme.desc: Terror-nettbrettet holder et stort gresk bryllup for Sean og Zahida, men når den siste eksen kommer, blir festen kaotisk. Harriette får en sjokkerende beskjed av Ross.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: War Of Words
programme.desc: Ex On The Beach er tilbake med åtte singler som håper å finne kjærligheten på Bali - men istedenfor erklærer Fatima og Nicole krig. Marty blir betatt av Fatima, og Che og Max liker hverandre - men holder det når eksene begynner komme?

programme.title: Are You The One?: Love Is Hell, Finding It Is Hell
programme.desc: En fest tenner nye romantiske gnister, og en kjærlighetstriangel dannes da en singel gjetter forbindelsen.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Wants And Needs
programme.desc: En sannhetsbås avsløringer ryster huset, og et par havner i en klein kjærlighetstriangel. Et annet par er nødt til å slå opp da presset fra huset begynner å bli plagsomt.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Down The Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: Når single slipper seg løs på en fest, truer sjalusi med å hindre et par fra fluktdaten. Frustrasjonen stiger da huset forstår at kun et av de sterkeste parene kan bli en perfekt match.

programme.title: Are You The One?: It Takes One To Know One
programme.desc: Overraskende besøk gir singlene råd og innsikt i hva som trengs for å finne en perfekt match. En sannhetsbås avslører endinger i gruppedynamikken.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Stricking Out
programme.desc: I et enestående øyeblikk avslører Kamie en perfekt match under Parseremonien. Et favorittpar får endelig vite sin skjebne. Et annet par blir sammen igjen.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Kiss And Tell
programme.desc: Will fatter konsekvensen av å prøve å fortsette med Courtney samtidig som han leter etter en perfekt match. Huset slipper seg løs og deler skjule talenter.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: All 15 chefs walk into a dining room filled with Marines, where they find out they will have to cook dishes that represent the air, land and sea. Things take a drastic turn when one chef accuses Chef Ramsay of sabotaging her.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Teams are tasked with cooking halibut in seven different ways; a dinner service; an elimination; pianist Stephan Moccio; chef David LeFevre.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs must create a dish using potatoes as the key component. The pressure becomes unbearable for one chef, leading to a chaotic dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A challenge involving cooking five commonly served `staple' dishes. Chef Ramsay makes changes to a dining service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final ten chefs are surprised when Ramsay brings in his daughter to celebrate her Sweet 16, each chef must create a worthy dish to be served at her party.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: For the chefs' next challenge, Chef Ramsay pits the teams against one another, preparing authentic Chinese dishes as prominent Chinese Chef Shirley Chung is brought in to judge their finished dishes.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Krigssone, del 1
programme.desc: Rangerne blir overrumplet av en rekke omtalte, multimillion-ran begått av menn i klovnemasker, men etterforskningen blir personlig når Walkers nære venn, ranger Logan Reno, blir drept.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Krigssone, del 2
programme.desc: Rangerne blir overrumplet av en rekke omtalte, multimillion-ran begått av menn i klovnemasker, men etterforskningen blir personlig når Walkers nære venn, ranger Logan Reno, blir drept.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Ikke stol på noen
programme.desc: Når fem millioner dollar forsvinner fra bevislageret, blir Trivette beskyldt for å ha stjålet dem.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Blåfilmer
programme.desc: Walker må være kreativ for å fakke en høyt respektert samfunnsleder.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: På hellig grunn
programme.desc: En gjeng unge cherokee-indianere går berserk og raner museer og stjeler artefakter.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Made: Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: Ben has no luck in love and is hoping to be MADE into the Perfect Boyfriend.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: A white horse-drawn buggy (complete with prince) makes Cindy's Sweet 16 a Cinderella fairytale. That is, until her mom dances with her date.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: A bikini photo shoot, a dress inspired by the movie The Princess Diaries II, and thirty dancers make up Janelle's Quinceanera. Let's hope her diva mother doesn't ruin it!

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: With the famous R&B singer Gerald Levert as her father, Carlysia gets what she wants. This includes a personal assistant and famous friends.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16 NO
programme.desc: Cher lives in a castle in the small town of Palm Harbor, Florida. Her best friend and mother is a V.I.P. of Saks Fifth Avenue. Cher's Sweet 16 theme is a Mardi Gras masquerade ball because it'll give her party a festive feel.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Shondas Ford Mustang Convertible. Hun ruller i vei i et pimpet og helt trafikksikkert kjøretøy.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Maxima Station Wagon
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Ezras Nissan Maxima Station Wagon. Han kjører av gårde i en mobil DJ-bås.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Volkswagen Baja
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Krissys Volkswagen Baja Bug. Boblen fra 1969 ble konstruert med holdbarhet som mål. Men med sitt bøyde eksosrør og sine ødelagte dører, kan den virkelig beskrives som alt annet enn akkurat det.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1987 Honda CRX
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Brians Honda CRX. Det er den første bilen som får en splitter ny motor, ettersom den gamle dør innen Xzibit får den inn på verkstedet.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Lara Flynn Boyle, Ashanti, Omarion (from B2K)
programme.desc: Lara Flynn Boyle (The Practice) gets the anti-Hollywood treatment, Ashanti rides the tour bus from hell and Omarion (B2K, You Got Served) makes every father's nightmare come true.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Taye Diggs, Rachael Leigh Cook, Halle Berry
programme.desc: Rachael Leigh Cook (She's all That) blows the whistle on an old man beat-down, Halle Berry (Gothika, Catwoman) is denied entrance into her own movie premiere and Taye Diggs (Brown Sugar) gets a touchy-feely examination from Dr. Punk'd.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bunker, Pt. 1
programme.desc: The IMF races a paid killer who is stalking a nuclear scientist forced by the enemy to work on a device that could upset the world power balance in the first of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bunker, Pt. 2
programme.desc: While trying to free a nuclear scientist and his wife from enemy hands, the IMF is trapped when a would-be assassin takes over one of Rollin's disguises in Part 2.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Nitro
programme.desc: The IMF finds itself only a second away from eternity when they intercept a nitroglycerine expert who plans to blow up the government house of a small country, thus provoking war with its neighbor nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Vault
programme.desc: Guest star Nehemiah Persoff as a corrupt Latin American official plots to loot his own country of $40,000,000 with the connivance of the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Nicole
programme.desc: Guest star Joan Collins, as a seductive double agent, endangers a vital IMF project when Jim Phelps falls in love with her.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anna Thora og Jonas har to små barn - og en drøm om å bo sammen med besteforeldrene. Så ekspertene leter etter et hus som har plass til to familier, med plass til alle og deres behov.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 406
programme.desc: Anne Sofie og Paw har ikke nok plass i den lille Frederiksberg-leiligheten etter en familieøkning. Men kravene til drømmehuset er store, så selv med 7 millioner finner de ikke det de er ute etter.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Louise og Jonas fra Viborg drømmer stort, men drømmen faller i bakken med et brak. Ekspertene må jobbe hardt før den lille familien - forhåpentligvis - kan flytte inn i drømmehuset.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lolland
programme.desc: When Michelin star chefs move from Copenhagen to the countryside, they often end up in Lolland/Falster. Here Tareq will meet Claus Meyer the father of new nordic cuisine and other entrepreneurs that opened interesting restaurants here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Skåne
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor explores his own backyard of Skåne and hometown of Malmö, a multi cultural food mix. Here you can find food and culture from all over the world that makes it a unique culinary destination.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Best Of
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Läckö & Kinnekulle
programme.desc: By Lake Vänern you find Läckö and Kinnekulle, an area rich in history, culture and traditions. Tareq cooks exciting dishes on vendice roe, fish and local cheeses - all served on porcelain from the world-famous Rörstrand.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Sjuhärad
programme.desc: Sjuhärad is nature and culture in perfect symbiosis. Tareq takes the bike to meet some of the food entrepreneurs in the area who have started exciting new businesses. Here you live close to nature, forest and lakes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Greater Copenhagen
programme.desc: Copenhagen and Skåne are a hot food destinations. Tareq visits Østergro, Denmark's first "rooftop farm" in the middle of Copenhagen, Eden in the new district Hyllie, Malmö and Häckeberga Castle where there will be wild boar for dinner.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Höganäs
programme.desc: The wild coast at Kullaberg in Skåne has a lot of culture and gastronomy to offer. Fantastic ceramics, vineyards and world-class ice cream. Tareq visits VikenTomater and cooks vegetarian ragù

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The 'L' Bomb
programme.desc: Festaften! En ny gutt ankommer og Chloe gleder seg. Charlotte sjekker opp en fyr rett foran Gaz. Marnie blir gal når en av Aarons venninner dukker opp. Den nye gutten fyrer opp krangelen mellom Scott og Chantelle.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Breaking Girl Code
programme.desc: Nest siste episode. Marnie kliner med den nye gutten Marty for å gi Aaron en lærepenge. Charlotte støtter Chloe når det tar helt av mellom jentene. Gary og Charlotte ender opp i sengehalmen og ryster hele Geordie-huset.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: More Than Friends
programme.desc: Det er siste episode og Geordie-gjengen skuffer ikke. Gary kommer tilbake og slipper en bombe. Den nye typen Marty får ikke stå med Chloe. Scott og Chantelle blir 'venner'. Holly må ta et viktig valg og avslutningen kommer som et sjokk!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gaz's Shock Revelation
programme.desc: Geordies er tilbake! Big Boss Anna har sendt gjengen til Magaluf. Marnie ønsker mer av Aaron, det svirrer et stygt rykte om Holly, og Marty åpner seg for Chloe. Ting ser bra ut helt til Chloe blir sjalu og det hele sparkes i gang.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The G-Bomb
programme.desc: Ibiza. På båtfesten er single Gaz tilbake og klarer å sjekke opp Chantelle. Men hvordan vil Holly reagere når hun får vite det? Chloe klekker ut en plan for å få Marty, men han flykter ut av et vindu.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Broken Relationships
programme.desc: Maga. Big Boss Anna er rasende når gjengen endelig returnerer fra Ibiza. Marnies plan om å få Aarons oppmerksomhet slår feil og parforholdet er i krise når Nathan blir involvert. Gaz og Holly prøver å snake ut om Chantelle-kysset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Season 1 Reunion
programme.desc: Man får svar på mange spørsmål når Snooki, The Situation, Jwoww, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi og Vinny kommer tilbake for mer krangling og innsikt i hva som faktisk foregikk i strandhuset i Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Goin' South
programme.desc: Gjengen skal til Miami! Mike, Pauly D, Snooki og JWoww kjører, mens de andre tar fly. Tidligere deltaker Angelina skaper drama. Ronnie og Sammi er blitt single, men det er fortsatt komplisert.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Hangover
programme.desc: Sammi vil vite hva Ronnie gjorde på klubben kvelden før, men ingen vil si det. Angelina avbryter Paulys spill, og den vanligvis så rolige Pauly D viser en helt ny side.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Creepin'
programme.desc: Angelina ber jentene om unnskyldning. Mike, Vinny og Pauly leker med granater i boblebadet, og Ron fortsatt har hemmeligheter for Sammi.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Breaking Up
programme.desc: Sammi og Ronnie har problemer, og Sammi prøver å slå opp, men tar Ronnie tilbake etter 5 minutter. Jentene legger en plan for å fortelle Sammi sannheten om kjæresten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Letter
programme.desc: Sammi finner det 'anonyme' brevet fra Snooki og Jenni, og nå er det virkelig slutt - i hvert fall en stund. Mike, Vinny og Pauly har hendene fulle med fire jenter på én kveld.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ceremony of Innocence
programme.desc: Following the death of investigative reporter, Bernie Spirko, Elliot Burch and Catherine set out to find the man who hired and killed Spirko.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Rest Is Silence…
programme.desc: Following the ordeal with Paracelcus, Vincent moves forward toward a stress-aggravated mental collapse. Vincent continues to come to terms with the beast in himself and finds himself losing control of his thoughts.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Though Lovers Be Lost...
programme.desc: Catherine reaches Vincent in the catacomb and rescues Vincent from his madness. However, as Vincent begins to recover, he realizes he has lost his bond with Catherine and is unable to sense when she is in danger.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Walk Slowly
programme.desc: Following Catherine's death on the rooftop, Vincent takes her back to her apartment and leaves her on her bed.

programme.title: JAG: The Guardian
programme.desc: Harm and Mac defend Bauwer, a former Navy Seal, now a homeless man, who's accused of using excessive force when he killed three men who tried to hold up a convenience store.

programme.title: JAG: Rendevous
programme.desc: Mac and Harm once again find themselves courtroom adversaries as Mac is assigned the difficult task of defending CPO Holst, an admitted wife abuser accused of murdering his wife's boyfriend.

programme.title: JAG: Ghost Ship
programme.desc: Harm and Mac investigate the discovery of a skeleton found hidden aboard a decommissioned aircraft carrier that is being cut up for scrap, and learn it is all that remains of a long-missing JAG officer.

programme.title: JAG: The Court Martial of Sandra Gilbert
programme.desc: The top female gunship pilot at the Yuma Marine Base is charged with disobeying an order to stop "fraternizing" with her crew chief, a married, enlisted man. Mac is assigned as prosecutor and Harm is set as Susan's defense attorney.

programme.title: JAG: Vanished
programme.desc: Concerns regarding the mysterious disappearance of a fully armed Navy F-14 during a storm lead Harm's investigation to consider such diverse scenarios as pilot suicide, terrorism, the Bermuda Triangle curse, or UFO interference.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Spain Cruise: The Matadors, Mrs. Jameson Comes Out, Love's Labors Found, Marry Me, Marry Me - Part 1
programme.desc: An all-star cast visits beautiful and romantic locales on a cruise to Spain and Portugal. Guest stars include Melissa Sue Anderson, Olivia Brown, Mary Crosby, Lorenzo Lamas, William R. Moses, Cesar Romero, Sada Thompson, and Adrian Zmed.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Spain Cruise: The Matadors, Mrs. Jameson Comes Out, Love's Labors Found, Marry Me, Marry Me - Part 2
programme.desc: An all-star cast visits beautiful and romantic locales on a cruise to Spain and Portugal. Guest stars include Melissa Sue Anderson, Olivia Brown, Mary Crosby, Lorenzo Lamas, William R. Moses, Cesar Romero, Sada Thompson, and Adrian Zmed.

programme.title: The Love Boat: My Stepmother, Myself, Almost Roommates, Cornerback Sneak
programme.desc: Vicki is upset about her dad's impending marriage and a professional football player tries to save his job when a new woman becomes owner of the team.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Happily Ever After, Have I Got A Job For You, Mr. Smith Goes To Minikula
programme.desc: Captain Stubing gets cold feet on the eve of his wedding and Gopher gets an offer to manage a tropical resort.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Captain & The Lady / One If By Land... / Centerfold
programme.desc: Bonnie Franklin appears as Capt. Stubing's infuriatingly sarcastic ex-wife with her present spouse, the captain's boss.

programme.title: Happy Days: Football Frolics
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Happy Days: Two Angry Men
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: Happy Days: Sight for Sore Eyes
programme.desc: After reading too many foreign car manuals, Fonzie is plagued with headaches and is forced to wear glasses for a few weeks, but fears glasses aren't cool.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Loves Pinky Part II
programme.desc: The Malachi brothers sabotage Pinky's car the night before the demolition derby.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Physical
programme.desc: A short-tempered sergeant loses his tenuous grasp on discipline when the Fonz reports to the army recruitment center soon after draftees Richie, Ralph and Potsie check in for physicals.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Apartment
programme.desc: Personality quirks begin to fray nerves after best friends Richie, Ralph, and Potsie rent an apartment together.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hard Cover
programme.desc: Richie and Fonzie must think fast to outwit a tough housemother after they're caught past curfew in the college girls' dormitory.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 2
programme.desc: Soon after getting the bad news that the studio deemed his James Dean impression obsolete, and gave Richie's wholesome good looks a contract instead, the Fonz finds a bigger fish to fry.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 3
programme.desc: Richie must choose either a 5-year Hollywood contract or college in Milwaukee while the Fonz accepts the California Kid's challenge to perform a dangerous water ski jump...over a shark!

programme.title: MacGyver: Ten Percent Solution
programme.desc: An investigation into art fraud leads MacGyver to expose a neo-Nazi group's plan to infiltrate American politics.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Madonna
programme.desc: MacGyver and the kids at the Challenge Center discover the meaning of Christmas when they befriend a mysterious homeless woman.

programme.title: MacGyver: Two Times Trouble
programme.desc: MacGyver investigates a series of accidents befalling his childhood friend, Roxy Yeats, who fears her twin sister is behind the mishaps.

programme.title: MacGyver: Serenity
programme.desc: When everybody begins making demands on his time, an agitated and exhausted MacGyver escapes to the tranquil-sounding town of Serenity, Montana…and the year 1867.

programme.title: MacGyver: Live And Learn
programme.desc: MacGyver volunteers to serve as a role model for a 16-year-old potential dropout and teach the boy the value of an education.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: Matlock: The Lemon
programme.desc: When Matlock’s neighbor, Les Calhoun, returns a malfunctioning used car he just bought, he becomes the prime suspect in the saleman's murder. Although circumstantial evidence points to a conviction, Matlock sets out to prove his new neighbor was framed.

programme.title: Matlock: The Ambassador (Part 1)
programme.desc: When a British ambassador is accused by his lover, Shelby, of killing her husband, he refuses to hide behind diplomatic immunity and instead calls on Matlock to clear his name.

programme.title: Matlock: The Ambassador (Part 2)
programme.desc: When someone tries to kill Matlock and the British ambassador he’s defending of murder, Matlock realizes that finding his client’s vanished lover and accuser, Shelby, is the key to identifying the real killer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Mistress
programme.desc: Matlock suffers a series of mishaps when he tries to find a missing murder witness to clear his client, who’s accused of killing her philandering husband.

programme.title: Matlock: The Dj
programme.desc: Matlock must overcome his dislike of a caustic radio personality and defend him when he is accused of killing a rival disk jockey.

programme.title: Matlock: The Captain
programme.desc: Matlock defends a patrolman framed for murder and is upset when he must investigate his longtime friend, the chief of police, as the prime murder suspect.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run patient mysteriously dies in the hospital, Dr. Sloan and his interns, Jack and Amanda, put their amateur crime solving abilities to the test.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A mobster's gun moll fakes her way past hospital security guards, and Dr. Sloan almost becomes her next victim! Attractive and smart, no one suspected Amy Westin's true identity.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Tonight, of all nights, Murphy's Law is definitely operating at its worst! After finally finagling all the details to put together a money-raising telethon for the hospital, Dr. Sloan loses his cool when the host of the show is murdered - on the air!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A late night call for help sends Dr. Sloan racing to the rescue! Ninety-two-year-old millionaire Jonathan Nash fears for his life.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A supposed 'ticket to heaven' leads to a trail of greedy scam artists and gamblers! Dying of a gunshot wounds, a man gives Dr. Sloan a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Følg med huseiere når de tar valget om å endre livsstilen sin og bytte ut bylivet med det rolige livet på landet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Most Jersiest Moments
programme.desc: Mike, Pauly, Ronnie og Vinny treffes og ser tilbake på de 'Jersieste' øyeblikkene fra deres familieferie i Miami. Vi ser de beste spiralene, de aller morsomste pussene, de verste toalettene og fem scener som vi aldri har fått se før.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: It's Complicated
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Las Vegas på en ny familieferie for å møte Ronnies baby. Men når Ronnies kjærlighetsdrama spres på sosiale medier, vet ingen hva de kan forvente av ham.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Oh, Canada
programme.desc: Vinny og Pauly drar til Canada, Jwoww konfronterer romkameratene, og sannheten om Ronnies forhold holder på å bli avslørt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Truth About Ronnie
programme.desc: Romkameratene støtter Ron når sannheten om forholdet hans blir avslørt; gjengen drar på kasino for å vinne stort; og Jen vender tilbake til suiten for å konfrontere noen ansikt til ansikt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Heartbreak Hotel
programme.desc: Vinny savner kjæresten og guidoene får en spesialleveranse fra Staten Island. Ronnie prøver å plukke opp bitene etter en stygg episode med moren til barnet hans.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Frenemies
programme.desc: Vennskap settes på prøve når Jenni blir helt Jwoww på Angelina og Snooki havner i midten og agerer som dommer.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Kitchen Stadium fills with the scent of the sea when Challenger Tamotsu Takao, a French restaurant specialist, takes on Iron Chef Sakai.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Dr. Hattori was thinking about recommending Challenger Kenji Motai as the next Iron Chef Japanese. Iron Chef Nakamura is ready and willing to test Motai's mettle in the battle of udon noodles.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Today's challenger is a French-influenced Italian chef of such renown that anywhere he cooks, you'll find people waiting in long lines.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: It's a chicken battle for the ages when Iron Chef Ishinabe is challenged by Chef Jacques Borie who holds the distinguished rank of MOF.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Morimoto’s debut as an Iron Chef brings a difficult challenger: Yukio Hirayama.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Kobe and Mario Frittoli, who both learned from masters of Italian cuisine, will face off in this battle of broccoli.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' sklir Rob, Steelo og gjest Karrueche Tran rundt i gatene fordi de er 'Dårlig til å drifte', tar seg litt snacks med folk som liker å 'Småspise i alle situasjoner' og holder festen i gang med 'Bursdagsbomber'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' triller Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran ut på skumruller i 'Fatal foam', tar begrepet "hot date" til neste nivå med 'Ildfulle utekvelder' og kommer litt for nær de verste flysetenaboene i 'Ekle passasjerer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' leker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran utryddere i 'Kryppatruljen', blir spesielt følsomme og feller 'Kjærlighetstårer' og skater ute i det ville i 'Bli i parken'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran nye farer ved å drikke i 'Ølskutt', møter folk som blir oppglødd når de går i bakken i 'Krasjglad' og fortsetter å kjøre i 'Kan ikke og vil ikke stoppe'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Karrueche Tran trygg avstand til 'Kanonballknusere', bommer på svingslagforsøk med 'Luftslag' og forbløffes av folk som beveger seg så smidig at 'Det kan være magi'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz ute og henger med noen 'Kule utkastere', feirer folk med hodeskaller av stål i 'Knuserskaller' og skitner seg til når de tar seg et par 'Jordbad'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz farene ved å bli oppmuntret i 'Dette fikser du ikke', sjekker noen teknologifiender i 'Robothatere' før de møter noen arge englendere i 'Britisk raseri'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' skyter Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz rett i kurven med stil med 'Ballfintere', oppdager at enkelte dager er 'Umiddelbart dårlige dager' og blir vitner til søt justis på veien i 'Veikarma'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og gjestende vert Rocsi Diaz veldig oppmerksomme men gjør likevel 'Forsiktige feil', mister taket på 'Overdimensjonert last' og drar sin vei med stil i 'Smidige avskjeder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' flipper Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz ut i 'Halvt baklengs', setter seg på 'Billige stoler' og ser hvem som får seg en 'Dekksmekk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tilbringer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz en smertefull dag på vannet i 'Båtknekt', går ut og blir 'Terrassevrak' og manifesterer en del smeller i 'Dårlig tiltrekning'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Immaculate Perception
programme.desc: Genitter angriper Tyrs kone og koloni.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tunnel ved enden av lyset
programme.desc: Med femti partier ombord er Dylan vert for signeringen av New Commonwealth-charteret, men oppdager snart at det er inntrengere som har til hensikt å stoppe signeringen.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hvis hjulet er løst
programme.desc: Beka og Tyr blir overtatt av energien fra en dimensjonal tunnel. Dylan, Trance og Harper må redde dem før de ødelegger skipet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Skårene i Rimni
programme.desc: Dylan er innrammet for drap og må rydde navnet sitt mens han finner bitene i en vase som sies å gi eieren kosmos 'velsignelser.'

programme.title: Andromeda: Mad to Be Saved
programme.desc: Mannskapet redder en gruppe flyktninger, bare for å oppdage at de har vært utsatt for regjeringseksperimenter og er ekstremt ustabile.

programme.title: Andromeda: Cui Bono
programme.desc: Bekas onkel løper for kontoret i New Commonwealth, men et attentat får mannskapet til å opptre som hans sikkerhet.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, investigators use science to unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths prove to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which had no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High 'n Dry
programme.desc: When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Faced with three homicides that appear to be professional executions, investigators on both sides of the Atlantic must find a common thread between the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The device is so powerful that it embedded shrapnel in houses across the street. The bomber had not only knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-be Killer
programme.desc: A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 18
programme.desc: This episode includes: Suicide Homicide, Ogo Pogo, Dr. Craig, Forensic Woman, Lifeguard Missing, Update: Alamo Treasure and I-70 Killer.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 19
programme.desc: This episode includes: Fatherly Love, Good Samaritan Abductor, Halloween Party Death, Update: Meredith's Mother, Carwash Kidnap and Children from Heaven.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 20
programme.desc: This episode includes: The Blob, Freedon, John Wilkes Booth Pts. 1 & 2, Update: Smoker Car Baby and Hitchhiking Killer.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 21
programme.desc: This episode includes: Sixty Miles, Sharon Kinne, Healing from the Grave, Salvatore Spinnato, Update: Dark Dante and First Loves, Second Chance.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 22
programme.desc: This episode includes: Missing Cheek, Identical Twins, Ghost Blimp, Greeting Card, Update: Lifesaving Sister and New Orleans Killer.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 1
programme.desc: This episode includes: Silent Witness, Update: Two Strikes, Missing Florida Baby, Epilepsy Pooches, Phantom Sub and Log Cabin Fraud.

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Vanished
programme.desc: A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Unlawful Flight
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Murdering Cowboy
programme.desc: The sun set on the Wild West long ago, but some people refused to notice. Claude Dallas was one of them. A wily trapper, Dallas typified the rugged individualism that forged this country. He went too far when he killed two game wardens in 1981.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: When the small community of Noel, Missouri discovered their bank was robbed, they're shocked. When the bank president turned up missing, they're outraged. And when clues began to surface the facts were more terrible than anyone could have guessed.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Soldier Stories
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Infallible Witness
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental "brain fingerprinting" technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Traces Of Guilt
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence: a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Chemistry
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scattered Clues
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutalchoosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: As the team delves deeper into the Valley Mills, subtle sounds begin to stir the silence—unheard by the cameras, but felt by those present. A chilling metallic swing echoes through the empty building with no visible source.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In this chilling third part of our Greenfield Valley investigation, we continue deep within the historic mills—where echoes of the past seem to come alive. With intense K2 meter spikes, disembodied footsteps and unexplained sounds.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In the historic heart of Greenfield Valley Mills, Sean and Bex uncover chilling echoes of its industrial past. Once alive with the hum of machinery and the toil of mill workers, the site now stands in eerie silence.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In this chilling investigation, the Ghost Dimension team travel deep into Greenfield Valley to uncover the haunted secrets of Basingwerk Abbey. Once home to Cistercian monks and steeped in centuries of devotion and conflict.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Halloween Special
programme.desc: Join Bex, Sean and the team as they investigate The Wellington Hotel for Halloween. Based in Halewood, this public inn has more haunting inside of its walls than the spirits behind the bar

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Results Revealed: Did She Cheat?
programme.desc: Justin is convinced that girlfriend Lainie has been cheating on him, and more importantly that he’s not the father of their child. But his own insecurities have led him to turn violent. Also, Steven doubts whether Ashley’s child is his.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Tragic Accident
programme.desc: Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was hospitalized. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Starving Myself to Death
programme.desc: Pamela aims to weigh 40 pounds. Samantha, who suffers from bulimia and alcoholism, steals to accomplish her binging. Can both women confront their eating disorders with support and treatment?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Crawl to Your Wife
programme.desc: After surviving a wild car chase, losing her leg, and being comatose due to her husband, Portia will finally confront him. He won't admit fault, but today Steve’s helping Portia find her voice.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Teen Daughter Wants a Baby
programme.desc: 17-year-old Naomi has undergone a sudden attitude change and is on a mission to have a baby. Parents Leeanders and April need Steve to intervene!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Stole 15 Years of My Life
programme.desc: Jennifer left home to protect herself from her stepdad Allen. 15 years later, her mother wants a second chance, but Jennifer is hesitant. Can Steve help mend this broken family?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She Is My Property
programme.desc: Lanikka is sick and tired of her boyfriend Malcom’s abusive ways. Then, Tim’s jealousy has torn his family apart, but now he’s desperate to win them back, but will Tiffany leave him for good?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Human Animal
programme.desc: The naked body of a vibrant young mother is found frozen solid in a deserted cemetery. Kenda reopens the investigation and recognizes the sinister hallmark of a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Trigger
programme.desc: A sharp-dressed pedestrian is shot in the back for unknown reasons. Chasing a promising lead, Kenda realizes he’s barking up the wrong tree.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rochdale Groomers
programme.desc: Rochdale Groomers: Documentary examining the sex abuse scandal which occurred in the North of England and appeared to go undetected for quite some time.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Joanne Dennehy
programme.desc: Dermot Murnaghan returns to uncover the truth behind the horrific crimes of Peterborough serial killer Joanna Dennehy.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: Peter Tobin is one of the most notorious serial killers in the UK. From 1991–2006 he raped and murdered three young girls; Dinah McNicol, Vicky Hamilton and Angelika Kluk. Yet even prior to these horrific murders he had a history of violence.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: John Sweeney
programme.desc: John Sweeney brutally murdered two of his girlfriends, dismembered their bodies and dumped them in canals. In a macabre twist, he hid clues in his abstract paintings, and five other girlfriends of his are currently still missing.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Boy in the Closet
programme.desc: A couple is haunted by the spirit of a little boy who lives in their young son's bedroom closet. A gas station owner's life is abruptly changed by the appearance of a mysterious paranormal mist with a demonic presence.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: Screams in the Dark
programme.desc: Two men retire without knowing their new home sits on the graves of people who were tortured and murdered by the KKK. The Queen Mary once ruled the high seas, but now ghosts roam her decks.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Face in the Window
programme.desc: A woman under assault by an aggressive entity is rescued by the spirit of her deceased son. A maid who was murdered in the 19th century continues to work at an old Texas hotel.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Haunted Bergen House
programme.desc: With the help of ghost hunter Megan Deputy, Nick investigates the Haunted Bergen House.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Fire in the Church
programme.desc: Nick tries to determine if the ghosts of priests that died in a 1948 fire are haunting the property today.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Good Year
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel reiser til Frankrike for å finne de tapte steinene fra Marie Antoinettes krone.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nothing But the Truth
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel blir gjenforent med Stewie Harper i jakten på sannhetens kalk i Frankrike.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Paris, Frankrike etter sverdet til Jacques de Molay, stormester for tempelridderne. Rival relikviejeger Rita Rosellini er også ute etter sverdet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjertet av reisen (del 1)
programme.desc: Beka tar Andromeda til Tarn-Vedra, men lengre tid i slipstream forårsaker bivirkninger. For å bekjempe dem, begynner Beka å ta Flash og blir snart avhengig.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dens time kommer 'Runde endelig
programme.desc: Et gammelt minne fra Andromeda aktiveres ved et uhell, noe som sender henne på oppdrag og etterlater Dylan ved siden av mannskapet ikke i stand til å overstyre kommandoen.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Widinging Gyre
programme.desc: Dylan og Rommie må redde Tyr, Harper og Rev fra et Magog-verdensskip.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: CBS News Live Reporting
programme.desc: Live news and top stories on CBS News.

programme.title: CBS News Latest Headlines
programme.desc: The latest headlines and top stories from CBS News.

programme.title: CBS News Latest Headlines
programme.desc: The latest headlines and top stories from CBS News.

programme.title: On the Case: Predator on the Loose
programme.desc: A deadly predator haunts the city of Stockton, California and becomes more and more violent.

programme.title: On the Case: Mystery In The Desert
programme.desc: When an innocent couple is murdered execution-style in the Arizona desert it marks the beginning of a 50-year search for the truth. Who really killed them and why? After decades of investigation, the controversial case remains shrouded in mystery.

programme.title: On the Case: Snapshot to Murder
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes into thin air during a day studying in the park. Will a photograph from a nearby celebration help solve the case?

programme.title: On the Case: A Face with No Name
programme.desc: Police have DNA evidence and a videotape of their suspect, yet they still struggle to find a vicious killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Silence
programme.desc: An 18-year-old woman never returns home after a night out with friends, and the police come up against a wall of silence that keeps them from uncovering the truth.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Storm
programme.desc: Buffalo's Electra aircraft is hammered by rough winds up the Mackenzie Valley. In Hay River, a rookie crew faces the worst ice storm in years and one rampie has a tough go trying to fit in at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Old Dogs
programme.desc: Engine trouble plagues Buffalo's newest Electra, ZFE, and a standoff between Joe and Transport Canada threatens to close the airline. At the same time, Joe faces a tough decision about his old dog Sophie.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Checkflight
programme.desc: Joe leaves to undergo medical tests at the Mayo Clinic in Phoenix, Arizona. Jeff and Sam stress over their DC-3 checkflights and Joe celebrates turning 70-his way.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Second Chances
programme.desc: Rookie pilot Jeff nearly runs off the runway. Prefkar learns to play hockey but drops the ball at Buffalo and Joe goes on a date with a real dog.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Big Plans, Bad Luck
programme.desc: Mikey decides to get Buffalo involved in a D-Day paratrooper jump to commemorate the 70th anniversary of D-Day. Prefkar escapes Hay River courier duty. Cory finds an original bracket for the DC3 static line for Mikey's D-Day jump.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Dogfight
programme.desc: Buffalo's top guns, rookies and vets, go to California for aerial dogfights in real fighter planes. Cory and Mikey race to get ready for the D-Day jump.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Gayle King, Brittany O'Grady and Nat Wolf
programme.desc: "CBS Mornings" co-host Gayle King is joining Drew and Ross Mathews to hit the headlines. Plus, its Drew' News: The Weekender Edition, a curated list of must-haves, must watches and more to do this weekend from Drew!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Whitney Cummings, Anita Tam, Drew's News with Whitney Cummings
programme.desc: "At Midnight" star Whitney Cummings is joining Drew to take a bungee fitness class! She's also covering the news with Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk including why women may smell different after leaving a boyfriend's place.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Patricia Field, Pilar Valdes, Drew's News
programme.desc: Costume designer Patricia Field is telling Drew all about some of the famous looks she's created for "Sex and the City," "The Devil Wears Prada" and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Rebel Wilson, Lauren Makk
programme.desc: "The Almond and the Seahorse" star Rebel Wilson is joining Drew. HGTV's Lauren Makk is talking all about candle sticks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Eliza VanCort, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew is joined by Garcelle Beauva is for a special female empowerment edition of Drew's News. "Claiming Space" author and mentor Eliza Van Cort is sharing tips for female empowerment and how to claim your space.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Bobby Farrelly, Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci, Joshua Felder
programme.desc: "Champions" director Bobby Farrelly is talking to Drew and joined by cast members Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci and Joshua Felder to chat about the film. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Pilar Valdes, Chris Freimuth, Drew's News

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Theresa Caputo

programme.title: Cops: The Young and the Reckless
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: Cops: Too Many Cooks
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: Cops: Second Time Around
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: Cops: Party in a Box
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: Cops: Two in the Bush
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: Cops: Undeniably Fishy
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: Cops: Nothing to See Here
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: Cops: Bible Buddies
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: Cops: Shaking Like a Paint Mixer
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: Cops: Love Gone Bad
programme.desc: A man on a dirt bike tries to elude police while dumping his firearm, and after breaking up a parking lot drug deal, an officer advises a young suspect to make better choices.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Julein Thevenet Case
programme.desc: On January 27th 2014, in Somme-Suippe in the Marne, Sophie Thevenet discovers her dead husband's body in the garage.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Raphael Lomoro Case
programme.desc: On June 12th 2007, in Berhen-lès-Forbach, in Moselle, a young woman reports the disappearance of her brother Raphaël Lomoro, 46 years old vanilla producer living in Madagascar.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Key to the Enigma (Farid Ouzzane Case)
programme.desc: On July 13, 2011, two boaters retrieved a suitcase that was floating in the bay of Lorient. Inside, they discovered the tied up corpse of a man. In order to identify this unknown man, whose face was unrecognizable.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Corpse In The Cemetery: The Frederic Butanowicz Case
programme.desc: On November 9, 2011, the body of a man was found near the Courcelles-le-Comte cemetery (Pas-de-Calais).

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deadly Trap For the Interior Designer - Guy Georges Case
programme.desc: On April 18th 2014, in Visé, Belgium, policemen are informed that gunshots had been fired on the street.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 105
programme.desc: Tina Jørgensen forsvant etter en kveld på byen i Stavanger. En måned senere finner politiet liket av en 20 år gammel kvinne. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av Tina og deretter dumpet henne langs en øde veistrekning?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 301
programme.desc: Justisminister Tor Mikkel Wara blir i 2018 utsatt for en rekke alvorlige angrep på sitt private hjem. I flere måneder står politiet uten spor, helt til det kommer et sjokkerende gjennombrudd i saken.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 404
programme.desc: I desember 2015 gjør gallerist Reidar Osen et ærend med varebilen sin da han blir kapret av ukjente gjerningsmenn, som truer ham på livet og krever to millioner kroner. Hvem står bak kidnappingen?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 102
programme.desc: Åtte år gamle Monika Sviglinskaja blir funnet død i sitt hjem på Sotra. Politiet mener det dreier seg om et selvmord og henlegger saken. Men moren hennes er fortsatt overbevist om at noe kriminelt har skjedd.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En politietterforskning settes i gang etter at Maud Johansson meldes savnet den 18. oktober 2005. Etter flere år med iherdig leting ser det ut til at etterforskningen stopper opp, men politiet gir ikke opp.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 704
programme.desc: En sommernatt i Värmland bryter det ut slagsmål, hvoretter 21 år gamle Harout mottar et dødelig knivstikk. Politiet får mistanker om at et sjalusidrama kan være nøkkelen til å finne den skyldige.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Mirror
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Grave
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: There Was an Old Woman
programme.desc: A writer of children's books gives a book to a sick young fan. Later, she starts hearing the sound of children in her house.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trunk
programme.desc: A young man at a motel discovers an empty trunk that grants any wishes. He uses it for popularity, but at a party he discovers who his true friends are.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Appointment on route 17
programme.desc: After finishing a heart transplant, a man finds his personality has changed. He also discovers that he has a strange attraction to a waitress at a road diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Cold Equations
programme.desc: A rescue pilot on the frontiers of space is faced with unpleasant prospects when he finds an innocent stowaway on his ship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: It's a Good Life
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Deaths-Head Revisited
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Midnight Sun
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.desc: Sean Evans is kicking things off with a special guest who is synonymous with spice: Padma Lakshmi.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: When cultures develop literacy, science, and language, codes emerge spontaneously; explore the rich history of secret symbolic communication from Egyptian hieroglyphics to Caesar's encryption, wartime codebreakers, and cyberspace.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Americans insert more than 3.5 million coins into vending machines every 15 minutes; how vending machines work; visiting a factory that produces high-tech vending machines; giant gumball machine.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A pilot who builds his own jet-powered glider; canoe makers in Montana; a knife maker in Washington; craftsmen keep alive the ancient art of weapon making; Skulls International in Oklahoma City; handmade special effects.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Targeting the historical trajectory of bullets, ranging from their origins in the 1300s as stones and lead balls to the "safe" and "smart" bullets of today.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Examining how frequently experts in various disciplines can hit their targets, including archers, sharpshooters and even a billiards player; the ancient world's ballista and trebuchet weapons; knife thrower; Cirque du Soleil's daring artists.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
