programme.title: South Park: Momben
programme.desc: Innbyggerne i South Park forbereder seg til et besøk av Hillary Clinton. Cartman mistenker at en muslimsk elev er involvert i et mulig terroristangrep.

programme.title: South Park: Mer drittproblemer
programme.desc: Randy slår verdensrekorden 'største bæsj', og den tidligere rekordinnehaveren Bono vil ha tilbake tronen. Men han har en mørk hemmelighet som kanskje kan hindre ham.

programme.title: South Park: Britneys nye stil
programme.desc: Mediesirkuset kommer til South Park når Britney gjemmer seg i den avsidesliggende fjellbyen. Guttene prøver å hjelpe den plagede popstjernen.

programme.title: South Park: Kina-problemet
programme.desc: Cartman blir forskrekket over den storslåtte OL-seremonien og ber Butters om hjelp til å konfrontere kineserne. Samtidig blir Stan og Kyle vitne til 'voldtekten' av Indiana Jones.

programme.title: South Park: Ringen
programme.desc: Kenny tar med den nye kjæresten sin til en Jonas Brothers-konsert der de får kyskhetsringer.

programme.title: South Park: Fiskepikker
programme.desc: Jimmi er rasende for at Cartmann prøver å ta æren for en vits som han fant på og som nå er blitt populær i hele landet. Men en sint Kanye West klarer ikke å forstå poenget.

programme.title: South Park: Døde kjendiser
programme.desc: Michael Jacksons spøkelse nekter å akseptere å måtte vandre heden og etterlater resten av de nylig avdøde berømtheter frustrert i Skjærsilden.

programme.title: Being Mary Jane: Sleepless In Atlanta

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Another angel is upset that Jonathan has been assigned to find a mate for his widow.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Bickering couples go on a trip to learn what it was that brought them together.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work to keep the three couples together.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A 12-year-old genius at college is treated as a social outcast by his less intelligent but more socially adept schoolmates.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman would like to bridge the gap between himself and his son.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer at broren hennes var involvert i et lokalt bankran. Mistankene hennes vokser når han uventet dukker opp i byen og blir involvert med en svindler.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison etterforsker tilsynelatende tilfeldige drap, og setter familien hennes i fare. Bridgette må holde en presentasjon om morens jobb for klassen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Tre jenter blir funnet drept. Allisons syner kobler etterforsker Scanlon til saken.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer gjentatte ganger om en kvinne som blir overvåket av en fremmed mann på soverommet hennes.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison er opptatt med å etterforske dødsfallet til en lokal lege når en mann som hevder å være "Døden" begynner å dukke opp i synene hennes, noe som får henne til å frykte at hun snart skal dø.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer om livet hun kunne hatt hvis hun hadde blitt advokat, som hun opprinnelig ønsket å bli.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike convinces Robert E to take a job fixing a train boiler, then finds out it is a dangerous job.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A teenage Belle Star robs the saloon with the Younger brothers and is shot. Dr. Mike takes her home in an effort to show her a real home life, attempting to turn her from her life of crime.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: An abrasive Dr. John Porter arrives in town after hearing of the discovery of dinosaur bones.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Dr. Mike becomes the substitute school teacher, the town gets upset when she teaches the children about evolution.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully convince Chief Black Kettle that he should move his starving people to a new reservation. Dr. Mike and Sully are both working on wedding presents for each other.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2501
programme.desc: Emmie og Mikel fra Bjärnum er det unge paret som har nesten hele sitt hjem på avbetaling, selv sin nyinnkjøpte valp. Paret drømmer om å kjøpe hus og gifte seg, men de har ikke engang råd til husleien.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2502
programme.desc: Elias er en utseendefiksert fyr som brenner ekstreme summer penger på ulike skjønnhetsbehandlinger og utekvelder. Han spiser ute, heller i seg store mengder med energidrikker og røyker hver dag.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2503
programme.desc: Den unge moren Josefin fra Täby er både shopoholic og gamblingmisbruker. Med nesten 1,5 millioner i gjeld, blir det en tøff uke for Magnus og Patrik.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2504
programme.desc: Therese, 34, fra Svalöv har det siste året brukt 123,616 kroner på Ullared, sigaretter, godteri og sine 13 marsvin. I stedet for å gjøre noe med gjelden, stikker hun hodet i sanden og fortsetter å handle.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2505
programme.desc: For seks måneder siden forlot impulsive Michelle Motala for å satse på kjærligheten i Norrtälje. Leiligheten hennes er fylt med ting, og de ubetalte regningene øker for hver dag som går.

programme.title: Luksusfellen Sverige: Episode 2506
programme.desc: Christofer er Malmö FF-fyren som brenner alle sine penger på fotballkamper og øl. Løgner og dårlig samvittighet preger Christofers liv, da han har lånt penger fra sine kjære.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 201
programme.desc: I den første episoden møter vi de nye mødrene LoveJoy med datteren Hailey, og Julia M med datteren Nanja.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 202
programme.desc: Julia M og Johan forteller om deres brokete bakgrunn og om hvorfor Johan havnet i fengsel. Natalie lurer på om hun skal bruke sparepengene sine på brystforstørrelse eller på en ny baby.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 203
programme.desc: Julia B prater om livet med Milan i et radiointervju. Lovejoy bader Hailey og forteller at hun ikke vil at Hailey skal ha en lignende barndom som hun selv hadde.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 204
programme.desc: Julia B vil se sommerfresh ut og bestemmer seg for å ta spraytan, men Milan synes ikke det er like gøy og gjør alt for å rømme derfra.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 205
programme.desc: Vi får bli med på Lovejoy Bäcklund og Rasmus rottejakt i huset. Julia Mindell og Johan skal signere en kontrakt for den nye leiligheten.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 206
programme.desc: Lina, Emil og Audrina besøker lekeland. Der får Lina prøve å kjøre bil, men det er vanskelig å holde oversikt over alle reglene.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 207
programme.desc: Julia M pakker før flyttingen og finner gamle kjærlighetsbrev som Johan skrev til henne fra fengselet.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 208
programme.desc: Julia M og Nanja besøker badehuset. Lina og Emil planlegger før flyttingen og lager et budsjett og handleliste for alt som trengs i den nye leiligheten.

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 209
programme.desc: Joy og Rasmus diskuterer sexlivet og krangler i Haileys hytte. Natalie og Kevin er forlovet, men hvem var det egentlig som fridde?

programme.title: Unga Mammor: Episode 210
programme.desc: Natalie og barna baker en kake til Ronjas 1 års-fest men blir avbrutt midt i bakingen når Bunny bestemmer seg for å parre seg. Hailey må holde mamma Joys hånd når hun skal ta tatovering.

programme.title: Vampire In Brooklyn
programme.desc: Som vampyren Maximillian er den populære stjernen den mest djevelske, kjekkeste og absolutt vandøde fyren i nabolaget.

programme.title: Harlem Nights
programme.desc: Tre generasjoner med legendariske komikere spiller i denne historien om nattblubbeieren Sugar Ray (Richard Pryor) og sønnen hans Quick (Eddie Murphy), som kjemper for å hindre en ondskapsfull gangster og en korrupt politistyrke i å stenge klubben.

programme.title: The Florida Project
programme.desc: Seks år gamle Moonee og hennes mor som bor på et budsjettmotell utenfor Disney World i Florida.

programme.title: Mean Guns
programme.desc: Heller enn å drepe sine fiender, finner en gangsterboss på en mer kreativ løsning. Han bestemmer seg for å låse alle inn i et fengsel og gir dem våpen og lar dem drepe hverandre. Kampen står om en premie på 10 millioner dollar til de siste vinnerne.

programme.title: Texas Rangers
programme.desc: Etter borgerkrigen, var Texas prisgitt morderiske banditter. En gruppe usannsynlige helter kommer for å kjempe mot de frafalne kjeltringene. Overmannet samler de mot til å beskytte de uskyldige og rette opp i det som er galt i deres elskede hjemland.

programme.title: Gun
programme.desc: Utstrakt bruk av våpen og en økende kriminalitet fører til at Politiet i Detroit, i samarbeid med FBI, starter en fullskalakrig for å bekjempe en sterkt bevæpnet organisasjon av våpensmuglere.

programme.title: 40 Days and Nights
programme.desc: When a colossal tectonic shift causes the sea level to start rising, a microbiologist gathers the DNA of as many species as she can, while the military creates an "ark" in a desperate attempt to preserve life on Earth.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: For de fleste er begravelser bare noe man ønsker å få overstått, og hvis det var opp til Daniel ville han hoppet over dagen hvor hans far skulle gravlegges. Hvordan skal han klare å skrive et minneord som vil leve opp til det..

programme.title: Lars and The Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars er en elskverdig introvert mann med emosjonell bagasje som har hindret ham i å si ja til livet. Etter år av ensomhet inviterer han Bianca, en venn han har møtt på Internett, til å møte ham. Han introduserer Bianca for sin bror og hans kone...

programme.title: The Way Way Back
programme.desc: 14 år gamle Duncan sliter med å passe inn i sin nye familesituasjon, med mor, hennes nye, nedlatende kjæreste, og hans datter. Mens moren blir stadig mer fraværende finner Duncan en usannsynlig venn i sjefen på badeanlegget hvor han har sommerjobb.

programme.title: Worth
programme.desc: Etter angrepene på World Trade Center og Pentagon utnevner kongressen advokaten Kenneth Feinberg til å lede erstatningsfondet for ofrene. Feinberg står overfor en umulig oppgave - å bestemme hvor mye et liv er verdt.

programme.title: Barely Lethal
programme.desc: 16-år gamle Megan Walsh er i trening for å bli en iskald internasjonal leiemorder, men i hemmelighet lengter hun etter å være en normal tenåring. Hun forfalsker derfor sin egen død.

programme.title: The Vows We Keep
programme.desc: En eventplanlegger finner kjærligheten mens hun jobber med å arrangere det siste bryllupet på en historisk taverna.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Christmas in Pine Valley
programme.desc: Natalie eier et såpefirma som hun driver med vennene sine. En dag sender et stort magasin en reporter for å skrive en artikkel om selskapet til Natalie, i troen på at det er en familiebedrift.

programme.title: Joy for Christmas
programme.desc: Når familiebedriftens årlige julekjøring er i fare, må Holly overbevise proffidrettsutøveren Jack Kane om å være det offentlige ansiktet til kampanjen for å redde den

programme.title: Christmas Party Crashers
programme.desc: Når to bedragere møtes etter å ha krasjet den samme millionærens julefest, blir de enige om å jobbe sammen, uten å vite at de vil finne noe som er viktigere enn penger eller berømmelse: ekte kjærlighet.

programme.title: Jingle Bell Princess
programme.desc: Strandet i Tucker, Maine, blir prinsesse Jasmine Arcelus trukket inn i livene til to 9 år gamle tvillingjenter og deres enkefar Sam, i løpet av julen.

programme.title: Peace, Love & Misunderstanding
programme.desc: ”Peace, Love & Misunderstanding” er et hjertevarmt portrett av en fargerik familie. Det som var ment bare å være en helgtur endrer seg raskt til å bli et sommereventyr fylt med romantikk, familiehemmeligheter, og det som trengs for å være lykkelig.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Country-sangerinnen Charlotte vender tilbake til Tennessee før hun gifter seg. Når hun møter ungdomskjærligheten, blir noe levende og hun stiller spørsmål ved alt.

programme.title: Z for Zachariah
programme.desc: I etterkant av av en verdensomspennende atomkrig er Ann Burden (Margot Robbie) en overlevende. Ann frykter lenge at hun er det eneste gjenlevende mennesket på jorden, inntil hun oppdager noe helt forbløffende: et annen menneske.

programme.title: Children Of The Corn V: Fields Of Terror
programme.desc: Seks college-studenter tar en veldig feil vending, og går seg bort i en merkelig forlatt landsby som styres av en morderisk kult med barn kontrollert av onde krefter i dette femte kapittelet i den populere film-franchisen.

programme.title: The Ring Two
programme.desc: Når det kommer fram en mystisk, umerket videokassett på et lokalt åsted, forstår Rachel at Samara er tilbake og mer bestemt enn noensinne på å fortsette sin ustoppelige terror.

programme.title: Open Water
programme.desc: På jakt etter etterlengtet hvile bestemmer Susan og Daniel seg for å feriere på en tropeøy. Mens de er på en dykkeekspedisjon flere kilometer utenfor kysten, blir paret ved et uhell strandet midt utpå havet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Gift
programme.desc: An alien who crash-lands into a remote mountain village stirs up the villagers' fears and animosity, but he befriends a little boy and gives him a mysterious present.

programme.title: Dick Dynamite 1944
programme.desc: Mot slutten av krigen planlegger nazister å gjøre New Yorks befolkning til zombier. Bare DICK DYNAMITE kan stoppe dem – drap er hans jobb, og i ’44 går forretningene strålende.

programme.title: Bullet Ballet
programme.desc: Når Godas kjæreste begår selvmord, synker han i depresjon. En kveld blir han overfalt av en gategjeng, men fascineres av en kvinne drevet av dødslyst. Han søker hevn, finner en pistol og trekkes inn i et gjengkrig.

programme.title: Number 17
programme.desc: En gjeng tyver samles i et trygt hus etter et ran, men en detektiv er på sporet deres.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 403
programme.desc: Vi møter Charlotte, som skammer seg over silikonbrystene sine.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 807
programme.desc: I 2010 dro Tina til Thailand for å få byttet ut brystimplantatene sine, men operasjonen gikk ikke som forventet, og i dag sitter hun igjen med smerter som hemmer henne.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 507
programme.desc: For 10 år siden fikk Michelle fjernet en godartet cyste bak høyre øye. Operasjonen fører til at øyelokket henger løst over øyet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 607
programme.desc: For 10 år siden bestemte Lotte seg for å ta et øyenbrynsløft fordi hun trodde huden over øynene hennes hang og fikk henne til å se sliten ut. Men operasjonen etterlot noen stygge arr over øynene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 614
programme.desc: 24 år gamle Bettina har vært lei av nesen sin hele livet, noe som på skolen gav opphav til kallenavn som Pelikanen og H.C. Andersen.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 304

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 705
programme.desc: Tove dekker opp for vikarer som har sommerferie og jobber derfor på dagtid. De nye arbeidstidene i det sommerlige Småland byr på andre problemer enn vanlig.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 706
programme.desc: Kranfører Carl har blitt bedt om å flytte en havnekran som veier nesten 200 tonn og er 33 meter høy. Men arbeidet må brått avbrytes fordi det er fare for at kranen kan velte når en del mangler.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 707
programme.desc: Mattias må hente kviger i Enköping og deretter hente en okse på Ljusterö, noe som ikke viser seg å være lett.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 708
programme.desc: I Stockholm har Max en tøff dag og sliter med å få med seg alle søppeldunkene som skal tømmes. Han gleder seg til den siste tømmingen for dagen.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 201
programme.desc: Simon fra Piteå har tatt over som administrerende direktør i transportfirmaet etter sin far Erik. Jörgen fra Höganäs må kjøre et 58 meter langt blad til en vindturbin og støter på utfordringer i svingene.

programme.desc: Laget har sin første kampdagopptreden bakom seg, men etter en dårlig øvelse advarer Kelli sitt nye lag om at hun kommer til å droppe de som ikke gir hundre prosent.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Første hjemmekamp

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: I seriens siste episode, forbereder Dallas Cowboys' heiagjeng seg for entréopptredenen sin - Susan G. Komen Cancer Awareness Halftime Show - under en nasjonalt overført Cowboys' footballkamp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Journey Begins
programme.desc: Drømmer står på spill når uttaket til 2013-2014 Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders innledes. Når portene åpnes og 500 jenter stimer inn, er den spenningen til å ta og føle på. Konkurransen kommer til å være steinhard.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Return of the Vets
programme.desc: Presset er enormt når 54 nye kandidater konkurrerer mot 32 veteraner om en invitasjon til den berømte Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-treningsleiren.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 7
programme.desc: We spend an eventful night shift with Barnsley Hospital’s casualty team. The department is already busy when Paramedics rush in 74-year-old Barry who’s struggling to breathe.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 8
programme.desc: A busy night shift at Barnsley Hospital’s Casualty Department has left the new team clocking on with an abundance of patients and a shortage of beds.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 9
programme.desc: Paramedics bring in Gary, a 28-year-old who came off his motorbike at 40 mph. However, injuries he sustained a few days earlier are of as much concern to Consultant Dr Rob Jones.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 10
programme.desc: At Barnsley Casualty staff clocking on are having problems logging on – the computer patient system has crashed and so they must resort to old school methods – wheeling out a whiteboard to track where everyone is.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 11
programme.desc: When Barnsley Hospital’s emergency red phone rings Sister Benita Wainwright takes the most critical of emergency calls – a patient is in cardiac arrest. Doctor George Kay leads the resus team, and Lead Nurse Hannah Ryan steps in to head up the nurses.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 12
programme.desc: Paramedics rush in 94-year-old Doris, who has a gaping wound on her leg after an incident with a stair-lift. Leading her care is Consultant Doctor John Raynor who says, ‘in the grand scheme of these wounds, this is probably the worst one I’ve ever seen.’

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 1
programme.desc: In this brand-new series of Dirty Home Rescue, Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Toni from Telford whose house is so dirty her partner of 10 years, Rich, won’t move in with her.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 2
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Bill and Antionette from Newport, who share their home with their 3 cats. They admit they’ve not deep cleaned their home since they moved in.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 3
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of married couple Lynne and Keith from Chudleigh in South Devon whose house hasn’t had a deep clean since they moved in nearly 20 years ago.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: From the outside 69-year-old Barbara’s house in Braintree looks like any other on the street, but she wasn’t always a hoarder, as the tragic deaths of her husband and son sent her life spiraling out of control.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: In West London, former exotic dancer Dione’s flat is bursting at the seams with a lifetimes collection of memorabilia and hand me down relics. Help is at hand as deep cleaning arrive to clear the hoard.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: Simon has to grapple with a juggernaut that has skidded off the M62 and down a steep bank, but when they finally manage to pull it back onto the carriageway, it starts leaking diesel.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: A broken-down coach on a slip road of the motorway presents a major problem for Crouch recovery op Jon and Highways England. Recovery Op Marta and Tez work together to solve a serious weight issue on her trailer load.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: Crane operator Nick is called out to do an unusual job of removing two old cabins and replacing them with new ones. With each cabin weighing at least 4 tons and overhead electrical cables to negotiate, this is a highly hazardous job.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: Jim is called to the scene on the M1. But as Jim and his team begin to pull the truck and trailer apart they discover the crash has split the hydraulic oil tank and it's now leaking all over the road making the job a whole lot more complicated!

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: Veteran Recover Op Jim has to recover a 44-ton unit and trailer that has broken down bang in the middle of a busy ring road. But there's a major problem... it's almost rush hour and the lorry is a serious collision hazard.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: When a car crashes into a river, Steve and the team are in deep water attempting to pull it out. Jim has to recover a van that has got wedged on top of a garden wall. And Fluff is picking up an army truck for a friend of the boss.

programme.desc: Cesar shows mail carriers in Roswell, Georgia, how to deal with close encounters of the four-legged kind. Next, Cesar meets a pair of Pomeranians that flip out when left alone.

programme.desc: An adopted miniature schnauzer compulsively spins in circles, four French bulldogs revolt against their owner, and an abused lab/chow/shepherd mix needs help accepting love.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: En 24/7 kanal for folk som er nyskjerrige på mote og design! Supermodellen Heidi Klum er vert for denne spennende reality-serien som gir sultne, talentfulle designere sjansen til å vise frem sitt arbeid for New York.

programme.title: The Hills: Loves Me Not
programme.desc: Kristin har en åpenthjertig samtale med Brody, hun ønsker å gi forholdet en ny sjanse. Heidis mor kommer til LA, i håp om å forsone seg med henne. Lo og kjæresten hennes feirer sitt jubileum, og Stephanie begynner å date en ny.

programme.title: The Hills: All Good Things...
programme.desc: Kristin står overfor en stor avgjørelse som også påvirker Brody. Audrina slår opp med Justin. Lo vet ikke om hun er klar til å ta neste skritt med hennes kjæreste og Stephanie mener hun har endelig funnet sann lykke.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I Don't Hold Grudges... JK!
programme.desc: Det er en ny begynnelse for den ikoniske vennegruppen da de kommer tilbake til The Hills og tar opp kontakten etter mange år. Nye utfordringer, gamle feider og romanser kolliderer. Fortiden er nemlig ikke alltid i fortiden.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Not My Family
programme.desc: Stephanie forsøker å reparere forholdet til boren, Spencer. Mischa treffer Perez Hilton, som mobbet henne da hun var skuespiller. Gnisten mellom Audrina og Justin fortsetter å ulme, men Justin kan ha fått øye for noen annen også.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: A Legend in His Own Mind
programme.desc: Audrina får sjokkerende informasjon om Justin Bobby, og tvinges til å etterprøve motivene hans. Sinnene koker når Spencer og Heidi stiller spørsmålstegn ved sitt forhold til Brody. Brandon Thomas Lee arrangere en bassengfest hos sin mor.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Not to Eavesdrop, But to Eavesdrop
programme.desc: Audrina konfronterer Justin med at han nektet å ha kysset henne. Brody klager over forholdet til faren, til Caitlyn, og sin forhenværende bestevenn, Spencer. Spencer og Heidis forhold settes på prøve når de kjemper med å få firmaet til å vokse.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Vegas for å se Brodys DJ-forestilling. Justin finner seg plutselig midt i en konfrontasjon mellom Audrina og Stephanie. Storbrann herjer gjennom Malibu, og Kaitlynn frykter for Brodys liv når han blir værende i evakueringssonen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Actions Speak Louder Than Words
programme.desc: Terror-nettbrettet skaper kaos på stranden når Stevie får velge hvem som må hjem. Chloe ønsker litt fysisk oppmerksomhet av Sam, og Brads nye kjærlighetsforhold gjør ham overlykkelig.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: The Fight For Georgia
programme.desc: Forholdet til Chloe og Sam er som en berg-og-dal-bane. Max går lei av Stevie og finner noe morsommere et annet sted. Ankomsten til en ny eks får Georgia og Brad til å spore av.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Marty The Meddler
programme.desc: Klørne kommer frem når gruppen drar på en vill safari og Deans alfahann-status blir truet. Marty blander seg i Chloe og Sams forhold, og John har hendene fulle med Georgia.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Love Is In The Air
programme.desc: Terror-nettbrettet har en funksjonsfeil og sender Marty på en date med Sam. En nykommer sender tvillingene ut i kamp, mens John og Georgias forhold bare styrker seg.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: #Ballininbalifinale
programme.desc: Bali-strandfesten får en dramatisk slutt når den siste nyankommeren skaper kaos i villaen. Georgia og John klarer ikke det siste hinderet, og Chloe får endelig det hun vil ha av Sam.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Robert's Chevrolet Van.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Amber's Chevy Cavalier.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Karma's a Bitch
programme.desc: I utfordringen avslører guttas ekskjærester saker og ting og overnatter i huset. Brittany har vanskelig for å akseptere at Adam ikke er interessert, og Coleysia og Ashleigh fyrer opp under romantikken.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Double Shot
programme.desc: Det er spent mellom John og Simone. Kayla blir interessert i Wes igjen, men hun holder fortsatt på Ryan. Gjengen blir i godt humør når de får sende to par til sannhetsboksen etter fosskonkurransen.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Turn The Paige
programme.desc: Alle prøver å finne ut hvilket som er det neste perfekte par. Kayla blir avslørt når hun spiller ut Ryan mot Wes, og Simone prøver å splitte Chris T og Shanley for godt. Et besøk i sannhetsboksen snur opp-ned på huset.

programme.title: Are You The One?: It's So Hard...To Say Goodbye
programme.desc: Huset er rystet etter at Paige og Chris T er bekreftet som det perfekte par og sendt til Bryllupssuiten. Shanley er totalt knust etter å ha blitt skilt fra Chris T, og Kayla friker ut når Ryan går for å trøste Jessica.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Getting Dumped On
programme.desc: Kayla og Ryan krangler, men huset vender seg mot Kayla da hun kommer med følsomme opplysninger som truer Ambers forhold til Ethan. En slibrig utfordring setter noen av parenes evne til å holde sammen på prøve.

programme.title: Are You The One?: White Party
programme.desc: På Den hvite festen har alle i huset det gøy, men John må forholde seg til Jacys følelser for Scali. I en utfordring på stranden får parrene sand under neglene.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The five chefs compete in Chef Ramsay's Taste It, Now Make It challenge, recreating his intricate eggs benedict dish. Later, the fish station struggles at dinner service, leaving the chef in charge of it in real danger of being sent home.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs undertake a tableside challenge, creating dishes for esteemed brigades acting as judges. Later, elimination surprises everyone, including Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Following emotional reunions with their proud parents, Chef Ramsay tasks the final two chefs with creating five meals in only 60 minutes, with the winner earning first pick for their brigade in the final challenge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The two remaining chefs go head to head for the final time, before the new executive chef at Gordon Ramsay's Hell's Kitchen at Caesar's Palace is announced.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Chef Ramsay has relocated `Hell's Kitchen' to Las Vegas, to find out who will be the next head chef at the brand new Hell's Kitchen restaurant in beautiful Lake Tahoe.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs take on a shrimp challenge in which one hopeful makes a grave error, before a tough opening service for both teams. With Lisa Vanderpump and Wayne Brady in the VIP booths, the pressure is on.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Stillingskrig, del 1
programme.desc: En berømt internasjonal leiemorder blir hyret inn av en fengslet narkobaron for å drepe en meksikansk presidentkandidat, og Walker og Trivette får i oppdrag å beskytte ham under besøket i Texas.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Sprengt i filler
programme.desc: En fange på rømmen vil drepe alle som var ansvarlige for å sende ham i fengsel. Han angriper dem én etter en og sparer Walker til slutt.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Dyp spaning
programme.desc: Med hestehale, en italiensk silkeskjorte og en lekker sportsbil samarbeider Walker med en vakker spaner i Miami for å ta en narkobaron.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Beskytterne
programme.desc: To arbeidere dør på en oljerigg i Texas i merkelige ulykker. Walker spaner for å finne ut hvem som saboterer riggene og hvorfor.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Kollisjonskurs
programme.desc: Walker og C.D. haster for å redde C.D.s niese når hun kidnappes av ekskjæresten som tvinger henne med på bankran som en slags nåtidens Bonnie og Clyde.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Forholdet til Catelynn og Tyler er i trøbbel igjen da Catelynn røper en ny løgn. Gary kler seg ut som påskehare for Leah, men en krangel får Amber til å tvile på forlovelsen. Macis nye kjæreste møter Bentley, og Farrah blir svindlet.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Maci er i tvil om Kyle er klar til å være en del av Bentleys liv. Farrah prøver speeddating. Amber forbereder seg til eksamen, men med en baby er det vanskeligere enn ventet. Retten sender Catelynn stefar på avrusing.

programme.title: The Hills: Jason's Birthday
programme.desc: Lauren haster hjem fra en lang Teen Vogue-event for å være sammen med Jason på bursdagen hans, men kvelden blir ikke som forventet. Audrina ber Heidi om råd rundt hennes nyeste date, modellen og skuespilleren Danny.

programme.title: The Hills: Boyfriends and Work Don't Mix
programme.desc: Jason utvikler seg til å bli et forstyrrende moment i Laurens profesjonelle og akademiske liv. Heidi får endelig mulighet til å jobbe i nattklubbene, men tidspunktet kunne ikke ha vært dårligere.

programme.title: The Hills: You Can't Just Be With Me?
programme.desc: Jason vil gjerne gjøre Laurens 20-årsdag spesiell, men når hun lyver for ham angående en jobb med mannelige modeller for et Teen Vogue-oppdrag, settes forholdet deres på prøve.

programme.title: The Hills: Love is Not a Maybe Thing
programme.desc: Heidi bestemmer endelig at hun har opplevd nok dramatikk med Jordan. Lauren og Jason tenker på å gå et hakk videre.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Før hun oppdaget at hun var gravid, var Maci en toppelev fra Chattanooga i Tennessee. Forloveden Ryan viser ingen interesse for å hjelpe henne, og Maci må finne ut om forholdet vil overleve eller om hun må takle utfordringene alene.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Farrah er en populær cheerleader fra Iowa, men da vennene begynner å sladre om at hun skal bli alenemor, gir hun opp skolen og begynner å bruke altfor mye tid med sin dominerende mor.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Controllers (Part 2)
programme.desc: Jim Phelps lets himself be framed for murder in a scheme to discredit a scientist who has developed a mind-destroying drug in the second of a two-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Code
programme.desc: Leonard Nimoy becomes a member of the Impossible Missions Force and, as Paris of the IMF, helps crack a vital code by hijacking a plane so the enemy can capture one of the passengers

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Mastermind
programme.desc: In a battle with organized crime, the IMF sets up a bizarre mind-transfer experiment to convince a syndicate leader he is being double-crossed on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Numbers Game
programme.desc: Guest star Mai (cq) Britt is a dangerous obstacle when the IMF sets out to learn the number of her husband's Swiss hank account by convincing him World War III has started on Paramount Television Is "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Commandante
programme.desc: To free an imprisoned priest whose life is at stake, Jim Phelps poses as a missionary, Paris becomes a Chinese general and Barney builds a helicopter on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 505
programme.desc: Ulla og Kristian bor i en vakker herskapsleilighet på Frederiksberg med sine to barn. Men de vil ha mer plass i et barnevennlig nabolag, innom sykkelavstand fra sentrum. Kan Tobias Edlev-Nielsen finne et hus til dem?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Kristian drømmer om en diger garasje, og Nathja vil heller bli i Køge – kan Tobias oppfylle drømmene sine?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Maja og Kenneth bor på Vestjylland og drømmer om å komme nærmere familien til Maja i Silkeborg. Men budsjettet deres krever at de går på akkord med beliggenheten og ser i de nærliggende små byene.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö
programme.desc: Tareq is in his hometown of Malmö – Sweden’s third largest city. The food scene here is inspired by the traditional seafood dishes and the large immigrant population whose recipes have given Malmö a new energy.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Finland's South Coast
programme.desc: Tareq takes a late autumn trip along Finland’s southern coast. He stops in the capital Helsinki to see how the city's food culture is about to be discovered by the rest of the world, and dives into the freezing waters around Ekenäs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kiruna
programme.desc: Tareq arrives in Kiruna, over 200km north of the Arctic Circle. With the weather getting down to -30C, Tareq takes part in snow picnics, firing up the smoker, and using snow and ice as part of the recipes he prepares.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bergen
programme.desc: Surrounded by some of the most beautiful landscapes in northern Europe, Bergen has become a centre for the finest seafood in northern Europe. Tareq heads into this winter wonderland to see the curious cuisine that has developed in western Norway.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: The Faroe Islands
programme.desc: Tareq comes to understand what is in the soul of the Faroese, and why their cuisine has developed the way it has. We explore the beautiful capital Torshavn and surrounding villages, and sail into a cave for a recipe prepared on a rowboat.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Central Jutland
programme.desc: Volcanoes and glaciers shaped this part of the country, leaving a giant fjord and pre-historic fossils in their wake. Farmers and food innovators work closely with nature to prepare food with the area’s plentiful herbs and award-winning seafood.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åland (Part 2)
programme.desc: Tareq goes back to Åland to explore more of this island territory. Tareq finds a chef setting up a huge food village, sees forts left over from various invaders over the centuries, and learns about beer being recreated from 200 year old DNA.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Tornedalen
programme.desc: There are not many places like Tornedalen. A rushing river has provided for locals for centuries, and the very fertile land has yielded amazing crops for centuries.Tareq explores the traditions and the food that are part of the short summer season.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Hole In One
programme.desc: Geordiene når bristepunktet. Marty prøver å gjøre det godt igjen, men vil Chloe tilgi ham? Vil Aaron og Marnie klare å finne tilbake til hverandre? På bassengfesten har Holly problemer med å holde seg på beina, og Kyles stunt slår feil.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Big Decision
programme.desc: Chloe og Marty flørter igjen. Klarer de å bare være gode venner? Sjefen Anna har store nyheter til Kyle. Holly misliker det og bestemmer seg for noe som vil forandre alt for familien. Sesongslutt.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: New Workers
programme.desc: Oi Oi! Geordiene er tilbake! Sjefen Anna sjokkerer gjengen ved å sende inn noen nye deltagere. Gutta blir glade, men ikke Sophie og Chloe, og det går skeis på den første utekvelden.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Big Decisions
programme.desc: Annas plan for å finne de beste nykommerne fortsetter. Aaron og Marty bestemmer seg for å bli bedre kjent med Sarah og Abbie. Etter krangelen med Zahida får Chloe store nyheter, og familjen blir sjokkert når to nye deltagere kommer.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Testing The Newbies
programme.desc: Nathan vil teste hvor ville de nye arbeiderne er. Chloe vender tilbake, Marnie og Marty barker sammen over Aaron og alle får et kjempesjokk når de ser den seneste nykommeren. Marty prøver å snakke med Chloe, som vender ham ryggen.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Sam's Smashed
programme.desc: Martys plan om å sjarmere Elettra med en ny hårfarge går skeis, og Marnie er redd for at hun gir Aaron blandede signaler. Chloe kaster seg over en nykommer - kan han hjelpe henne med å glemme Marty?

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Girls Like That
programme.desc: Vinny velger mellom to grupper jenter. Siden Angelina er borte vil Snooki at hun og Jenni skal skvære opp med Sam. Gleden blir kortvarig for Snooki, når Mike blir stadig mer fiendtlig.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Deja Vu All Over Again
programme.desc: Alle er frustrerte over Mike - han får gjengen sparket ut av en klubben, får bilen tauet vekk, brenner nesten ned huset og svikter Pauly. To ganger.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back into the Fold
programme.desc: Pauly og Vin har sine siste dater med Miami-jentene, mens Sam og Ron raskt havner i krangel. Jenni lager bråk mellom Pauly og Mike, og det blir en siste kveld full av drama i boblebadet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back to the Shore
programme.desc: Gjengen er tilbake for enda en vill sommer på Jersey-kysten! Angelina er borte, og Snooki har med seg vennen Deena. Spenningen mellom jentene etter Miami eksploderer den første kvelden.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: It's Gonna Be an Interesting Summer
programme.desc: Konflikten mellom Sammi og JWoww skaper spenning i huset. Ronnie og Sammi isolerer seg og går glipp av første familiemiddag. Men når Ronnie bestemmer seg for å henge med resten av gjengen, føler Sammi seg helt alene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Where's the Beach
programme.desc: Sammi vil slutte fred med Snooki og Deena. JWoww møter eksen Roger. Snooki blir arrestert for drikking på offentlig sted.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Time to Heal
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the boat explosion that most likely killed Elliot, Diana is shocked when she encounters a wounded Vincent who collapses on Catherine's grave.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Chimes at Midnight
programme.desc: After Vincent entrusts Snow's ring to Diana, she quickly discovers Gabriel's henchman have targeted her and soon kidnap her and take her to Gabriel.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Invictus
programme.desc: With Vincent caged, Gabriel allows him to see his infant son who suddenly begins to make a miraculous recovery.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: In the Forests of the Night
programme.desc: Rolley is shot while trying to rob a liquor store and takes refuge in the tunnels.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Reckoning"
programme.desc: A woman whom Father knows returns to the city. She asks him to join her and he considers it. At the same time Diana is working on a murder. And it turns that the victim is someone Father knows.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Legacies
programme.desc: Upon returning to "The World Below" upon the knowledge of some of ex-tunnel inhabitants being murdered, Father encounters Gregory Coyle who seeks revenge for the death of his father by cave-in 20 years ago.

programme.title: JAG: People V. Rabb
programme.desc: Harm is arrested by the FBI for the murder of Konaplanik, a Russian who was selling Harm supposedly accurate information about his missing father's whereabouts. The killer turns out to be Col. Tomashevsky, a Russian agent.

programme.title: JAG: Defensless
programme.desc: A woman Navy ensign shoots and kills a Turkish colonel; she claims self-defense.

programme.title: JAG: With Intent to Die
programme.desc: With help from Harm, Mac, Harriet, and Bud, Admiral Chedwiggen investigates the apparent suicide of his mentor, Admiral Clancy, who allegedly shot himself while on a hunting trip. Harm and company ultimately uncover who the killer was.

programme.title: JAG: Father's Day
programme.desc: Mac and Harm are assigned the task of defending a young Marine whose frustration at being unable to wrest custody of his son has led to his being court-martialed for dereliction of duty.

programme.title: JAG: Tiger, Tiger
programme.desc: Harm takes Josh on a weekend cruise for Navy families aboard a frigate. When the frigate is taken over by terrorists who intend to fire missiles at Cuba, Harm and Bud take matters into their own hands to stop the evil plot.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Help! Murder! / Isaac The Groupie / Mr. Popularity
programme.desc: In "Help, Murder," Denise and Bret (Michele Lee and David Groh) are a married couple getting away from their three kids for the first time.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Joker Is Mild / First Time Out / Take My Granddaughter, Please
programme.desc: In "The Joker is Mild," has-been comedian Barry Keyes (Phil Foster) abuses his family tie with cruise director Julie in an astonishing attempt to make a comeback.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Identical Problem / Julie's Old Flame / The Jinx
programme.desc: In "The Identical Problem," twins Helen and Ellen (both played by Diana "Soap" Canova) pretend to be one person, which nearly drives Doc crazy because Helen is warm, Ellen is cold and Doc is feeling amorous.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Understudy / Married Singles / Lost & Found
programme.desc: A boy befriends a couple that recently lost its young son. A trainee schemes to steal Julie's job. A bickering married couple takes the cruise and stays in separate cabins...next door to each other.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Romance Roulette / The Captain's Captain / Dog's Life
programme.desc: The presence of the captain's demanding father leaves the entire crew on edge. A dog traps a passenger in his cabin. Three friends reunite on board the ship and try to meet men through an unusual game. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie's Blindness
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: Happy Days: Casanova Cunningham
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: Potsie Quits School
programme.desc: When troubles with his studies and an insulting professor cause Potsie to quit school, the Fonz comes up with an ingenious but offbeat plan to help his friend.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 1)
programme.desc: In Part I, Fonzie is called to make emergency mechanical repairs on a stalled hearse and inadvertently discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money hidden in the coffin.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Part II, after Fonzie discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money in a hearse, the counterfeiters attempt to silence him.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Lost Amadeus
programme.desc: MacGyver gets drawn into a wacky woman's struggle to keep a vintage violin out of the hands of opportunistic criminals.

programme.title: MacGyver: Hearts Of Steel
programme.desc: MacGyver is called on to investigate the kidnapping of a wealthy industrialist's daughter.

programme.title: MacGyver: Passages
programme.desc: MacGyver has a ghostly encounter while fighting for his life in a hospital bed.

programme.title: MacGyver: Rush To Judgement
programme.desc: While on jury duty for a murder trial, MacGyver takes matters into his own hands and uncovers some startling evidence in support of the defendant.

programme.title: MacGyver: Humanity
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton find themselves under attack when they travel to Romania to investigate the archives of deposed dictator Ceausescu.

programme.title: MacGyver: Tough Boys
programme.desc: MacGyver goes head-to-head with a new Challenge Center instructor when he suspects him of directing a vigilante gang.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: Matlock: The Black Widow
programme.desc: Matlock takes the case of Ken Wilson, convicted of murdering his wife, whose body was never found. Recently released from prison after seven years, Wilson sets out to find his missing wife but gets arrested again.

programme.title: Matlock: The Other Woman
programme.desc: A disappearing diary, a missing mistress and a preposterous police report pose problems for Matlock when he agrees to defend a psychiatrist, Lucas Forbes.

programme.title: Matlock: The Psychic
programme.desc: Matlock defends a prominent psychic, Jennifer Holtz, who foresees her boyfriend’s murder and is subsequently arrested when he is found dead and Jennifer has no alibi.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thief (Part 1)
programme.desc: A rare-coin dealer invests his trust in Matlock when he’s accused of murdering an employee who was caught stealing valuable coins. Meanwhile, Tyler becomes disgruntled when Matlock hires another private investigator, Linda Hansfield, to work on the case.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thief (Part 2)
programme.desc: While defending a coin dealer accused of murdering an employee, Matlock and Tyler suspect the new investigator Ben hired, Linda Hansfield, is being blackmailed by the real kIller.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Still groggy from a visit to the dentist, Dr. Sloan is mystified when a noted fund-raiser dies while visiting his home. Adding to the confusion, the body mysteriously disappears before the police get there!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's free tickets to a friend's magic show become an invitation to murder when the magician mysteriously dies on stage in the middle of his escape act!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A romance in bloom is nipped in the bud when Steve's new girlfriend is charged with murder. An instructor of modern dance, Cindy is shocked to learn she's being charged with killing one of the owners of the studio where she works.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A cruel collage prank comes back to haunt four young women in later life. Although Amanda had almost forgotten it, a recent letter brings back the unpleasant memory.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Surprise, surprise! While investigating the murder of a call-girl, Dr. Sloan is caught in the middle of a vice raid!

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Følg med huseiere når de tar valget om å endre livsstilen sin og bytte ut bylivet med det rolige livet på landet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: What a Drag
programme.desc: Deena finner ut kjønnet til sin lille kjøttbolle, Ronnie kommer på overraskelsesbesøk, og det blir interessant når guidoene tar med seg sine kjærester til Atlantic City for å se DJ Pauly D spinne.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: AWKWARD City
programme.desc: Ankomsten til Ronnies babymamma, Jen, får romkameratene til å være på vakt mens de prøver å feire Paulys bursdag i Atlantic City. Og Staten Island-kjærlighetsdramaet tar en merkelig vending.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Where's the Beach?
programme.desc: Guidoene drar til stranda for en siste, episk ferie før sommeren tar slutt. Angelina har lyst på Vinny, og Snooki er klar for å feste som om det var 2009.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Staten Island Smackdown
programme.desc: Snooki mister kontrollen, Mike inspirerer, og Angelina og Vinnys omstridte forhold blir så ille at det aldri kan fikses.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jewish Barbie
programme.desc: Angelina og Vinny prøver å sameksistere, Deena er kanskje ikke den eneste som er kjøttbollegravid, og det blir déjà vu når Ronnie hopper i boblebadet med Angelinas venn.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Pork Roll eller Taylor Ham?
programme.desc: Gjengen savner den klumsete Deena, så de bestemmer seg for å kidnappe henne. Og hva skjer når Ronnie inviterer 'Jewish Barbie' til å overnatte på rommet hans?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a seafood expert who chooses and masterfully cooks gifts from the sea. He has apprenticed in the top kitchens of Japan. Which competitor will find the soul of the sea?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a stubborn chef descended from a long line of Tokyo dwellers. The Iron Chef will have his hands full facing such a strong tradition.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is one of the few Mexican food specialists in Tokyo. This is a Latin duel at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Andre Pachon is the leader of the French chef community in Japan. Several of his apprentices have already appeared, but this time Pachon sends his number one man.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The younger sibling of the Liang brothers, rulers of Cantonese cuisine in Japan, faces the Iron Chef Chinese.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen engages Challenger Lian Su Qin using konnyaku, a unique Japanese healthy food.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut håret med 'Partyrotter', ler av noen ordentlige 'Krimklovner' og tar en titt på ulike 'Krasjkamera'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood X
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å bære alt i én omgang i 'For mye å bære', slår seg løs på do med 'Båskriminalitet' og er ekstremt galante som i 'De beste kjærestene'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis farene ved stiger i 'Stigekræsj', føler at de må følge fulle venner hjem i 'Fylleleveranser' og oppdager at ikke alle maskoter er like i 'Maskotproblemer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood verdens verste smerter i 'Halebeinbrutalitet', opplever at allergisesongen er ille i 'Naturlig snørrete' og drar langt ut på landet og fester i 'Partylåver'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis mellom snøbrettkjørere og skiløpere i 'Snøkrig', slåss mot sulten på verste måte i 'Nattmatkatastrofe' og sykler på feil trær i 'Sykkel møter bark'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kaster Rob, Steelo og Lexi Rivera seg inn i spillet med noen 'Nattatleter', tar en slumsete drink laget av noen 'Sleivete miksologer' og feirer irriterende forhold i 'Elsker å hate dem'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' benytter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lexi Rivera de bevegelige trappene i 'Opptrappet smerte', møter morderiske barn som muligens er 'Foreldrekverkere' og kan ikke krysse gaten uten å oppleve 'Overgangskræsj'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' fyrer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av noen 'Skliskudd', starter hårete branner 'I fyr og flamme' og krangler om rot i 'Snuskete kjærlighet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood tak i en partner og nyter 'Parskøyting', gjør seg klar til en underholdende kveld i 'Brettspillmiserer' og opplever hvor tøft det er å dele rom med 'Pottesure papegøyer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvilken terrengbåt de helst velger i 'Landjakk', ser på alle måtene barn kan sette seg fast i 'Smårollingfeller' og avslutter med distre folk som er 'Uten romforståelse'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Og ditt hjerte vil fly bort
programme.desc: Når en forlengst mistet kjærlighet kommer tilbake, forsvinner Tyr fra skipet for å beskytte henne mot en snikmorder.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den ukontrable mannen
programme.desc: Sett i et alternativt univers der Dylan døde og Gaheris Rhade prøver å reformere Commonwealth.

programme.title: Andromeda: Delenda Est
programme.desc: Gruppen som angrep Andromeda under den første undertegningen av Commonwealth-charteret, vender tilbake til mer kaos.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Dark Backward
programme.desc: Trance går gjennom noen forskjellige scenarier og prøver å finne en der mannskapet hennes ikke dør.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Risk-All Point
programme.desc: Et kraftigere Andromeda-skip eksploderer på grunn av sannsynlig sabotasje, og tvinger Dylans mannskap til å redde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den rette hesten
programme.desc: Beka setter både mannskapet og en hel planet i fare når en tidligere kjærlighet dukker opp.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: When an off-duty policeman was shot dead, his fellow officers were determined to solve the crime. They needed clues to find the killer and they discovered them in tiny fibres and an asthma inhaler.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: One warm summer afternoon, the town of Verona, Wisconsin faced its first triple homicide. To solve the case, investigators had to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: The driver said he couldn't have hit and killed a pedestrian on a Harrisburg street. The Jeep Grand Cherokee he was leasing around that time had been sold months ago to a buyer in another state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a popular young man, investigators faced the daunting task of searching for one boat among 1200 others.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man was killed in a mysterious car crash, but the evidence at the scene led investigators to believe it was not an accident. Forensic science revealed what really happened and the truth devastated three families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, 82-year-old Kathryn Bishop was found dead in her Pennsylvania home. Tiny clues on the victim's body would tell police what happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: Interstate Death, Where's the Witness?, Animal Therapist, Update: The Promise, Wrong Place, Wrong Time and Always Karen.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Fugitive Fireman, The Wanderer, New in Town, Samuel's Ghost, Update: Hoochie Coochie and Cash Web.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: Lone Lopez, Ghost Lights, Marie Hilley, Missing Newbown and Sunshine Guys.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: Survivor, Poison Shake, Elks Club Murder, Psychic Family Roots, Update: Charlie's Angels and Grady's Bible.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Who Killed Kaitlyn?, Reincarnation Pts. 1 & 2, Texas A&M Rapist, Update: Friends to the End and Update: Amelia Earhart.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Teen Tragedy, Real Twin Peaks, Missing Page, Update: Robbinghood, Gigi's Amnesia and Prison Mom.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Radical Agenda
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Short Fuse
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which was mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid, the box exploded, killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Remnant of Blame
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Shreds of Evidence
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Drawing Conclusions
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written in Blood
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fort Crosby
programme.desc: Crosby Battery, also known as Crosby Point Battery and Fort Crosby, was an artillery battery situated between Crosby and Hightown in Lancashire, United Kingdom. The battery was used for port defence and anti-aircraft defence during WWII.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Passage in Time
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Big Condo Studios in Liverpool, UK. Located in one of the most haunted cities in the world and believed to be haunted by some very playful spirits. Will they join the team on their investigation tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Poltergeist House
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate a Poltergeist haunting a homeowner who is a wits end. Poltergeistal activity in the home is terrorizing the tenant and paranormal investigators Bex and Sean are about to start the exorcism of this demonic entity away for good.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Whitby Hall
programme.desc: Built in the early 1800s, Whitby Hall used to be an administrative center and now stands as a public park and arts center. It has never before been investigated, but staff have reported many noises and presences among them.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Razor Ruddock's Home
programme.desc: We visit the home of Soccer legend Neil "Razor" Ruddock which seems to be haunted. Is it his home specifically? Or are these ghosts attached to him?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Mill Street Barracks
programme.desc: Built in 1861 Mill Street Barracks is steeped in rich history. It has accommodated many branches of the armed forces throughout its life. Like many other barracks it has also been used as a morgue making it a prime location for the supernatural.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
programme.desc: Kendra is on a mission to save herself from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Over the Edge
programme.desc: Sheroya is 17 and struggling to raise 2 kids while trying to party all the time. Her boyfriend Malcolm frequently cheats and verbally abuses her. Steve’s got a lot of work ahead with this couple, but will either of them wake up?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed 5 Times?
programme.desc: Did Everett touch his girlfriend Michelle’s daughter? Her ex Robert says that his 7-year-old daughter said so. Everett will take a lie detector test to disprove it! Don’t miss these shocking results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am
programme.desc: Sean says his wife has made him so angry that he’s put her in the hospital over 10 times. Sean’s also got a secret of his own — he is really a she! Can Steve help Sean iron out his issues?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Real Teens: Real Topics
programme.desc: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face, including drug use, physical abuse, and online predators. No question is off limits!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Rescues a Runaway
programme.desc: Sherry was attacked at 15 and ran away from home. She wants Steve’s help with reuniting her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and unstable father Nick.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A soldier is stabbed to death at a drive-thru. Kenda’s only clue is that this is somehow tied to a breakdancing competition.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Who Took Heather?
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl is missing, sending Kenda’s city into a panic. A cryptic letter to the District Attorney’s office suggests the girl isn’t the only victim.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A army vet is found bleeding to death on the asphalt of a parking lot -- his chest littered with too many knife wounds to count. Kenda’s case is stuck in first gear until a gruesome clue appears.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The End
programme.desc: Kenda faces his most difficult case yet – the slaying of a young boy. The detective makes the most consequential decision of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Snitch
programme.desc: When officers respond to a shooting , they discover the body of a young man they know all to well -- police informant Jimmie Stevenson. it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Master Key
programme.desc: When a pregnant mother and her two young sons are brutally slain, pressure mounts for the CSPD to catch the cold-blooded monster who did it.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: #1 Suspect
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda must somehow solve a stranger-on-stranger crime with just a composite sketch of the killer and a mysterious bouquet of flowers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A hard-working father of two is shot in the head just steps from a notorious strip club. The case is stuck in neutral until Kenda uncovers a conspiracy organized by an unlikely triggerman.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Ricky Hawthorne, a middle-aged man with a history of AIDS, arrives at his local hospital complaining of chest pains. Doctors perform extensive tests on him but find nothing wrong and release him.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Underground World Of The City of Caves
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team ventures underground to investigate the City of Caves in Nottingham.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Strange Killing of Ken Rex McElroy
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane explore the gripping tale of justice, mystery and community in Ken Rex McElroy's demise.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Scandalous Murder of William Desmond Taylor
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane untangle a web of Hollywood's secrets in the scandalous murder of William Desmond Taylor.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Extraordinary Disappearance of Louis Le Prince
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane cover the disappearance of a man who stepped onto a train only to never be seen again.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Disturbing Mystery of the Jamison Family
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane discuss the mystery of the Jamison family, who vanished in the woods under odd circumstances.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Sinister Disappearance of Jimmy Hoffa
programme.desc: Delve into the case of Jimmy Hoffa as Ryan and Shane investigate the mystery of this prominent mob figure.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Bizarre Collar Bomb Bank Robbery
programme.desc: Join Ryan and Shane as they discuss the bizarre collar bomb incident and the details that still remain murky.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Mysterious Death of the Eight-Day Bride / The Incredible Alcatraz Prison Break
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane unravel the tale of a tragic love triangle and cover a thrilling escape from Alcatraz Prison.

programme.title: Mutant X: Power Play
programme.desc: Teamet sliter med å frigjøre en militær oberst som har truet med å slippe løs et kjernefysisk holocaust.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Possessed
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel er i Brussel, Belgia på jakt etter den hellige soluret til Zeus for å stoppe vampyrene.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Memories of Montmartre
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Paris, Frankrike for å finne en stjålet medaljong, slik at de kan fjerne Sydneys døde bestemor for anklagene.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Put Back
programme.desc: Kuba, Afrika 100 e.Kr.: Tilbedere av Woote forbanner sitt idol for å beskytte det. 2000: Ross Crawford kommer til Sydney fordi han tok avguden og forbannelsen har fått fart på aldringen hans.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Legend of the Lost
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel satte ut for å finne ut om legenden om den tapte sivilisasjonen i Ny Guinea er sann. Dessverre må de slå seg sammen med Derek Lloyd.

programme.title: 24/7 Primetime
programme.desc: 24/7 Primetime is your essential daily guide to all the stories shaping your world. Anchored by CBS News' Elizabeth Cook, the show delivers the news you need to know.

programme.title: The Daily Report
programme.desc: The Daily Report on CBS News features original interviews and insights on the most important, urgent and interesting stories of the day.

programme.title: CBS Evening News
programme.desc: The CBS Evening News team shares the day's stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to the world.

programme.title: CBS Evening News

programme.title: On the Case: Profile of a Killer
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman is found murdered in the basement of her brand new home, Police are forced to use cutting edge techniques to solve a terrifying mystery.

programme.title: On the Case: Deceiving Appearances
programme.desc: Police suspect a mysterious double homicide is not what it appears to be.

programme.title: On the Case: Mixed Signals
programme.desc: Cell phone records may help solve the disturbing murder of a popular teenager.

programme.title: On the Case: Unfinished Journey
programme.desc: Jamie Bowie disappears while driving from Phoenix to Los Angeles on Interstate 10, then her body is found near the highway a month later.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Predator
programme.desc: A sexual predator viciously murders a 16 year old girl. Can investigators catch him before he kills again?

programme.title: On the Case: Dirty Secrets
programme.desc: How did seventeen year old Joanna Rogers disappear from her home in the middle of the night? It was a question that baffled the investigators in Lubbock, TX. The mystery may have never been solved without the evidence found during another brutal murder...

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Big Deal
programme.desc: When a power failure leaves Rankin Inlet exposed to the brutal northern elements, captain Justin races to deliver an emergency generator. Ramp hand Jeremy tries to move ahead of co-worker Audrey by training a new hire from India to replace him.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: 40/40/40
programme.desc: Mechanic Cory races against the clock to turn two short-haul waterbombers into transatlantic aircraft for the epic journey to Turkey. It's up to engineer Adam to get the C-46 crew out of a jam on a remote airstrip in minus 40.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: On the Move
programme.desc: A charter flight falls through the cracks after the McBryans attend a wild family wedding, and an irate Joe pulls captain Justin from the Turkey test flights to do the job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Suspension
programme.desc: A furious Joe fights against a federal suspension that will prevent him from carrying passengers for the first time in 20 years. It's also a setback for Jeremy and the other rampies, which takes a turn for the worse with an unexpected injury.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Cause for Celebration
programme.desc: AJ and Candace get married in the Ice Castle. A frustrated Chuck tries to get the Electra to pay her way. A flummoxed Mikey tries to bake a cake for Joe's birthday.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: "Drewber" with Courteney Cox and Melissa Barrera, Drew's News with Tony Dokoupil
programme.desc: "Scream VI" stars Courteney Cox and Melissa Barrera are joining Drew in an all-new Drewber. Plus, "CBS Mornings" Tony Dokoupil joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Tamar Adler, Tony Dokoupil

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Kerry Washington, Tracy McMillan

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Kerry Washington, Danny Seo, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew-crew member Danny Seo is back and sharing professional laundry tips with Drew andKerry Washington, including how to get makeup stains out of sheets.Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk and covering the hottest topics.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Paris Hilton, Michelle Miller, Drew's News

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Ronnie Woo, Drew's News
