programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvilken terrengbåt de helst velger i 'Landjakk', ser på alle måtene barn kan sette seg fast i 'Smårollingfeller' og avslutter med distre folk som er 'Uten romforståelse'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood i gang kjøretøyene sine i 'Flyktende motorer', vender det andre kinnet til i 'Overraskelseskyss' og hogger i vei med litt 'Økseanarki'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood L
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og deres spesielle gjest Lolo Wood, redd for å få sprøyter i 'Stikkpanikk', får igjen verbalt i 'Ta igjen-attakk' og føler hele dekkmønsteret når de blir 'Overkjørt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at uhell elsker selskap i 'Du blir med meg', strever med vekter i 'Verstinger med vekstang' og møter noen fryktelig glade papper i 'Overentusiastiske fedre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' smasher Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood handlevogner med 'Vognkrasjere', deler luftyogaens felles smerte med 'Dinglende duoer' og blir banket opp av gårdsdyr i 'Buskapssmell'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood lett i 'Henfallen til fall', forbauser aper voldsomt med 'Apemagi' og har problemer med å finne tingene sine i 'Borte, men funnet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kan ikke Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood løpe fra den morsomme snublingen i 'Fluktfall', viser fram imponerende bisker i 'Hermehunder' og snakker varmt for bruken av solide hodeplagg i 'Skudd fra oven'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvor stor skade en strippepåle kan forårsake i «Pål-lateral skade', oppdager at ikke alle liker å bli skremt i 'Skremtraseri' før de avslutter med noen 'Forlatte farer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut fra tee i 'Sving-ding', krasjer med 'Små landingsmatter' og blir offer for noen 'Byfeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood besøk av sangeren Teddy Swims og ser nærmere på folk som 'Mister kontrollen', får faderlige råd i 'Pappavisdom og kaster ut noen problemtyper i 'Vis dem veien ut'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den rette hesten
programme.desc: Beka setter både mannskapet og en hel planet i fare når en tidligere kjærlighet dukker opp.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hva skjer med en revidert utsatt?
programme.desc: Andromeda mottar et rop om hjelp fra pastor Bam.

programme.title: Andromeda: Spydspunktet
programme.desc: Etter at en Commonwealth-planet er angrepet av pyriske pyroformere, blir Dylan tvunget til å kjempe for å beskytte den nye planeten.

programme.title: Andromeda: Himmelhvelvet
programme.desc: Dylan hører stemmer som tilsier ham til en planet med 'ild og is'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Deep Midnight's Voice
programme.desc: Mens han er fanget i en kamp mellom to Nietzschean-stolthetspunkter, fanger mannskapet en fiendtlig som hevder at stoltheten hans har et kart over slipstream.

programme.title: Andromeda: Illusjonen av majestet
programme.desc: En feil sving etter å ha gått ut av en slipstream sender Andromeda inn i Prolon-systemet. De redder en fluktpute fra en viss katastrofe, men stoltheten vil ha den tilbake.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A bomb, constructed to cause as much damage as possible, kills a victim with deadly force and flame. When a painstaking search yields some tiny clues, police are able to identify the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When the number and volume of bloodstains at the scene was greater than usual, it was up to forensic scientists to find out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue ? a flaw on a mailing envelope ? exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Teen Tragedy, Real Twin Peaks, Missing Page, Update: Robbinghood, Gigi's Amnesia and Prison Mom.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: Boston Strangler II, Vancouver Lights, Jai Alai, Dub's Last Chance, Mystery Man and Update: Musician Sings the Blues.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dial A For Abduction, Alamo Treasure, Deadly RX, Harold and Ma, Update: Mrs. Millionaire and Dates.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Vegas Rapist, CIA Secrets, Lady in Black, Realtor Murder, Update: The Dale and Fawzi's Son.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 14
programme.desc: This episode includes: Anastasia Pts 1 & 2, J.D. Method, Interstate Disappearance and Glendeen's Goal.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: Two for the Road, Boston Healer, Niqui Bride, Bad Dad, Update: Baby Broker and Amazon Women.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written in Blood
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Wasted Youth
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Crimes Of Passion
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Cold Cases
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Raw Greed
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Mill Street Barracks
programme.desc: Built in 1861 Mill Street Barracks is steeped in rich history. It has accommodated many branches of the armed forces throughout its life. Like many other barracks it has also been used as a morgue making it a prime location for the supernatural.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Stranger in the Blitz
programme.desc: Damaged during the blitz, the location the team investigate was a former war hospital for the injured and wounded, based in Liverpool, UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Celebrity Special - The Black Horse in Pluckley Village
programme.desc: Bex and Sean are joined by reality TV star Charlie Doherty in the most haunted village in the UK and investigate the most haunted pub in the UK, The Black Horse.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Piano Plays a Ghost Song
programme.desc: Following reports of loud voices and footsteps heard when no one else is around, staff seeing dark shadows fleeting through the empty corridors, to several pianos playing by themselves, Ghost Dimension head into Champness Hall.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Norris Green Mansion Part 1
programme.desc: Many urban explorers have encountered paranormal activity inside of the building, including child like figures, unexplained voices and strange knocking sounds. Will anything from the ghost dimension make contact?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Norris Green Mansion Part 2
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension's Bex and Sean investigate Norris Green Mansion. A 17th Century building, which is believed to hold some of the most haunted spirits in Liverpool. Will they make contact its ghostly entities tonight?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Rescues a Runaway
programme.desc: Sherry was attacked at 15 and ran away from home. She wants Steve’s help with reuniting her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and unstable father Nick.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Betrayal
programme.desc: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be selling sex. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Did It To Hurt You
programme.desc: Aeshia’s here to prove to Terrence and his wife Lashondra that Terrence is the father of her child, but Lashondra knows she’s wrong! Both Shaunah and Chris have convinced themselves that they’re being cheated on. Who’s the father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Left You, But You Are The Father
programme.desc: Anastasia and Robert's 2 year relationship crumbled when he heard rumors that she was cheating on him. She says that she's always been faithful, but Robert doesn't believe her and now he doubts he is the father of her newborn baby.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did The Babysitter Abuse My Child?
programme.desc: Stephanie says that ever since she came home from work to find her 1-year-old with a black eye, she has feared that her children's babysitter harms them. Sitter Cheryl denies some serious accusations about a child.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The End
programme.desc: Kenda faces his most difficult case yet – the slaying of a young boy. The detective makes the most consequential decision of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: When the Music Stops
programme.desc: Vietnam War veteran Charles Walker is found unconscious, after a stabbing attack so savage even 45 units of blood couldn’t save his life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Monster Awakes
programme.desc: When Julie Smith reports being sexually assaulted, Lt. Joe Kenda and his Sex Crimes Unit discover a terrifying similarity to other attacks on the east side of town.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Last Fare
programme.desc: A young man is found dead behind the wheel of his taxi. With robbery seeming unlikely, Kenda and Gaenzle wonder if this was personal.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: Kenda finds the body of a bruised and battered young woman named Vicki Ross strangled. Kenda must sort through the endless suspicious characters in Vicki's past to find the elusive truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Ricky Hawthorne, a middle-aged man with a history of AIDS, arrives at his local hospital complaining of chest pains. Doctors perform extensive tests on him but find nothing wrong and release him.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Teenagers stumble across a horrifying car fire on the side of a desolate stretch of roadway. When the police arrive, they pull severely burned human remains from the driver’s seat.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A retired military officer is found dead in his own backyard during a freak ice storm in San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G. has just graduated from medical school and is set to begin her first job as an M.E. in Jacksonville, Florida when a high-profile case challenges her to use her newly acquired skills.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Manny Alvarez mysteriously crashes his car into a fence. He dies en route to the hospital, leaving behind a wife and son. It is up to Dr. G to find out what cut this young man’s life short.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A diabetic man dies after a night out. Meanwhile, an elderly man's decomposing body is found in his son’s home. Dr. G realizes that finding the causes of death will be anything but straightforward.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Mysterious Death of the Eight-Day Bride / The Incredible Alcatraz Prison Break
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane unravel the tale of a tragic love triangle and cover a thrilling escape from Alcatraz Prison.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories: Nene Leakes
programme.desc: TV personality and "The Real Housewives of Atlanta" star NeNe Leakes joins psychic medium Kim Russo to investigate paranormal events connected to a wedding she attended in Atlanta, GA.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories: Kelly Osbourne
programme.desc: Kelly Osbourne enlists psychic medium Kim Russo to help her solve a series of paranormal mysteries she experienced at a notoriously haunted Hollywood hotel.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories: Taye Diggs
programme.desc: Taye Diggs returns to a New York City theatre with psychic medium Kim Russo to investigate an unforgettable paranormal encounter he experienced years ago.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .: Beverley Mitchell
programme.desc: In this episode, Beverley Mitchell ("7th Heaven") returns to Pennhurst Asylum to find answers about the ghosts at Pennhurst.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .: Eric Mabius
programme.desc: For the first time in years, Eric Mabius (Resident Evil, Ugly Betty) returns to Allaire Village to confront the ghost.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Legend of the Lost
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel satte ut for å finne ut om legenden om den tapte sivilisasjonen i Ny Guinea er sann. Dessverre må de slå seg sammen med Derek Lloyd.

programme.title: Andromeda: Et hjerte for falskhet innrammet
programme.desc: Mannskapet må stjele en juvel som er i sentrum av en strid mellom en driftseier og Than. Beka faller for en sikkerhetssjef som tidligere var en tyv.

programme.title: Andromeda: Pitiless as the Sun
programme.desc: Andromeda svarer på et nødanrop når et lasteskip blir angrepet

programme.title: Andromeda: Siste samtale ved den ødelagte hammeren
programme.desc: Mannskapet ser etter en mistet Commonwealth-leder som har skjult seg.

programme.title: Andromeda: Altfor menneskelig
programme.desc: Dylan, Beka og Trance går sammen med Rommie for å finne ut om et våpen som utvikles på en planet som mistro AI.

programme.title: Mutant X: Time Squared
programme.desc: Ashlocke går tilbake i tid for å prøve å gjøre seg uovervinnelig ved å gi noe til sitt yngre jeg, og får Brennan og Shalimar til å følge ham.

programme.title: CBS Evening News
programme.desc: The CBS Evening News team shares the day's stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to the world.

programme.title: 24/7 Primetime
programme.desc: 24/7 Primetime is your essential daily guide to all the stories shaping your world. Anchored by CBS News' Elizabeth Cook, the show delivers the news you need to know.

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by Major Garrett; a daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News' political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: On the Case: Dirty Secrets
programme.desc: How did seventeen year old Joanna Rogers disappear from her home in the middle of the night? It was a question that baffled the investigators in Lubbock, TX. The mystery may have never been solved without the evidence found during another brutal murder...

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Deception
programme.desc: Officers investigate the death of a father of four who was gunned down, however nothing about the crime is what it appears to be.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder at Sunrise
programme.desc: A beautiful young mother is found murdered while walking her dogs. Investigators suspect her killer is someone she knew. Twenty-six years latter police make an arrest but is he the right man?

programme.title: On the Case: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: A young boy is murdered in his bed in the middle of the night. Police suspect the child's mother. Over the next 9 years there will be accusations, a confession and a conviction but will justice be served?

programme.title: On the Case: Veil of Suspicion
programme.desc: A beloved husband and father is found executed in front of his home.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Cause for Celebration
programme.desc: AJ and Candace get married in the Ice Castle. A frustrated Chuck tries to get the Electra to pay her way. A flummoxed Mikey tries to bake a cake for Joe's birthday.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Transatlantic Crossing
programme.desc: The Turkey crew makes the critical jump over the North Atlantic. But en route to Portugal, one crew is forced to turn back.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Thin Ice
programme.desc: C-46 and DC-4 crews race against the spring melt to fly mining equipment to an airstrip on a frozen lake. Jeremy tries to catch up to fellow rampies Audrey and Wilf.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Crash
programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and dangerous flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey - and everyone at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Change of Seasons
programme.desc: When her husband quits after a blowout with Joe, Kelly is put in a terrible position. Will she stay at Buffalo - or will she go? Scott gets the news he must stand down from flying so another co-pilot can fast-track to captain.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Up In the Air
programme.desc: After her husband's acrimonious departure from Buffalo, Kelly has a confrontation that decides whether she, too, will quit. Jeremy makes a mistake that could end his Buffalo career.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Rob Riggle
programme.desc: Rob Riggle joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover topics like the news of a potential "Dumb and Dumber 3" and the couple that opted for mashed potato powder instead of rice at their wedding.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Jennette McCurdy
programme.desc: Jennette McCurdy, author of the best-selling memoir, "I'm Glad My Mom Died," has a very honest and revealing conversation with Drew.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Phoebe Robinson, Design Under $30, National Teacher’s Day
programme.desc: Podcast host Phoebe Robinson joins Drew to help solve some dilemmas in “Drew’s and Don’ts.” Comedian Michelle Collins and Drew play “Change My Mind: Reality TV Edition.” Drew celebrates Nat'l Teacher’s Day with Bronx middle school teacher Jamel Holmes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: James Corden, “Drew’s Love Bug” Dating Apps, The Weekender
programme.desc: James Corden gets candid on hosting a daily show. Drew dives into the world of dating apps enlisting a dating expert to share tips in the latest installment of “Drew’s Love Bug.” Drew gives a curated list of her favorite picks in “The Weekender.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Joe Manganiello, Adam Sandler, Money Talk with Carmen Rita Wong
programme.desc: "Archenemy" star Joe Manganiello chats with Drew. Drew shares some never before seen moments from her chat with Adam Sandler. Personal finance expert Carmen Rita Wong shares tips. Drew tries out some weird food combos with TikTok star Eitan Bernath.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: John Boyega, Drew's News, In A Minute with Bill Nye 60 Second Experiment
programme.desc: "The Woman King" star John Boyega stops by to chat and roller skate with Drew. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Bill Nye shares his 60 second experiment.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Chris Freimuth, Drew's News
programme.desc: Horticulturist Christopher Freimuth shares holiday decor tips. Drew & Ross report on E.T. auction & benefits of being in the rain. James Warren talks about building benches at local bus stops.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Queen Latifah, Chris Appleton, Mikel Welch, Drew's News
programme.desc: Queen Latifah shares behind-the-scenes stories. Chris Appleton does music teacher's hair. Drew's News w/ Ross Mathews & Mikel Welch. TikToker Sarah T. shows hack for lamp cords.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: A report on the events that led to the 2012 death of Lizzi Marriott, a 19-year-old New Hampshire woman lured into the dark world of BDSM and who twice refused to take part in S&M sex with her co-worker Kat McDonough and her boyfriend Seth Mazzaglia.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A young banker named David Harmon was bludgeoned to death in his bed. Investigators came to believe that Melinda was involved in a secret affair with family friend Mark Mangelsdorf, and that the two were involved in David’s murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: A report on the disappearance of Jeanette Louise Zapata, who mysteriously vanished without a trace from her home in Wisconsin on October 11, 1976, leaving behind her daughter Linda, and two other children.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed the Beauty Queen?
programme.desc: In 2005, a college student and aspiring beauty queen Nona Dirksmeyer was found murdered inside her apartment. Police believed Nona's boyfriend flew into a murderous rage when he discovered a condom wrapper on her kitchen counter.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Peace, Love and Murder
programme.desc: A report on the murder of housewife Toni Heartsong, killed in her Jupiter, Florida home on in 2000. Her husband was initially eliminated as a possible suspect, but in 2006, new DNA technology revealed the presence of his blood under Toni's thumbnail.

programme.title: Cops: Bail Me Out, Boss
programme.desc: A distressed woman leads the cops to her abusive fiance, and a couple of officers are suspicious when they pull over an overly friendly man.

programme.title: Cops: Thanks for Nothing, Mom
programme.desc: Officers respond to a suspected animal cruelty call, a fight between neighbors turns violent, and deputies question a suspicious group behind a truck stop.

programme.title: Cops: Clueless
programme.desc: A young woman with warrants tries to avoid jail time, deputies confront a hit-and-run suspect, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: Cops: Organized Crime
programme.desc: Emotions run high when a dispute between siblings gets out of hand, a man struggles to keep his story straight with the police, and deputies investigate a domestic incident.

programme.title: Cops: Out of Sight, Out of Mind
programme.desc: The K-9 unit tracks down a man fleeing on foot, a father is left with no choice but to call the cops on his son, and a former gang member is found with a stolen firearm.

programme.title: Cops: Two Doors Down
programme.desc: A deputy calls for backup when he's outnumbered, a former Marine damages his neighbors' property, and a husband and wife are separated after their vehicle is searched.

programme.title: Cops: One Headlight
programme.desc: A man pulls out all the stops to elude the police, a civilian steps in when she spots a violent crime in progress, and a suspected shoplifter is confronted by officers.

programme.title: Cops: Between a Bush and a Hard Place
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit switches gears when the driver flees on foot, an altercation causes tension between neighbors, and a driver is irate when officers search his passenger.

programme.title: Cops: Manic Monday
programme.desc: A wanted man attempts to hide at his grandmother's house, police arrest a suspect driving a stolen vehicle, and officers call animal control for an injured dog.

programme.title: Cops: Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
programme.desc: Deputies pull a man from a devastating car wreck after a high-speed chase, officers apprehend and question a robbery suspect, and a wanted man tries to flee from police.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Sylvie Darcy Case
programme.desc: On February 26th 2012, in the Yevelines. Around 11PM policemen are called for an assault in a parking lot in the forest of Saint-Lambet-des-Bois.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Hanging On Houseboat (Aubry case)
programme.desc: Dominique Aubry, a rich widow of 58, is found hanged on her barge in Neuilly. It appears that since the death of her husband on a trip to Mauritius, Dominique Aubry has been ailing.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Only DNA Can Say - Angélique Dumetz
programme.desc: On February 23th 2017, policemen are alerted of the disapearrance of Brigitte Troadec, her husband Pascal, and their children Sébastien and Charlotte.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Jean-Raymond Blatti Case
programme.desc: Arriving at her work, the secretary of a small firm in the suburbs of Geneva finds the body of Jean-Raymond Blatti, the company's new accountant. The man is lying in a pool of blood and, on his belly, the murderer has written \"DIRTY RAPIST\".

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: A Very Strange Suicide (Muller case)
programme.desc: Police in Strasbourg receive a startling emergency call from Doctor Jean-Louis Muller, a forensic pathologist well known in the region.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: I juli 2022 rystes Mölndal da en død mann blir funnet halvt avkledd, brennemerket og med en båndopptaker plassert på kroppen. Politiet mistenker at noe langt mer urovekkende enn et vanlig drap har funnet sted.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 201
programme.desc: En augustdag i 1996 blir den 20 år gamle hotellarbeideren Trude Espås observert sittende på en stein ikke langt unna Geiranger sentrum. 11 dager senere blir hun funnet drept.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 203
programme.desc: Den tidligere artisten, flammeslukeren og TV-danseren Julio Kopseng lever et omsvermet liv i Oslos dansemiljø. Da han blir anmeldt for en voldtekt i 2013 utløses et skred av voldtektsanmeldelser mot ham.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 104
programme.desc: 10. august 2019 opplevde Norge nok et rystende terrorangrep. 21 år gamle Philip Manshaus dreper først sin 17 år gamle stesøster. Bevæpnet, og med uniform går han deretter til angrep mot Al-Noor moskeen i Bærum.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 101
programme.desc: Anne Elisabeth Hagen forsvinner sporløst fra sitt hjem høsten 2018. På en rød stol finner ektemann og milliardær, Tom Hagen et trusselbrev og krav om løsepenger.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Den 15. mai 2018 ble politiet i Örebro varslet om at Lena Wesström, en trebarnsmor, var forsvunnet fra hjemmet sitt. Et vitne hevder å ha hørt hjerteskjærende skrik fra en kvinne samme natt som Lena forsvant.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hunt
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Many, Many Monkeys
programme.desc: An epidemic breaks out and many people are struck blind. Something more happens, however: People have become cold and heartless toward each other

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Love Is Blind
programme.desc: A man plotting to murder his wife's lover meets a blind singer who seems to know all about his plans.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Crazy as a Soup Sandwich
programme.desc: A man sells his soul to a demon for some racing tips. After being terrified by the demon he goes for help from the criminal boss he borrowed the track money from

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Special Service
programme.desc: A man finds that his life has been on TV for the past five years

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Showdown with Rance McGrew
programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Kick the Can
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Piano in the House
programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Rites of Jeff Myrtlebank
programme.desc: Jeff Myrtlebank comes back to life at his own funeral and soon begins to act very strangely...

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Bob Odenkirk is an actor and writer whose resume includes the comedy series “Mr. Show” and hit “Breaking Bad.”

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Actress Millie Bobby Brown is known best for her role in "Stranger Things," but how is she with spicy food?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Wolfhard discusses the art of the horror flick and movie nights with Gaten Matarazzo.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Scarlett Johansson Tries to Not Spoil "Avengers" While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Scarlett Johansson is a talented actress and star of the Avengers franchise.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Israel Adesanya is one of the UFC's most accomplished and dominant fighters. Can he beat the wings of death?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Queen of comedy Leslie Mann takes on the wings death and calls out "Hot Ones" creator Chris Schonberger.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Paul Rudd Does a Historic Dab While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Paul Rudd is an actor, writer and producer who has been in some of the most beloved films and TV shows.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Kevin Love Gets Dunked On By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Cleveland Cavaliers player Kevin Love may cruise through the NBA but can he cruise through wings of death?

programme.desc: Matt Damon is an Academy Award-winning actor from "Saving Private Ryan," the Bourne film series and more.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Chrissy Teigen Gets Drunk on Spicy Wings

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: When cultures develop literacy, science, and language, codes emerge spontaneously; explore the rich history of secret symbolic communication from Egyptian hieroglyphics to Caesar's encryption, wartime codebreakers, and cyberspace.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Americans insert more than 3.5 million coins into vending machines every 15 minutes; how vending machines work; visiting a factory that produces high-tech vending machines; giant gumball machine.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The historic one-armed bandits; cutting edge, computerized slot machines; some of the wackiest vending machines; binoculars at popular tourist sites; a unique company that collects and cleans the coins thrown into fountains.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: They're the meat in our sandwiches and slices of American pop culture; take a look behind the deli counter to reveal the secret ingredients in boloney; watch a master sausage maker craft salami, and pile it on at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Copper transports electricity, water, and heat while being essential for survival yet killing microbes; this versatile metal conducts electricity globally, revolutionizes electronics, forms plumbing pipes, creates beautiful roofs, and more.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Cotton caused a civil war and jump-started the Industrial Revolution while becoming the world's most ubiquitous fabric; a chronicle of cotton's journey from dirt to shirt.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: The Western Allies secure supply routes that will allow them to enter Germany, and the Ardennes counter-offensive fails. The Red Army advances rapidly. The SS implements the Holocaust.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Tanks have transformed warfare since their debut a century ago. Host Wil Willis traces their evolution from World War One breakthroughs to modern marvels like the M1 Abrams, the world's most powerful Main Battle Tank.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Could the mighty M2 be the greatest machine gun in history? Nicknamed “Ma Deuce”, this American machine gun has dominated battlefields for over 80 years. Host Wil Willis tests it and recreates Audie Murphy’s famous Medal of Honor moment.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: Japan continues its suicidal resistance, and invading it looks costly. After 2 atomic bombs, the Emperor intervenes and stops the War. Stalin grabs territory in East Asia. The War is over, and the Atomic Era and the Cold War start.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: France and Spain: The Pyrenees
programme.desc: Monty treks one of the toughest and most famous freedom trails out of Nazi controlled France, taking him through the valleys and high ridges of the Pyrenees mountains and into Spain.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Spencers venner
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen vil finne venner til Spencer på hans egen alder. De finner noen gode muligheter, men vil vennskapet blomstre?

programme.title: iCarly: Den stjålne laptoppen
programme.desc: Når Sams laptop blir stjålet, prøver iCarly-gjengen å hjelpe henne med å oppspore tyven. Imens får Spencer vite at han ikke får komme inn i sin yndlingsspillehall hvis han ikke er i følge med et barn. Hellet snur når Guppy trenger barnevakt.

programme.title: iCarly: Farvel del 2
programme.desc: Carly er på vei til å akseptere at hun ikke kan gå på det årlige ballet, da faren hennes dukker opp og går sammen med henne. Kvelden tar en uventet vending når faren hennes stiller et livsavgjørende spørsmål.

programme.title: iCarly: Vårt eget webshow
programme.desc: Når Miss Briggs avviser alle yndlingsdeltagerne deres fra uttakene til talenshowet, bestemmer Carly og Sam seg for å lage sitt eget talentshow for klassekameratene gjennom iCarly på nettet.

programme.title: iCarly: Herr Nesten Perfekt
programme.desc: Carly er keen på en gutt på skolen som heter Jake. Han er råkul og kjekk, og fordi hun liker ham, inviterer hun Jake til å spille gitar og synge på sitt nye webshow. Men hun oppdager forsent at Jake synger helt forferdelig.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ha flere seere
programme.desc: Carly og Sam konkurrerer med Freddie og Spencer om å finne den beste planen for hvordan å få flere ungdommer til å se på iCarlys websendinger. Når alle planene deres slår helt feil, blir alt helt sprøtt.

programme.title: iCarly: En pågående kritiker
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie vil at web-showet deres skal bli anmeldt av 'Nevelocity', en populær webside for slike anmeldelser. Carly drar for å møte Nevel, og det viser seg at han er en irriterende gutt som vil date henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil bli hos Spencer
programme.desc: Bestefaren til Carly og Spencer kommer på overraskelsesvisitt. Han tror at Spencer er for uansvarlig til å passe på Carly. Carly og vennene hennes må bevise overfor bestefaren at Spencer er i stand til det.

programme.title: iCarly: Rekordforsøket
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å slå verdensrekorden for den lengste sammenhengende nettvideovisningen. For å klare det, må iCarly gå i over 24 timer i ett kjør.

programme.title: iCarly: En date med Freddie
programme.desc: Valerie er iCarly-fan og ber Freddie på date. Daten går så bra at Freddie begynner å filme Valeries eget webshow. Men når hennes webshow kommer i veien for iCarly, får Freddie problemer.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday
programme.desc: The show parodies Leave It to Beaver / The duo needs to go to a hospital / Beavis cries and is mocked unrelentlessly / Highland experiences a toxic gas leak

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bathroom Break / The Rat
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head decide to devote as much of their time at work as possible to bathroom breaks. / A fool and his nachos are soon parted... by a rat? A rat takes up residence and they stop at nothing.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head take woodworking class / Stevensons get a sattelite dish / An unopened can puts our duo to new adventures / Beavis and Butt-Head form a band called Metallica

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Buy Beer / Just For Girls
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get drunk off non-alcoholic beer and fail a sobriety test. / Beavis and Butt-head are allowed to watch a film for girls about teen pregnancy. The titillation ends abruptly during the birthing sequence.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head crash a wedding in hopes of making out with the bride. / Beavis and Butt-head find a dead animal and try to sell its fur. But Beavis soon becomes attached to the lifeless creature.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Det farligste spillet / Beinjegerne
programme.desc: For å hindre den andre i å legge hånden i en bolle varmtvann så man tisser i buksa, holder guttene seg våkne i flere dager./ Beavis og Butt-Head bygger et dinosaurskjelett av bein fra en BBQ.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head become ace bounty hunters after a chance meeting with a reality TV. / With a big test looming, our favorite idiots receive an education in cheating. / Beavis and Butt-Head find themselves trapped in an elevator with a smokin hot chick

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Oil Change / Whiplash
programme.desc: After being instructed to change the oil in the fryer at Burger World, Beavis and Butt-head get the oil from a local gas station. / In an attempt to collect some big insurance money, Butt-head tries to give Beavis a whiplash injury while riding the school

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Candy Sale / To the Rescue
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head sell chocalate bars for their school. Well, the chocolate bars practically sell themselves. / Beavis and Butt-head witness a plane crash and appear in a cheesy reenactment on "Rescue 911."

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Halloween Story
programme.desc: Sabrina faces a frightful dilemma when she must be in two places at once for Halloween.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dream Date
programme.desc: Something’s cooking when Aunts Hilda and Zelda use man dough to bake a date for Sabrina.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Third Aunt from the Sun
programme.desc: As fun Aunt Vesta, Raquel Welch shows Sabrina how the Other Realm half live.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Magic Joel
programme.desc: Sabrina’s job as a magician’s assistant is short-lived when she accidentally makes the boss disappear.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina casts a spell on herself to become an instant Kung-Fu master.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Girl & Her Cat
programme.desc: A Christmas Eve catnapping renews Salem’s love for his family.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Jenny's Non-dream
programme.desc: Behaving as mortals for just one night turns out to be more than the Spellman household can handle.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Trial by Fury
programme.desc: Sabrina and her aunts use magic to show an unfair teacher that what goes around comes around.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Through The Looking Glass
programme.desc: Sabrina's in a foul mood and only baseball great Brady Anderson can help her out of her slump.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Hilda And Zelda: The Teenage Years
programme.desc: Aunts Hilda and Zelda experience growing pains when they turn into teenagers for the night.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Suzanne Takes You Down
programme.desc: Soon after freelance architect Elyse Keaton hires her friend Suzanne Davis to handle clerical chores, she wants to fire the under-qualified, overly aggressive secretary.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Death Of A Grocer
programme.desc: Though Alex loves working at Mr. Adler's "Mom and Pop" grocery store, to the old man's dismay, he quits to "climb the corporate ladder" at an ultramodern supermarket.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Give Your Uncle A Kiss
programme.desc: Mallory is horrified and confused when a close family friend and older business associate of her father makes a pass at her.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Big Brother Is Watching
programme.desc: As the new editor of his school paper, Alex uncovers a cheating scandal and to everyone's chagrin, prints a list of students who were caught including Mallory.

programme.title: Fem i familien: A Christmas Story
programme.desc: When a blizzard forces the Keatons to spend Christmas at home, Elyse's gift to Steven an album filled with fascinating old photos sparks flashbacks to the births of their three children.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Sherry Baby
programme.desc: When popular sorority girl Sherry Marshall befriends Mallory to get close to Alex, Mallory brings them together in hopes of joining Pi Nu but her plan backfires.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Fugitive, Part 1
programme.desc: Elyse's younger brother and Alex's idol, Ned, makes a surprise visit. However, everyone is puzzled by the go-getter corporate executive's suspicious behavior.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Fugitive, Part 2
programme.desc: With the FBI hot on Ned's heels for embezzling 4.5 million dollars in corporate funds, Elyse's ethical brother and Alex's idol tells the family why and where he hid the money.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Margin Of Error
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Boarding Group One
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Keegan ikke får lov å gå om bord i flyet sitt, en bølle som nekter å helle ut innholdet i spritflaska og en bokser som sviner til modstanderen sin.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sexy Vampires
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en uhyggelig asiatisk spøkelsessamboer, kara ser på den lyse siden av tortur og Keegan opplever et hus fullt av sexy vampyrer.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Airplane Showdown
programme.desc: En flyvert må håndtere en passasjer som ikke vil ha på sikkerhetsbeltet, britiske oppdagelsesreisende diskuterer sine reiser, to par forsøker å unngå spoilere på en dobbeltdate og en bibelgruppe opplever en guddommelig intervensjon.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MC Mom
programme.desc: En gangster deltar i et skuddrama, en mor skriver en sang til sønnen sin, to bondefangere konkurrerer, Big Boi møter André 3000 og to karer kommer ut for en bilulykke.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Scariest Movie Ever
programme.desc: En vampyr avslører seg selv, en seriemorder blir forhindret og et barn får ønsket sitt oppfylt.

programme.title: Key & Peele: A Cappella Club
programme.desc: En PSA jobber med barnesoldater i Afrika, en college-a-cappella-gruppe får et nytt medlem, Meegan og André går på sin første date, en terrorgruppe har en matbil og to gamle menn diskuterer popmusikk.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Cunnilingus Class
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Mr. T lærer oss livsleksjoner, Wendell har bruk for en ny seng og en fornærmelse som går over streken.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Slap-Ass
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at kara har en dårlig Skype-forbindelse, en Django Unchained-slavekamp og en baseballspiller som klasker for mange rumper.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Das Negroes
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan prøver å gjemme seg for en negerjaktende nazist. Andre sketsjer inkluderer to slaver som sliter med å bli solgt, et par kriminelle som kommer i knipe før et stort kupp.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meagan's Fight
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Meagan vender tilbake, Jordan prøver å se kul ut på en strippeklubb og opptrer med et funk-show.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Aerobics Meltdown
programme.desc: Stan Lee har noen nye superhelter, og en gatesmart fyr mister sin street cred når han opplever en hjernefrysning. Og sist, men ikke minst, utvikler en mann en komplisert minnesanordning for å huske hvor han har parkert.

programme.title: Broad City: What A Wonderful World
programme.desc: Ilana får nyss om en hemmelig Lil Wayne-konsert. Sammen med Abbi loffer hun seg frem i New York. Jentene lar ingenting hindre dem i å skrape sammen nok penger til billettene. Selv om det blir skremmende, mister de aldri målet av sikte.

programme.title: Broad City: Stolen Phone
programme.desc: Etter å ha prøvd å finne gutter på Facebook, bestemmer Abbi og Ilana seg for å prøve å finne gutter i 'virkeligheten'.

programme.title: Broad City: Working Girls
programme.desc: Ilana prøver å tjene litt ekstra penger i 'temp game'. Abbi lover naboen sin å vente på pakken hans, men hun går glipp av leveransen og må dra til verdens ende for å få fatt i den.

programme.title: Broad City: The Lockout
programme.desc: Når Abbi får sprøytet leiligheten sin mot skadedyr og Ilana mister nøklene sine, blir jentene nødt til å bo på gaten - akkurat når Abbi har sin første kunstutstilling.

programme.title: Broad City: P*$$Y Weed
programme.desc: Jentene må bli voksne! Abbi vil kjøpe sin egen marihuana, som en voksen kvinne, mens Ilana må takle skatten på egen hånd. Og, jentene er høye som hus.

programme.title: Broad City: Fattest Asses
programme.desc: Når Abbi innser at hun er for snill, blir hun mere bitchy. Ilana bestemmer seg for å nå sitt fulle potential. De går på en eksklusiv fest og møter noen eventyrlige DJ-er. Nå kan ingenting gå galt.

programme.title: Broad City: Hurricane Wanda
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana klarer sig igennem stormen med hjælp fra deres venner (Jaimé, Lincoln og Jeremy), men de får desværre selskab af Bevers og hans søster. Et spil 'Who Done It?' udspiller sig, mens orkanan raser udenfor.

programme.title: Broad City: In Heat
programme.desc: Ilana leter febrilsk etter en gave i siste øyeblikk til Lincoln, mens Abbi prøver å finne et klimaanlegg for å få det kjølig på soveværelset.

programme.title: Broad City: Mochalatta Chills
programme.desc: Der dukker opp nye muligheter når Abbi endelig kan trene noen på Soulstice og Ilana gjør suksess som firmasjef.

programme.title: Broad City: Wisdom Teeth
programme.desc: Abbi skal trekke visdomstennene og Ilana ser det som sin plikt å passe henne til hun får det bedre - noe som selvfølgelig innebærer en masse 'medikamenter' og en total mangel på tilsyn.

programme.title: Broad City: Knockoffs
programme.desc: Abbi og Jeremy går på en date som ender med en overraskelse. Ilana og hennes mor leter etter den perfekte håndvesken.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel and Craig Get Married
programme.desc: Good news and bad news for Wiegel: her boyfriend proposed, but he's going to be executed for multiple murders.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel's Pregnant
programme.desc: Did Dangle and Garcia freeze to death? Did Wiegel's serial killer husband get lethally injected? What is Carrot Top doing in Reno, and why is he so mad?

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Junior Bros.
programme.desc: While Garcia goes undercover to bust undocumented workers and the people who hire them, Junior spends his day off with his brothers.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Jet Ski Blues
programme.desc: The Reno Sheriff's Department inherits a beautiful, cursed jet ski from a fallen deputy.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Rick's On It
programme.desc: Rick the Citizens' Patrolman one-ups the Sheriff's Department in investigating a crime spree, and Garcia receives a visit from an old, unpredictable friend.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Spanish Mike Comes Back
programme.desc: Spanish Mike Alvarez returns to tempt the deputies, and Jones and Garcia work security at a Ted Nugent concert.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Son of a Chechekevitch
programme.desc: The deputies vow to avenge Sheriff Chechekevitch's death, and Wiegel studies with Lamaze instructor Guy Gerricault.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Investigation Continues
programme.desc: The investigation into Sheriff Chechekevitch's murder zeroes in on his ex-wife, and Williams and Wiegel attend a Lamaze class.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Corporate Sponsor
programme.desc: Hotty's Restaurants sponsors the Reno Sheriff's Department, and the gang gets burned by the deal.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Christian Karaoke Singles' Mixer
programme.desc: Clemmy scandalizes Kimball's Christian singles karaoke club, and Dangle takes bets on the origins of Wiegel's baby.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Real Movies & Wu-Tang Financial
programme.desc: Dave takes a realistic look at "Pretty Woman" and "The Matrix" and introduces the Wu-Tang Clan's new financial consulting firm.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums's Intervention & Racist Hollywood Animals
programme.desc: Tyrone mistakes an intervention for a crack sale, and "Frontline" covers racist animals.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Blackzilla & Playa Haters' Ball
programme.desc: Dave takes Japan by storm in the sci-fi adventure "Blackzilla," and America Undercover presents The Playa Haters' Ball.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Piss on You & The World's Greatest Wars
programme.desc: Dave presents the History Channel coverage of great inner-city gang wars from the 1980s.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Make-A-Wish & Fisticuff
programme.desc: Dave sees people's inner thoughts and freaks out when a little kid beats him at video games.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: O'Dweeds & Trading Spouses
programme.desc: Dave shows what happens when couples try "Trading Spouses" and introduces a family-friendly brand of pot; musical guest Black Star.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Samuel Jackson Beer & Racial Draft
programme.desc: Dave debuts Samuel Jackson beer and reveals major upsets in "The Racial Draft."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Negrodamus & The Niggar Family
programme.desc: Paul Mooney introduces Negrodamus, and Dave imagines a black Gallagher.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: White People Can't Dance & The Three Daves
programme.desc: Dave challenges the myth that white people can't dance.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Love Contract & True Hollywood Stories: Rick James
programme.desc: Rick James is one of the baddest mothaf**kers of all time.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: True Hollywood Stories: Prince & Red Balls Energy Drink
programme.desc: Negrodamus answers questions, and Charlie Murphy plays basketball with Prince.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Gingers Have Souls
programme.desc: I sesongpremieren utfører Daniel og hans personale sportsutfordringer, han sender et våget bilde til en fremmed og Michael - en fyr som blir mobbet for å være rødhåret - får gjenoppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: X12 (CeWEBrity Profile)
programme.desc: Daniel feirer Valentinsdag med å la deg beklage deg over partneren din, og verdens eneste svarte superhelt får nettoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: The Oscars Spoiler Alerts
programme.desc: Daniel får workouttips til soverommet og avslører alt om filmene som er nominert til Oscar for Beste film.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tosh.0 February 26, 2013 - Courtroom C**k Guy
programme.desc: The Courtroom C**k Guy gets a Web Redemption, Daniel tests out different slurs, and comedian Greg Hahn asks for medical advice.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Ventriloquist Fail
programme.desc: Daniel nekter å lage en 'Harlem Shake'-video, og Candice, buktaleren som forlot scenen, får gjenoppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Fat Bottle Ninja
programme.desc: Daniel lærer å koble av, viser hvorfor det er en elendig idé å dra på ferie med kjæresten, og Will - den feite ninja - får gjenoppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tosh.0 March 19, 2013 - The Illusion
programme.desc: The Illusion interns for Tosh.0, Daniel battles a homophobic rapper, and prankster Todd Glass dresses up as a cop.

programme.title: Tosh.0: LP Theories
programme.desc: Daniels nye kvinneparfyme kommer ut, han tilbringer tid med sin yndlingskomiker oppkalt etter en rotgrønnsak og noen ufølsomme collegejenter får oppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Plus-Size Model
programme.desc: Daniel presenterer oss for vår gærne nabo i nord og løser alt som er galt med USA - og dessuten får en model med et enormt hjerte (og stort alt annet) sin oppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: BK Chicken Fries
programme.desc: Daniel lærer hvilke av hans private deler som er brannfarlige og gir bort ting gratis, og en entusiastisk mann som er glad i barnemat, får oppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Del(Eric Lutes) get carried away competing on the racquetball court, Caroline injures her back and ends up confined to bed.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline gets stiffed at her ATM, she meets with bank personnel to retrieve her money. However, because the surveillance camera captured her in an awkward moment, she's too embarrassed to let the bank manager view the tape of her transaction.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Del agree to go to dinner with Annie and Warren, her new boyfriend, they find that Annie left out one minor detail about his background --Warren's an ex-convict with a burglary record.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline finds out the Christmas gift Del gave her might have been extremely expensive, she ponders the message he may be trying to send her about their relationship.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard sets Caroline up on a date with an art council member who happens to hold the key to Richard's future as a successful artist, but when he finds out the man is married Richard wrestles with protecting a friend or furthering his career.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Richard bicker over their shared work space, Caroline finds the perfect solution when she purchases an antique partner's desk from the desk's original owners, writing and life partners Vic Stansky and Stella Dawson.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Annie re-introduces Caroline to the wonderful world of dating, by taking her on a man-hunt, but when Caroline thinks she has met the perfect man, she later finds that he's no love connection.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Del surprises Caroline (Lea Thompson) with a marriage proposal, Richard (Malcolm Gets) feels he no longer fits into Caroline's life and decides it's time to look for another job.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Del (Eric Lutes) takes Caroline (Lea Thompson) on a spontaneous weekend trip, they unexpectedly run into Del’s bitter ex-wife Jill (guest star Joely Fisher) and her boyfriend Blair (guest star Kenny Johnson).

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Annie discover that a John Landis movie is shooting in their neighborhood, they jump at the chance to become extras, but Annie’s excitement turns to sheer bliss when she learns that her dream man is starring in the film.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang scrambles to come up with a scheme aimed at ending a one-sided romance when a determined, pretty cabbie sets her cap for Tony and joins the Sunshine Cab Co. to be near him.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex feels sympathy for a fare who’s a real loser with the women and arranges a date for the man with Elaine, who later discovers that her klutzy companion for the evening is a U.S. Congressman.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s career dreams come true when he lands a role in a soap opera, prompting him to throw his torn-up cabbie’s license at Louie, but the dispatcher vows to take revenge if Bobby ever comes crawling back.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas’ youthful and attractive mother makes her first visit to America, and after she and Alex meet and have an evening love affair, Latka assumes that he will soon be getting a new daddy.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Chris wants to make dinner for John, who is totally against holidays.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake receives a letter and is shocked to find out that his late grandmother has left him $25,000.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Margaret tells John that a letter for a medical conference has arrived, but John scoffs, saying it's just an excuse for doctors to have a weekend in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris and Jake complain about the cold weather when John walks in, happy because it's cold and flu season, which means more patients.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake is looking for someone to go downtown and pick up Stevie Wonder concert tickets for him with no luck.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Chris fears that John is going to break up with her after he invites her to dinner at a nice restaurant with no explanation.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: An enraged and irascible Dr. John Becker (Ted Danson) enters the diner in his typical bad mood and sends the patrons fleeing.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker enters the diner to find Reggie in a rotten mood. After some prodding, she reveals that her ballplayer boyfriend just dumped her.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Lucifer får endelig seg en partner, men blir fort usikker på om han valgte den rette. Jentene får seg en overraskelse da de skal på nok en date med enda en av underverdenens skikkelser.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Hotellet er åpnet og elleve gjester sjekker inn til sesongens første fest. Foran seg har de uker med hardt spill, sterke følelser, ville fester, kjærlighet, allianser og vanskelige valg.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Spillet er i gang! Gjesten på solo er gjenstand for spekulasjon og parene skal gjennom en tillitseremoni. Stoler de på hverandre, eller er det noen som blir fristet til å bytte partner?

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Parenes troskap settes på prøve idet en ny deltager sjekker inn. På Solo kommer det inn et brev med et hemmelig oppdrag som snur opp-ned på hele hotellet.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Det er klart for sesongens første parseremoni. Spillet er i gang for fullt og slue planer legges. En mystisk gjest sjekker inn på Perla.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Mayoo har inntatt rollen som rektor mens inspektøren følger nøye med i det parene må opp til eksamen. Hvilken jente blir satt i fare som følge av manglende kunnskap?

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1003
programme.desc: Ole Jørgen og Gina er førstegangskjøpere på begrenset budsjett, og drømmer om en fredfull og landlig enebolig til seg og kattene. Oda og Simon har noen spesielle utfordringer med sin nåværende bolig.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1004
programme.desc: Alenemoren Ragnhild og sønnen Julius sover i dag i køyeseng, og trenger desperat større plass. Christina og amerikanske Justin har mange krav på lista, og Karianne tar utfordringa på strak arm!

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1005
programme.desc: Samboerne Linn og Joakim bor i dag i drømmehuset, men det ligger på helt feil sted! Hans Christian møter Christine, som leter etter en ny leilighet med uteområde til katten sin.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1006
programme.desc: Christian skal selge leiligheten han har arvet, og Karianne får derfor en helt ny utfordring! Vi møter også tidligere deltagere og får bli med inn i deres nye leiligheter, hus og gårdsbruk.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 901
programme.desc: Toppblogger Isabel Raad har tidligere leid leilighet for 29 000 kr i måneden. Nå skal hun kjøpe sin aller første bolig, men klarer Karianne å finne noe som kan leve opp til de skyhøye forventningene?

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 902
programme.desc: Amalie Snøløs drømmer om å kjøpe et oppussingsobjekt! Men har hun egentlig tid til det? Solfrid og André har spurt Hans Christian om hjelp til å finne drømmehuset, men ikke for enhver pris.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 209
programme.desc: Det er ny uke på Camp Kulinaris og det hersker stor spenning rundt hvem det er som blir ukens restaurantsjef, og hvilke utfordringer det er Kjartan har til gruppa.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 508
programme.desc: Det er konkurransedag på Camp Kulinaris. Sebastian forbereder seg til kamp med fornyet motivasjon. Resten av deltakerne må sanke poeng mot klokka i en stressende lærlingkamp.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 525
programme.desc: Det er en ny uke på Camp Kulinaris. Ukas meny har en personlig vri, og gruppa får en ekstra motivasjon for å levere retter av ypperste klasse.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 311
programme.desc: Det er serveringsdag på Camp Kulinaris. Deltakerne skal drifte en brasiliansk bbq-restaurant med en krevende for form for servering ved bordene.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 706
programme.desc: Restaurantsjefen får en brå og start på dagen som setter hele gjengen på ustø kurs mot menysmakingen. Det blir dårlig stemning når flere deltagere later som at retten deres har blitt kvalitetssjekket.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 521
programme.desc: Det er en ny uke på Camp Kulinaris. Ukas tema vekker stor entusiasme hos en av deltakerne. Et strengt regime innføres på kjøkkenet.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 906
programme.desc: Fred-Åge vil overraske Sven Erik med en gave på vennileumsturen, og sjekker ut hva de lokale souvenirbutikkene har å by på.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1117
programme.desc: Evy og Britt har sin første dag på Gran Canaria. Svein og Lillian leter etter deltagere til mindfulness-kurset. Jane og gjengen er gode samaritaner, og mater Gran Canarias hjemløse katter.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1301
programme.desc: Roger er tilbake på Gran Canaria etter en litt strevsom tur, og på hotellrommet oppstår det problemer med lysbryteren i år igjen. Familien Haider gjør comeback, men får en slitsom ankomst.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1007
programme.desc: Per og kjæresten Bahareh tar turen til badeland for å teste ut vannskliene. Fred Åge og kompisen Sven Erik drar på shopping. Aurora er tilbake på Gran Canaria sammen med moren Bibbi og søsteren Fleur.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 910
programme.desc: Hilde tar seg atter en strøjobb, denne gangen på mangofarm – noe som ikke går helt etter planen. Classy girlsa Aurora og Ann Marielle vil på karaokebar.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 902
programme.desc: I denne episoden går turen til det populære hytteområdet Hvaler. Her skal gutta forvandle en sjelløs hytte til et maritimt paradis.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 903
programme.desc: Ytterst på et svaberg ved Tjomsland i Larvik kommune ligger en hytte du knapt kan se. Her gjenbrukes mer enn vanlig, men hytta er likevel ikke til å kjenne igjen når uka er omme.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 904
programme.desc: Gutta reiser til Hurum for å pusse opp en bitteliten hytte med mange trange rom. Det skal åpnes opp, og hytta skal selvfølgelig få ny farge. Halvor viser hvordan man kan gjenbruke møbler.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 905
programme.desc: Rett utenfor Stavanger ligger Randøy, og her finnes ei hytte med en litt uvanlig fasong. Eierne sliter med en stor trapp som tar mye plass, men det har gutta en løsning på.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 906
programme.desc: Med utsikt over Åsenfjord ligger et lite hyttetun bestående av 3 hytter. Her er det en storfamilie som ønsker seg et finere fellesområde utendørs, samt en oppussing av den eldste hytta.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2502
programme.desc: Else skylder skatt og det er fare for tvangssalg av huset. De galloperende strømprisene og Elses vanvittige forbruk på kaffe, mat og mobilspill velter økonomien og gjør at fremtidsutsiktene er mørke.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2503
programme.desc: Livet til Odin ble snudd opp ned etter han ble alvorlig syk og gjelden fra før og under den livstruende kreftsykdommen stikker kjepper i hjulene for han.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2504
programme.desc: Begjæring om tvangssalg ligger i postkassen til Sverre, og han bruker regninger til å fyre i peisen med. Sverre har valgt å gå på byen i stedenfor å ferdigstille huset som han nå står i fare for å miste.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2505
programme.desc: Daniel drikker 3 liter cola om dagen og gamle forbrukslån står i veien for at han og Mona kan etablere seg. Det Mona tror er uskyldig tipping viser seg å være ganske mye mer omfattende.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2506
programme.desc: Ulrik har tatt opp store forbrukslån for å etablere seg med familie. Lånene er ute av kontroll og han får en ubehagelig overraskelse når ekspertene ankommer. Ulrik har også en hemmelighet som avsløres.

programme.title: Luksusfellen
programme.desc: Madeleine elsker interiør, og klesskapet hennes bugner av nyinnkjøpte klær. Når Madeleine vil ha noe nytt så kjøper hun det. Hun lever over evne, og de dyre forbrukslånene hennes hoper seg opp.

programme.title: South Park: Listen
programme.desc: Guttene stjeler en liste fra jentene, der de har rangert dem fra den kjekkeste til den styggeste. Oppdagelsen påvirker guttene på ulike måter.

programme.title: South Park: Bæsjeproblemer
programme.desc: Mr Hankeys støtende oppførsel får ham nesten avskjediget som leder for det årlige julespillet. Samtidig blir South Park grunnskoles Strong Woman og rektor PKs forhold utfordret på helt nye måter.

programme.title: South Park: De fordømte
programme.desc: Gerald nyter all oppmerksomheten han får fra media og fortsetter å trolle alt og alle.

programme.title: South Park: Havner funksjonshemmede i helvete? (del 1)
programme.desc: Guttene går i kirken, og presten skremmer dem med helvete. De må gå på søndagsskolen og lære å bekjenne sine synder.

programme.title: South Park: Tonsilltrøbbel
programme.desc: Cartman får AIDS etter en blodoverføring. Hvor langt er han villig til å gå for å finne en kur?

programme.title: South Park: Freemium er ikke gratis
programme.desc: Stan blir avhengig av det nye mobilspillet med Terrance og Phillip.

programme.title: South Park: Pre-CIS
programme.desc: Ifølge Eric Cartman har Wendy Testaburger blitt lesbisk.

programme.title: South Park: Kabelkaos
programme.desc: Scott Malkinson prøver desperat å imponere den nye jenta i klassen.

programme.title: South Park: The Worldwide Privacy Tour
programme.desc: Prinsen av Canada og kona prøver å finne privatlivet i en adskilt liten fjellbygd.

programme.title: South Park: Cartmans mor er en hore
programme.desc: Dr. Mephisto hjelper Cartman med å avsløre farens identitet, og alle mannlige innbyggere i South Park er aktuelle kandidater.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 234
programme.desc: Finaleuken sparkes i gang med en dramatisk seremoni hvor tre par skal bli to…

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 235
programme.desc: Siste fest med gjengen! Mye sinne og frustrasjon bobler opp til overflaten, og et nytt Paradise-par viser endelig sine følelser for hverandre.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 236
programme.desc: Finale – og det er klart for den ultimate troskapstesten!

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 201
programme.desc: Åtte forventningsfulle deltagere sjekker inn i Paradis, men det er fortsatt plass til flere …

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 202
programme.desc: Det er andre dag i paradis og noen vennskap begynner allerede å slå sprekker. Hva gjør det med gruppen når en ny gjest sjekker inn?

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 203
programme.desc: Det er én for mye i paradis og tid for sesongens første partnerseremoni!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Musikhjälpen & Grisabocken
programme.desc: En av våra kära tittare köpte en jakt med oss via Musikhjälpen. Glada blev vi o alla andra involverande. Vildsvinsjakt va det vi bjussa på.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Rådjurswrap, Pierre Jagar Vidare I Tyskland & Jakt Med Wehunt
programme.desc: Jompen lagar rådjurswrap med pepparrotscreme.
